title: Appointment Setter For Instargram Outreach
description:
**Must have experience as an appointment setter to apply** 



Instagram Outreach Setter for Coaching Agency



About Us

We are a consulting agency that helps fitness coaches and creators scale using AI powered sales systems. We handle the tech, the sales team, and the strategy. Our Appointment Setters are the first human touch in a system that books calls and closes deals. You will be working directly with our operations team and assigned to specific client accounts.



Compensation

$200/month base

Performance bonuses on a case by case basis

Long term role with growth path for top performers



Schedule and Availability

6 days per week (Monday to Saturday)

Sunday calls still need confirmation messages scheduled

Standard PH hours work well as they overlap with US morning and evening windows

Midday PH is less ideal but still workable

You must be available to spread your shifts across the day (3-4 shifts, spaced 45 to 60 minutes apart)



What You Will Own



Outreach and Lead Generation

Send 20 to 30 personalized Instagram DM openers per shift across 3-4 shifts. Qualify leads from story engagement, new followers, and post interactions using our priority system.



Call Nurture and Show Rate

Schedule confirmation messages every morning for all booked calls that day using Instagram's scheduled message feature. Like and comment on profiles of prospects with upcoming calls.





Reporting and Accountability

Log all messages sent in your daily EOD form. Confirm scheduled messages in 
 with names and times. Flag any issues immediately.



You Are a Fit If



You have experience sending DMs and working inside Instagram daily

You can write naturally in English and personalize messages (no copy paste)

You are organized enough to manage multiple client accounts and shift schedules

You follow SOPs precisely without cutting

corners

You are proactive and flag problems before they become issues

You understand that exceeding message limits can shut down an account and you treat that seriously



To Apply



Go to this link and read the full training document carefully:





At the bottom of the training, click "Apply for This Role" and complete the 10 question quiz plus your contact details. You may also include an optional Loom or welcome video introducing yourself.



Once you have submitted your application on the training site, come back here to OnlineJobs and reply confirming you have applied.



Applications without a completed quiz or experience with instagram / appointment DM setting will not be reviewed. If you skip the training and guess the answers, it will be obvious. Read everything first.



Thanks

title: Video Editor (with Animation & Motion Graphics)
description:
Compensation and Benefits:

Paid Test Project: $70 for a test project is expected to take 6-12 hours depending on your skill level.

Ongoing Work: Starting at $5 per hour for weekly projects, with opportunities to grow and develop as part of our creative team.

Growth Potential: As a part of our team, you will have opportunities for career development, skill enhancement, and greater responsibility within the team!



Why Our Team Loves Working Here:

We’re more than a production company—a collaborative, creative family. Our team thrives in an environment that values:

Continuous learning and growth in Adobe Premiere, After Effects, and design.

A supportive, positive culture focused on producing outstanding content and fostering creativity.

A shared passion for creating high-impact content that drives results for our clients.



About Us:

We’re a national video, podcast, and social media production company with over 10 years of experience. We’ve created thousands of videos for major clients like Accenture, Salesforce, SAP, AT&T, ComEd, and Fifth Third Bank—and the list keeps growing!



What You’ll Do:

Edit high-quality short-form social media videos (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, etc.) for engagement.

Accurately transcribe videos and ensure captions align with the message.

Assist with 2D/3D animation, motion graphics, and visual enhancements.

Collaborate with the team to ensure videos meet client needs and branding.



What We’re Looking For:

Self-motivated and detail-oriented with a passion for creative work.

Strong time management skills to meet deadlines and handle multiple projects.

Eagerness to learn, experiment, and grow in video editing and animation.

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and video editing software. Experience with motion graphics and 2D/3D animation is a plus.

1-2 years of experience in video editing, animation, or post-production, with a portfolio/reel to showcase your skills.

Ability to collaborate and contribute to creative brainstorming within a team.





If you're passionate about creating impactful content and thrive in a collaborative, creative environment, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join and work on exciting projects for top-tier clients.

title: Credit Repair or Debt Settlement Specialist
description:
I’m looking for a Credit Services Specialist to support clients through the credit repair and enrollment process. This role involves credit analysis, client communication, onboarding, payment follow-ups, and retention while staying compliant with legal standards.



What you’ll do:

- Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

- Identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable accounts

- Analyze negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs, etc.)

- Onboard new clients using strong sales and communication skills

- Explain credit reports and improvement strategies clearly

- Educate clients on credit, scoring, and rebuilding strategies

- Provide updates on disputes and set proper expectations

- Maintain accurate records and follow FCRA compliance

- Handle client follow-ups, retention, and payment reminders

- Process payments and update accounts accurately



What I’m looking for:

- Experience in credit repair, collections, or similar roles

- Strong communication and sales skills

- Knowledge of FICO, VantageScore, and credit basics

- Detail-oriented and organized

- Comfortable handling payments and client concerns

title: Social Media Operations Specialist (full-time remote)
description:
Social Media Operations Specialist (this is not a creative role)

Full-time / Remote



About the role

We produce roughly 600 videos a month across Meta, YouTube, and TikTok. Our creative team handles everything from concept to final cut — your job is to make sure every single video goes live on time, on the right platform, and that we actually know what's working.



This is an operations and analytics role, not a creative one. If you're someone who takes pride in airtight execution, loves organizing high volumes of content, and gets a quiet thrill from a clean dashboard — you'll fit right in.



What you'll do

>Publish and schedule ~600 videos per month across Meta 
/Instagram), YouTube, and TikTok — accurately and on time, every time

>Configure and manage platform settings, thumbnails, captions, tags, and metadata for each upload

>Monitor performance across all platforms: views, reach, engagement, watch time, follower growth

>Pull weekly and monthly reports summarizing what's performing and what isn't

>Identify patterns — content types, posting times, formats — that correlate with stronger performance

>Flag underperforming content and share clear, data-backed observations with the team

>Coordinate closely with the creative team to ensure assets are received, renamed, and published per spec

>Maintain an organized content tracker and publishing log

>Over time, build or adapt AI-assisted scripts or simple automations to reduce manual repetition



What this role is not

You will not be writing copy, designing graphics, or producing/editing videos — that's handled by the creative team.

You will not be setting content strategy or making decisions on brand direction.



You're a strong fit if you…

>Have handled high-volume publishing workflows before — social media coordinator, digital ops, or e-commerce background preferred (other industries welcome)

>Know the back-end of Meta Business Suite, YouTube Studio, and TikTok for Business well enough to configure and troubleshoot without hand-holding

>Are obsessively organized — you have a system for everything and you stick to it

Are reliable in the most boring, dependable sense: deadlines don't slip, things don't fall through the cracks

>Comfortable working with a lot of people and a lot of moving pieces simultaneously

>Can read platform analytics and translate them into plain observations ("Reels under 30 seconds are getting 2x the reach of longer ones")

>Are comfortable enough with technology to learn new tools quickly, and ideally have experimented with AI tools or basic scripting to automate repetitive tasks



Nice to have

>Experience in e-commerce or DTC brand social media operations

>Familiarity with tools like Notion, Airtable, or Google Sheets for tracking content pipelines

>Has built a simple automation, script, or dashboard using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, etc.) to save time on a repetitive task



TO APPLY (We will not entertain applicants who DO NOT follow instructions:: Answer the ff screening questions below and share your cv/resume via shareable link)



1) Have you had a similar role where you managed social media posting, scheduling, tracking, or content coordination?

Please explain what you did day-to-day, which platforms/tools you used, and how similar it is to this role.



2) What is the highest volume of content you have handled?

Please share the number of posts/videos you managed per day, week, or month.



3) If you were given 600 videos per month to post and track, how would you organize the workflow?

Please mention the tools, tracker, checklist, or process you would use.



4) Have you maintained social media reports or trackers before?

What metrics did you track? Example: views, reach, engagement, watch time, clicks, shares, comments, follower growth, etc.



5) Tell me about a time you caught a posting mistake, missing asset, wrong caption, broken link, or scheduling issue before it became a bigger problem. What happened, and what did you do?



6) We will be doing reference checks for this position, will you be able to provide as you go through the hiring process?



7) Salary range for this role is from $
USD/mon, is this within your target range?



8) Are you committed to work US Hours (night shift)?

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Digital Marketing Manager

BANKS BENCHTOPS & ROYAL VICTORIA COLLECTION  |  REMOTE — PHILIPPINES  |  FULL-TIME

About Us

Banks Benchtops is Queensland's leading stone benchtop fabricator and installer, operating across four branches — Arundel, Archerfield, Brendale, and Rocklea — with 90+ staff and over 2,500sqm of production capacity. We serve cabinetmakers, builders, developers, interior designers, architects, and retail clients across Queensland.



Royal Victoria Collection (RVC) is our premium engineered stone brand — a curated range of 30+ luxury colours imported directly from inspected factories, available in 20mm and 30mm thickness. RVC is stocked at our Rocklea showroom (26 Breadwell St, Rocklea QLD) — one of Queensland's most impressive stone and kitchen design destinations — and distributed to trade clients across Queensland and NSW.



We are growing fast and looking for two experienced Digital Marketing Managers to help us scale both brands.



The Role

You will take full ownership of digital marketing for one of our two brands (Banks Benchtops or Royal Victoria Collection), working remotely from the Philippines as part of a collaborative online team. You will work directly with the CEO, our in-house graphic design and media team, and your counterpart managing the other brand.



This is not a junior or entry-level role. We need a strategic thinker who can also execute — someone who has run marketing for sizeable businesses, managed real budgets, and can demonstrate results.



Who You'll Be Marketing To

Our audiences across both brands include:



Cabinetmakers — trade accounts who supply and install our stone

Builders — volume and custom residential builders across QLD

Developers — residential and commercial property developers

Interior Designers — specifying stone for high-end residential and commercial projects

Architects — specifying for commercial, hospitality, and luxury residential

Retail Clients — homeowners renovating directly, particularly in regional Queensland

You need to understand that different audiences require different messaging, different channels, and different funnels. One size does not fit all here.



Key Responsibilities

HubSpot CRM Management (Non-Negotiable Core Skill)

Own and manage HubSpot as the central CRM for your assigned brand

Build, manage, and optimise
 marketing campaigns — product launches, promotions, seasonal campaigns, event invitations

Design and implement automated lead nurture workflows for each audience segment (trade, designers, retail, developers)

Maintain database hygiene — segmentation, tagging, list management, de-duplication

Build and manage post-enquiry and post-purchase follow-up sequences

Set up and manage trade client onboarding sequences for new accounts

Track and report on all campaign metrics — open rates, click rates, lead conversions, pipeline value

Google Ads

Plan, build, and manage Google Search and Display campaigns

Keyword research and ongoing optimisation

Location targeting — including regional Queensland coverage for made-to-measure supply

Monthly budget management and ROI reporting

A/B testing of ad copy and landing pages

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Plan and manage paid social campaigns across
 and Instagram

Work with in-house media/design team to brief and approve creative assets

Audience targeting, retargeting, and lookalike campaign management

Optimise for lead generation and brand awareness objectives

Showroom Events & Trade Marketing (RVC Role)

Plan and coordinate monthly trade evenings at the Rocklea showroom — food, drinks, supplier presentations, product showcases

Build and maintain invite lists for interior designers, architects, builders, and developers in HubSpot

Coordinate supplier partners to present alongside RVC

Manage event invitations, RSVPs, and post-event follow-up sequences in HubSpot

Explore CPD-accredited event opportunities for designers and architects

Plan developer and builder-specific events (e.g. breakfasts, site visits)

Content Strategy & Social Media

Develop and manage the content calendar across Instagram,
, YouTube, and LinkedIn

Brief in-house graphic designers and media staff on required assets

Oversee YouTube strategy — educational content, product showcases, project reveals

Manage Pinterest and Houzz profiles for RVC

Coordinate before/after project content, slab reveal videos, and installation showcases

Regional & Trade Development (Banks Benchtops Role)

Develop and execute a marketing strategy for made-to-measure benchtop supply to regional Queensland and Northern NSW

Build regional trade account pipeline — cabinetmakers, builders, and owner-builders in areas 2–3 hours from our factories

Manage Google Ads and
 campaigns targeting regional markets

Build HubSpot pipelines for regional trade enquiries through to quote conversion

Brand Awareness & PR

Identify and pursue editorial coverage opportunities in relevant trade and design publications

Manage Google Business Profile optimisation across all branches

Develop and manage a review generation campaign

Build a referral program for trade clients and manage it through HubSpot

Monitor brand mentions, competitor activity, and market trends

Reporting & Strategy

Deliver monthly performance reports to the CEO: leads by source,
 metrics, ad spend vs. leads, pipeline value, and ROI by channel

Quarterly strategy reviews — what's working, what's not, where to invest next

Recommend new channels, tools, and campaigns based on data

What We're Looking For

Essential Requirements



Minimum 10 years of experience in digital marketing, with demonstrated experience managing marketing for businesses with 20 or more employees

HubSpot CRM experience is mandatory — you must be able to demonstrate hands-on experience with HubSpot including
 campaigns, workflows, pipeline management, and reporting. This is not negotiable.

Proven Google Ads management experience — you must be able to show real campaigns and real results

Experience marketing to B2B audiences — trade, construction, interiors, or related industries strongly preferred

Experience managing or briefing creative/design teams

Strong written English — you will be writing
 campaigns, ad copy, and briefs

Experience working remotely and managing your own workload across time zones

Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision

Comfortable working Australian business hours (or significant overlap)

Highly Regarded

Meta Ads 
/Instagram) campaign management experience

Experience in building materials, stone, kitchens, bathrooms, or interiors industry

HubSpot certification (any level)

Google Ads certification

Experience with event marketing and trade event coordination

Familiarity with the Australian market — particularly Queensland or the construction/trade sector

Personal Qualities We're Looking For

Strategic thinker who can also roll up their sleeves and execute

Data-driven — you make decisions based on numbers, not gut feel

Commercially minded — you understand that every campaign needs to generate revenue

Proactive — you bring ideas, you don't wait to be told

Strong communicator — you can brief a designer, write an
 campaign, and present results to a CEO clearly

Organised and reliable — we're a fast-moving business, deadlines matter

What We Offer

Full-time remote position — work from the Philippines

Competitive salary commensurate with experience

Direct access to the CEO — your ideas will be heard and acted on

Work across two growing, complementary brands with real marketing budgets

Autonomy to build and own your channel strategy

Work with an in-house creative/media team — you have support

Be part of a business that is genuinely growing — this role has room to grow with it





TO APPLY;



"Marketing Manager Application — [Banks Benchtops or RVC]"



Your application must include:



Your CV / resume

A cover letter (maximum 1 page) explaining why you are the right person for this role

At least two examples of campaigns you have managed — include the objective, what you did, and the measurable result

Confirmation that you have hands-on HubSpot experience and a brief description of how you have used it

Applications without campaign examples and HubSpot confirmation will not be considered.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Salary: $500 USD Monthly

Company: Arca 



Role Overview

We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our recruitment team. This is not a "behind-the-scenes" administrative role; you will be the face and voice of our company.

The ideal candidate possesses a pleasing personality—someone who is naturally approachable, professional, and persuasive. Your primary mission is to meet with potential candidates daily, accurately assess their English language capabilities, and lead inspiring information sessions that make people excited to join our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Language Proficiency Assessment

- Conduct live verbal and written English assessments for applicants.

- Utilize your ESL background to evaluate grammar, pronunciation, fluency, and comprehension.

-Provide detailed feedback and scoring to determine if a candidate meets our communication standards.

2. Dynamic Information Sessions

- Lead daily group and individual information sessions (virtual or in-person).

- Present the company’s vision, culture, and benefits in a way that is engaging and infectious.

- Act as a "Brand Ambassador," converting hesitant applicants into enthusiastic new hires through persuasive communication.

3. Candidate Relationship Management

- Maintain a warm and welcoming presence in all candidate interactions to ensure a "best-in-class" candidate experience.

- Serve as the primary point of contact for candidates throughout the early stages of the hiring funnel.

- Follow up with high-potential talent to encourage them to complete the onboarding process.

4. Collaborative Recruitment

- Partner with hiring managers to refine language requirements for different roles.

- Report on candidate pipelines and conversion rates from information sessions.



Required Qualifications & Skills

The "Spark": A naturally pleasing, friendly, and professional personality. You should be someone people feel comfortable talking to immediately.

ESL Expertise: Previous experience in ESL teaching, tutoring, or English proficiency testing (e.g., IELTS, TOEFL, or CEFR standards).

Public Speaking: Excellent presentation skills with the ability to "command a room" (or a Zoom call) and keep an audience engaged.

Linguistic Mastery: Near-native English proficiency is a must. You must be able to spot subtle nuances in language use.

Empathy & Patience: The ability to put candidates at ease, especially those who may be nervous about their language assessment.

Sales Mindset: A background in recruitment or sales is a plus, as you will need to "sell" the career opportunity to top talent.



Why Join Us?

This is a unique opportunity to combine your love for the English language with a fast-paced career in talent acquisition. You will have a direct impact on the quality and culture of our growing team while interacting with diverse individuals every single day.



Interested applicants may apply by completing the Google Form at the link below:

 is a leading online jeweler based in Boynton Beach, Florida.

rchandising and design company with operations in Dubai, specializing in high-end customized products and packaging.

title: Product Listing Specialist (Shopify/Google) — Freelance / Part-time
description:
Product Listing Specialist (Shopify/Google) — Freelance / Part-time

Company: WingBee — Dutch women's fashion e-commerce

Location: Remote

Hours: Flexible, project-based



About us

WingBee is a fast-growing women's fashion webshop based in the Netherlands. We curate trend-driven pieces and ship across Europe. Our store runs on Shopify, and we're looking for someone detail-oriented to help us keep our product catalog clean, consistent, and conversion-ready.



What you'll do

Upload and maintain new product listings in Shopify (titles, descriptions, images, variants, pricing, tags, collections)

Optimize product pages for mobile-first browsing and SEO

Keep collections, categories, and metafields organized

Make sure listings comply with Google Merchant Center requirements

Quality-check images, pricing, and stock data before products go live

Edit and standardize product photography where needed (cropping, background cleanup)

Keep the catalog tidy: archive sold-out items, fix duplicates, update seasonal collections



Working with AI

We use AI tools (including Claude and image-generation tools) as part of our daily workflow — for drafting product descriptions, cleaning up images, and speeding up repetitive tasks. You don't need to be an AI expert, but you should be comfortable working with AI output: reviewing it, editing it, and knowing when something needs a human touch. The job is not "copy-paste what the AI gives you" — it's using AI as a tool while keeping editorial control and quality high.



What we're looking for

Start your message with Hey Wingbee..



Experience with Shopify (admin panel, product creation, collections, basic theme editing is a plus)

Sharp eye for detail — typos, inconsistent pricing, and bad crops drive you crazo… crazy

Good written Dutch (and ideally English)

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal hand-holding

Basic image editing skills (Photoshop, Photopea, or similar)

Affinity with women's fashion is a big plus



Nice to have

SEO basics for product pages

Familiarity with Google Merchant Center

Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, etc.)



What we offer

Flexible remote work — set your own hours

Direct, no-nonsense communication (no endless meetings)

Clear processes and modern tools

Long-term collaboration if there's a good fit

Competitive freelance rate, depending on experience

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Strategic Proposal Invitation: Social Media & Growth Lead

Brands: Purity Peptides & Status Aesthetics

Digital Touchpoints: Purity-peptides.clinic 

1. The Vision

We are seeking an elite Social Media & Content Strategist to architect the digital future of two distinct market leaders. This role isn't about "maintaining" an online presence; it is about aggressive, intelligent growth and establishing category authority through a blend of medical science and luxury aesthetics.

The Portfolio

Purity Peptides: (Clinical/Performance) Positioned at the cutting edge of bio-hacking and regenerative wellness. The goal is to translate the technical rigor found at purity-peptides.clinic into a high-trust, educational community.

Status Aesthetics: (Luxury/Clinical) Our Instagram presence 
 must reflect the pinnacle of "quiet luxury" in medical aesthetics. We sell precision, artistry, and elite patient outcomes.

2. The Strategic Challenge

We invite you to set out a comprehensive roadmap addressing the following pillars:

A. Niche Clinical Dominance (Status Aesthetics)

We want to dominate the conversation around two high-value, niche offerings:

Liquid Rhinoplasty: Showcasing non-surgical profile transformation with a focus on safety and instant results.

CO2 Fractional Laser: Marketing the "gold standard" of skin resurfacing while managing expectations around downtime and recovery.

Task: How would you use visual storytelling and "educational luxury" to convert high-net-worth leads for these specific treatments?

B. Scientific Authority (Purity Peptides)

The peptide market is crowded and often misunderstood.

Task: How will you take the clinical depth of the website and turn it into "scroll-stopping" content that educates athletes and longevity seekers without triggering platform-specific compliance issues?

C. The AI-Enhanced Content Engine

We believe in working smarter.

Task: Set out your chosen AI Tech Stack. Tell us exactly which tools you will use to streamline content research, generate high-end visuals, and automate a 24/7 engagement loop across the blog and social channels.

3. Your Pitch: What We Expect

Instead of a standard CV, please provide a Strategic Proposal that includes:

The Audit: Your initial impressions of our current digital footprint and three immediate "quick wins" for growth.

Brand Differentiation: How you will maintain two distinct "voices"—one science-heavy and performance-driven, the other luxury-focused and clinical.

The Niche Playbook: Your specific content pillars for promoting Liquid Rhinoplasty and CO2 Laser.

The Blog-to-Social Funnel: How you will leverage the blog to fuel social content and SEO, driving traffic back to the clinic.

4. Key Responsibilities

Full-Channel Management: IG, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

Campaign Architecture: End-to-end creation of monthly "Hero" campaigns.

Data-Driven Growth: Weekly reporting on follower acquisition, engagement depth, and lead conversion.

Community Leadership: Driving the conversation in the DMs and comments to move prospects from "curious" to "booked."

The Goal

We are looking for a results-driven innovator. We want the person who tells us what the future of our brands looks like, not someone waiting for a brief.

Please submit your proposal, tech stack recommendations, and a portfolio of your most transformative work

title: URGENT! Senior YouTube Ads Media Buyer ($2,000–$2,500 / Month)
description:
About the Role



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency generating leads across multiple industries. Our YouTube campaigns are already live and spending. This role is not about building accounts from the ground up. It is about jumping into active campaigns, spotting what is not working, and fixing it fast with clear reasoning behind every move.

You will report directly to our Operations Manager and Founders. No layers, no waiting. Your work gets seen and acted on right away.





What You Will Be Doing



>Monitor all active YouTube and Meta campaigns every day and keep a close eye on performance trends before they become problems.

>Dig into the data to find real CPL improvement opportunities across audiences, creatives, and bidding approaches.

When performance drops, you diagnose it quickly, fix it with intention, and document your reasoning so the team stays aligned.

>Catch creative fatigue before it hurts results and brief new hooks and testing angles backed by what the numbers are telling you.

>Stay on top of what is trending on YouTube and proactively bring fresh ideas to the table. We want someone who notices what is working in the wider platform before it shows up in our data.

>Come up with new hook concepts and creative angles regularly. You do not need to produce the content yourself, but you should always have suggestions ready and know how to brief the team clearly on what to test next.

>Adjust targeting, budgets, bid strategies, and campaign structure based on evidence, not assumptions.

>Research what competitors are doing and translate those insights into creative briefs for our content team.

>Send a concise weekly performance report every week with clear, actionable next steps.

>Stay in close communication with the team through Slack and manage your own tasks in ClickUp without needing to be chased.





What We Are Looking For



At least 3 years of hands on experience managing YouTube Ads in a performance focused, lead generation environment.

Someone who has a track record of improving existing accounts, not just setting them up and moving on.

A solid understanding of lead generation funnels and what actually moves CPL in the right direction.

Comfortable working inside large scale Google Ads Manager accounts with real daily spend.

Hands on experience with Meta Ads alongside YouTube is a must.

A genuine interest in YouTube as a platform. You should be someone who actively watches trends, pays attention to what creators and advertisers are doing, and brings that awareness into your work.

Strong creative instincts when it comes to hooks and angles. You know what grabs attention in the first 5 seconds and you can articulate why something will or will not work before it even goes live.

Able to produce clear and actionable creative briefs that a content team can run with immediately, no back and forth needed.

Proficient with ClickUp and Slack as part of a remote, self managed workflow.

Strong written communicator who takes ownership and gets things done without being micromanaged.





Logic Question (Required)



You are managing a YouTube lead generation campaign. Over the past 7 days CPL has gone up by 55% even though budget, audience, and creative have not changed. View through rate has dropped from 38% to 21%. The campaign is running In Stream skippable ads. Landing page conversion rate has stayed steady at 14%.

Walk us through your full diagnostic process. What do you check first, in what order, and why? What is your hypothesis and what action do you take?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think, how you break down a problem, and how deep your platform knowledge actually goes.





Video Introduction (Required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload it to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Tell us who you are, walk us through your paid media experience, share a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and explain why this role makes sense for where you are right now.





Read This Before You Apply



To confirm you have read this post in full, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to grow lucky". Applications that do not start with this phrase will not be reviewed.





What We Offer



$2,000 to $2,500 USD per month based on experience, with a formal review after probation.

A full time remote position with a stable, growing agency that has no plans of slowing down.

Direct access to the Founders and Operations Manager with no middlemen in between.

A fast moving environment where the decisions you make today show up in the numbers tomorrow.





How to Apply



Send in your CV and a cover letter starting with the required phrase, along with your video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

Remote forever

title: Web Developer & Conversion Tracking Expert (GA, GTM, HubSpot, Pixels, Integrations, etc)
description:
Overview:



This role involves Wix web development, Google Analytics / GTM tracking setup, and CRM/system integrations. We are not looking for a manager. We are looking for someone who can figure things out, build systems from scratch, and fix anything that breaks.



This is a part-time, hourly role under EST working hours for a highly resourceful person who steps in whenever technical challenges arise across our marketing stack, websites, and business systems. You will not manage systems day-to-day. You will solve problems, implement solutions, and make things work.



The first project will be migrating our entire website into Wix and setting up all Google integrations and conversion tracking. We expect this to take up to a month to complete. After that, you will work on ongoing projects, including building additional websites, troubleshooting issues, and resolving other technical challenges across our systems.



You should be someone who:

*Can understand a problem and turn it into a working solution

*Knows how to research, test, and troubleshoot across multiple platforms

*Is comfortable using tools you haven’t used before

*Takes full ownership of problems until they are solved



You don’t need to know everything. But you must be able to learn quickly and adapt. 

If you enjoy solving complex problems and building functional systems from start to finish, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:



A. Marketing & Tracking Systems 

*Set up and implement tracking systems (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube, social media pixels)

*Configure accurate conversion tracking across platforms

*Troubleshoot and fix tracking issues, data discrepancies, or broken integrations

*Implement new tracking or measurement solutions as needed

 

NOTE: This is not a campaign management role. You build and fix, you don’t monitor daily performance



B. Website Development & Systems 

*Build websites and landing pages using Wix and other common website builders

*Work with Wix CMS to create dynamic, database-driven pages

*Implement site functionality (forms, tracking, integrations, etc.)

*Troubleshoot and fix issues across front-end, CMS, and integrations

 

NOTE: This is not an ongoing maintenance role. You build it right and fix it when needed



C. Business Systems & Integrations 

*Set up and connect business systems (Hubspot, CTM/Dialpad, store locators, other tools)

*Ensure systems communicate properly and data flows correctly

*Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, broken automations, or integration failures

 

NOTE: This is not an operations role. You set up integrations and fix problems, not manage day-to-day usage



Qualifications:



A. Technical Skills

*Experience with marketing and analytics tools (GA, GTM, Ads, Search Console, social pixels)

*Hands-on experience with conversion tracking and pixel implementation

*Proficiency in website builders, especially Wix, including CMS/database-driven pages

*Familiarity with CRMs, business operations tools, and system integrations



B. Soft Skills

*Independent problem-solver with strong critical thinking

*Highly adaptable and able to learn new systems quickly

*Strong communication skills with proactive “over-communication”

*Detail-oriented with a systems-thinking mindset



C. Company Core Values

Radical Candor

Extreme Ownership

Anticipation

Lean

Drive

Overcommunication

Growth Mindset 



Compensation:

Part-time, hourly role

$8–$12 USD per hour, depending on experience and skill level



Keywords:

Wix, Wix CMS, Web Development, Website Builder, Dynamic Pages, CMS, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, GTM, Conversion Tracking, Google Ads,
 Pixel, Tracking Setup, Marketing Analytics, Hubspot, CRM, API Integrations, Webhooks, Zapier, Automation, Troubleshooting, Debugging, JavaScript (basic), HTML, CSS, Technical Support, System Integration

description:

title: Phone Sales & Customer Onboarding Specialist - Time for Tutoring
description:
Time for Tutoring is a Sydney-based tutoring agency that connects Muslim families with qualified tutors. Our brand is built around and trusted by the Muslim community. The vast majority of our customers are Muslim families, and cultural understanding is at the heart of how we operate.

We are looking for someone to handle inbound enquiries, onboard new customers, and maintain ongoing relationships with families over the phone as we scale.

What you'll be doing:



Speaking with warm leads who have already expressed interest in our service and guiding them through to becoming a customer

Occasionally calling parents first to gather key information so our team can match them with the right tutor

Explaining our service and pricing clearly and confidently

Handling objections with skill and composure. Parents will push back on price, ask hard questions, and need convincing. Your ability to handle this naturally and without being pushy is one of the most important parts of this role

Being the main point of contact for families after onboarding, maintaining the relationship, checking in, and resolving any concerns that come up

Following up with leads who have not yet committed

Light admin to keep things organised



Who we're looking for:



Excellent spoken English. This is a phone-heavy role with Australian customers and how you come across on a call is everything

A genuine understanding of Islamic culture, Muslim family life, and Muslim values. You do not just know about it, you get it

Warm, confident, and natural on the phone

Proven ability to handle objections and close without being pushy

Someone who builds trust easily and can maintain long term relationships with families

Previous sales, customer service, or phone-based experience preferred

Flexible availability as call volume varies day to day



This role is not the right fit if you are not familiar with Muslim culture and the expectations of Muslim families.

To apply you must include:



A 60-second voice recording where you introduce yourself and then respond to this scenario: "A parent calls and says your prices are too expensive. What do you say?"

A brief description of any phone-based or sales experience you have

Answer this question: How familiar are you with Islamic culture and Muslim communities, and where does that familiarity come from?



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.



This is a part-time role with flexible hours. Pay is a base rate of $4 to $8 USD per hour plus commission per successful onboarding. The more you convert, the more you earn. There is real room to grow with the business as we scale.

If you have read this job listing in full, write the word PLANET at the very top of your application.

title: Influencer & Partnership Development Specialist (Performance-Based, High-Quality Outreach)
description:
We are a licensed real estate company in Japan working with overseas investors.



This is NOT a VA or admin role.

This is a thinking role focused on outreach and partnerships.



Your job is to identify the RIGHT influencers, brokers, and professionals

and start meaningful conversations that can lead to real business partnerships.



If you rely on copy-paste templates or mass messaging, do NOT apply.



What You Will Do



• Research influencers, brokers, and professionals (US, Singapore, etc.)

• Understand their audience and positioning

• Write personalized outreach messages (Instagram / LinkedIn /
)

• Send only 1 thoughtful follow-up (no spam)

• Track replies and improve message quality



How Performance is Evaluated



We do NOT measure hours.



We evaluate based on:



• Reply rate

• Quality of replies (serious vs low-quality)

• Meaningful conversations started



Trial & Compensation



• 1–2 week paid trial

• Performance-based compensation (no hourly pay)

• Long-term opportunity for high performers



### Compensation Structure (Performance-Based)



This role is fully performance-based.



During both the trial and post-trial period, the same unit-based compensation applies:



• Valid collaboration reply: 500 JPY per reply (approx. 190 PHP)  

• Confirmed meeting booked: 3,000 JPY per meeting (approx. 1,140 PHP)  



 A reply only counts if it shows real interest in collaboration  

 Meeting payment applies only when a call is actually scheduled  



There is no fixed salary or hourly pay.



After the trial period:

• No monthly cap on earnings  

• Compensation increases based on output and quality  

• Additional incentives or bonuses may be added over time for strong performers  



Top performers can generate significant monthly income depending on performance.





 IMPORTANT – DO NOT APPLY IF



• You use copy-paste templates

• You send mass messages without thinking

• You cannot explain your strategy



 REQUIRED TO APPLY (MANDATORY)



To apply, you MUST complete the following task:



 Task: Write a REAL outreach message



Choose ONE of the following:



• A US-based real estate influencer

• A broker with international clients



Then submit:



 Cold DM

 A personalized outreach message (no templates)



 Follow-up message

 Only ONE follow-up



 Strategy explanation

 Why this message would get a reply

 What response you are trying to get



 Target link

 Instagram / LinkedIn / Website of the person you chose



 Applications will be rejected if:



• Messages look generic

• No personalization

• No explanation

• Target is not relevant



After the trial, compensation will be fully performance-based, 

linked to qualified conversations and partnership outcomes.

title: Facebook Groups Posting & Lead Generation VA
description:
We are a licensed Japanese real estate company specializing in vacant houses.



We are hiring a long-term, full-time independent contractor to support social media posting and lead engagement.

(This is an independent contractor position, not an employee role.)



Main responsibilities:



• Post approved property information on social media platforms

• Monitor comments and move interested users to private messages

• Transition serious inquiries to WhatsApp group chats

• Maintain daily activity and lead tracking logs



This is a support role focused on consistency and daily execution.

You will not handle contracts, negotiations, or legal matters.

All professional procedures are handled by our licensed team.



Compensation Structure:



• Base pay: PHP 8,000 per month

• Performance bonus:

– PHP 200 per qualified WhatsApp group lead

– PHP 4,000 per closed deal (after confirmed contract and payment)



This role includes both fixed monthly pay and performance-based bonuses.

There is strong earning potential depending on your output and consistency.



Training materials and structured posting guidelines will be provided.

We are looking for someone reliable who can work consistently on a daily basis.

title: AI Implementation Specialist (Dev) — E-commerce (Full-time, Claude Code)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company running multiple DTC brands. 



We're a small team (5 people) based in Bali, and we use AI heavily to automate and scale our operations. 

We're looking for someone to join us long-term and help us build and maintain our internal AI tools.



This is NOT a virtual assistant role. 

You will be building real tools, integrating AI APIs, and automating workflows that directly impact revenue.



What You'll Do



Integrate AI video tools (Seedance, Kling, Runway, Pika) into our creative production pipeline

Build and improve our internal creative production tools (we already have a working "Creative Factory" that generates ads at scale)

Build a website launcher tool (auto-create Shopify stores from templates)

Build a product listing tool (CSV ? Shopify via API)

Create dashboards to track performance across multiple stores

Automate repetitive processes (scraping, reporting, data pulls)

Work inside Claude Code / Cursor daily





Required Skills



- Strong experience with Claude Code or Cursor (this is non-negotiable — you will use it every day)

- Python (comfortable writing scripts, working with APIs)

- API integrations (Shopify API, Meta API, AI APIs like Anthropic/OpenAI)

- Basic web scraping (Playwright, Selenium, or BeautifulSoup)

- Comfortable with automation tools (n8n, Make, or Zapier)

- Can take a spec/brief and build a working tool with minimal hand-holding

- Good English communication (written — we work async)



Nice to Have



- Experience with e-commerce / Shopify

- Experience with video AI tools (Seedance, Kling, Runway)

- Basic frontend (Streamlit, simple dashboards)

- SQL / data analysis





What We're Looking For (Personality)



- You SHIP. You don't spend 2 weeks perfecting something — you get a v1 out in 2 days and iterate.

- You can work autonomously. I'll give you specs, you figure out the how.

- You ask questions when something is unclear instead of guessing.

- You document what you build (even if it's just a quick Loom).





Compensation & Terms



- Full-time (48hrs/week), fully remote

- $1,500 - $2,500/month depending on experience (negotiable for exceptional candidates)

- Paid via Wise

- 1-week paid trial ? 1-month paid trial ? long-term engagement

- Flexible hours, but some overlap with GMT+8 (Bali time) preferred





How to Apply? Send us



- A short intro about yourself (3-5 sentences max, no templates)

- A link to something you've built with AI tools (GitHub, Loom, live tool, anything)

- Your experience with Claude Code or Cursor specifically — what have you built with it?





Important: Start your message with the word "BUILDER" so I know you've read this post. Applications without this word will be ignored.

title: Full Time SEO/AI/Web Dev
description:
JOB TITLE: Full-Stack SEO Specialist (Astro + Campaign Management) 

— UK Solar Agency



ABOUT US

SEO Dons is a UK SEO agency working exclusively with solar and 

renewable energy installers. We have ~20 active retainer clients plus 

a portfolio of 50+ exact-match domain (EMD) lead-generation sites. 

We're hiring ONE senior person to own client work end-to-end: from 

building the website through to running the ongoing SEO campaign and 

reporting results. You'll work directly with the founder and report to 

him weekly.



This is a hybrid role. You'll spend roughly 50% of your time building 

and updating sites, and 50% on SEO strategy, content briefs, and 

client reporting. You will not write content yourself — we have writers.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Client builds (50% of the role)

- Build new client websites in Astro SSG (3–5 per month)

- Implement 20–100 location pages per site using getStaticPaths and 

  the Content Layer API

- Add schema markup (LocalBusiness, Service, FAQ, Review)

- Set up Netlify deploys, custom domains, DNS records (via OVH)

- Migrate older bolt.new/React SPA sites to Astro as needed

- Make ongoing site updates and changes for existing clients



SEO campaign management (50% of the role)

- Manage 8–12 active client campaigns simultaneously

- Monthly Google Search Console analysis: identify striking-distance 

  pages (positions 10–30 with 50+ impressions), surface quick wins

- Write detailed content briefs for our writers (target keyword, 

  search intent, competitor analysis, word count, headings, FAQs, 

  internal linking plan)

- On-page optimisation: titles, meta descriptions, headers, schema, 

  internal linking

- Keyword research using DataForSEO API (we'll train you)

- Competitor SERP analysis

- Google Business Profile optimisation

- Monthly client reports (template provided)



REQUIRED SKILLS

Technical

- Strong JavaScript / TypeScript fundamentals

- Hands-on Astro experience (v5+, Content Layer API, getStaticPaths)

- Tailwind CSS v4 
 plugin)

- React (for legacy projects we're migrating)

- Netlify deploy workflow (CLI, deploy API, _redirects, netlify.toml)

- Git / GitHub fundamentals

- Comfortable working with AI tools — Claude, bolt.new, ChatGPT — as 

  daily workflow



SEO

- 3+ years hands-on SEO experience, ideally agency-side

- Confident with Google Search Console (analysing CSV exports, 

  identifying patterns)

- Strong on-page SEO fundamentals

- Local SEO experience (GBP, citations, location pages)

- Comfortable writing detailed content briefs

- Excellent written English — you'll be writing client
s



NICE TO HAVE

- Solar / renewables / trades sector experience

- DataForSEO, Ahrefs, or Semrush experience

- DNS / domain management (OVH or Cloudflare)

- 
 / structured data

- GoHighLevel CRM

- Core Web Vitals optimisation



HOURS & PAY

- Full-time, ~40 hours/week

- Monday–Friday, with at least 4 hours overlap with UK time 

  (9am–1pm UK)

- Pay: £[INSERT BUDGET] per month, paid via Wise or Payoneer

- Two-week paid trial before full hire (paid at full rate)

- 21 days paid leave per year, plus UK bank holidays



HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following — applications missing any item will not 

be reviewed:



1. Links to 2 Astro or React sites you've built (live URLs only)

2. Your GitHub profile

3. Examples of 1–2 SEO campaigns you've managed (screenshots of GSC 

   or analytics welcome)

4. A 3–5 minute Loom video covering: 

   (a) Walk us through one site you built — what was the brief, what 

       tech, what was hardest 

   (b) Walk us through one SEO campaign — starting point, what you 

       did, what the result was

5. Your monthly rate expectation in GBP

6. Use the subject line "FULL-STACK SEO - [YOUR NAME]" so we know 

   you read this brief

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
COMFORTGROWTH AI

Lead Generation Virtual Assistant — Meta Ads, Creatives & Cold Outreach

Remote • Part-Time to Full-Time • Long-Term • US-Based AI Marketing Agency • Philippines-Based VA



20–25 hrs/wk

To Start 9 AM – 5 PM CST

Mon – Fri

Long-Term • Performance-Driven • Real Growth Path



Who We Are

ComfortGrowth AI is a done-for-you AI marketing and automation agency that works exclusively with air duct cleaning and HVAC service businesses across the United States. We are led by Founder & CEO Jamal Henry. We build paid acquisition systems, AI-powered speed-to-lead, multi-channel reactivation campaigns, and creative production for our clients — and we back it with a performance guarantee of 30 qualified leads in 90 days.



Our pipeline is how we grow. This role exists to fill it.



The Role

We are looking for a self-driven Lead Generation Virtual Assistant to own the top of the funnel for ComfortGrowth AI itself. Your job is to bring qualified HVAC and air duct cleaning business owners into our pipeline every single week — through Meta ads you launch and optimize, creatives you produce, and cold outreach you run across
, LinkedIn, and DMs.



You are building the engine that finds us new clients. You will work directly with the founder and report daily.



If the pipeline is full, you are doing your job. If it is empty, we have a problem — and you should already be solving it before I bring it up.



This Is a Long-Term Role

We are not hiring for a one-off project or a few weeks of work. We are hiring the person who will become our in-house Lead Generation Specialist as we scale. If you perform, your hours grow, your scope grows, your pay grows, and you become a long-term core operator inside ComfortGrowth AI.



What You Will Do Every Day:



Meta 
 & Instagram) Ads — For ComfortGrowth AI

• Launch, monitor, and optimize Meta ad campaigns targeting HVAC and air duct cleaning business owners across the U.S.

• Watch CPL, CTR, ROAS, frequency, and lead quality every single day — kill underperformers, scale winners.

• Build new audiences, lookalikes, and retargeting segments based on real performance data.

• A/B test creatives, hooks, and offers continuously — never let a campaign sit stale.

• Maintain conversion tracking and make sure every booked call from the funnel is properly attributed.

• Flag any account at risk of disapproval, restriction, or budget overspend immediately.



Creative Production

• Produce static ad creatives using our internal Ideogram V3 prompt system and our skill-based ad copywriting framework (templates, owner avatars, and SOPs are provided).

• Produce short-form video edits, hooks, and captions for Meta and TikTok using existing brand assets.

• Refresh creatives on a set rotation so no campaign ever runs the same fatigued ad for too long.

• Maintain a live creative library — every approved creative tagged, organized, and easy to find.

• Submit all new creatives through Go high level or slack approval queue before anything goes live.



Cold Outreach to HVAC & Air Duct Cleaning Owners

• Build and maintain prospect lists of HVAC and air duct cleaning business owners using LinkedIn, and our existing prospect agent.

• Run daily outbound cold
 and LinkedIn DM sequences using approved scripts and templates.

• Personalize outreach where it matters — generic copy gets ignored.

• Manage replies, sort interested vs. not interested, and book qualified prospects onto the founder’s calendar.

• Keep the outbound system clean — no domain burns, no spam complaints, no broken sequences.

• Test new angles, subject lines, and openers continuously and report what is working.



Pipeline & CRM Management

• Log every inbound lead fro
ta ads, outbound replies, DMs, and forms into GoHighLevel within 30 minutes of receipt.

• Tag every lead with source, campaign, channel, and stage — pipeline data has to be clean.

• Trigger and monitor automated follow-up sequences; flag any lead that stalls.

• Maintain a live performance tracker — leads, CPL, replies, booked calls, show rate, by source.

• Send a weekly performance summary every Monday morning before 9 AM CST.



Daily Reporting

• Send a concise daily summary by 9:30 AM CST every business day — Meta ads status, yesterday’s leads from each channel, outreach numbers (sent / replied / booked), creatives pending approval, and what you are working on today.

• Keep it short, bulleted, and readable on a phone. I should never need to log into Ads Manager or our CRM to know what is happening.



What This Role Does NOT Include:

We want to be fully transparent about the limits of this role. These are firm boundaries — not areas to push on.



× You will not have access to our internal financial accounts, billing systems, or banking.

× You will not quote pricing, send proposals, or negotiate retainers — qualified prospects get booked onto the founder’s calendar.

× You will not push campaigns, creatives, outreach copy, or new sequences live without going through the Slack approval queue during the trial period.

× You will not run cold outreach from any account, domain, or inbox we have not explicitly approved.

× You will not share, forward, or store account access credentials outside of our approved password manager.

× You will not respond to legal, billing, or contract-related messages.



Anything involving billing disputes, contract issues, account suspensions, ad account bans, or escalations gets routed to me immediately — you do not respond on your own.



What We Are Looking For:



You Are a Great Fit If You:

? have 2+ years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads Manager — not just “supporting” it.

? have actually launched, optimized, and scaled paid Meta campaigns yourself, with results you can describe in numbers.

? have run cold outreach campaigns 
, LinkedIn, DM, or all three) and can describe what worked.

? understand B2B lead generation for service businesses — you know what a qualified business owner lead looks like vs. a tire-kicker.

? can produce static ad creatives and short-form video edits with tools like Canva, CapCut, Ideogram, or similar.

? are fluent in CRM pipeline work — GoHighLevel preferred, HubSpot or similar acceptable.

? are self-disciplined — you do not need to be told to log in, check the accounts, or follow up.

? are self-motivated — you would rather get the job done than be managed through it.

? are results-driven — you measure your day by leads generated, replies booked, and creatives shipped, not by hours logged.

? have sharp attention to detail — your tracking, tagging, and reporting are clean every single time.

? can think without me — when something breaks, your first instinct is to diagnose and propose a fix, not to wait.

? communicate proactively — if a campaign is slipping, a sequence is broken, or numbers look off, you flag it early.

? write in clear, professional English — your reports, captions, ad copy, and outbound messages should rarely need editing.

? are comfortable working U.S. business hours (9 AM – 5 PM CST, Monday–Friday).

? are looking for a stable, long-term role where your scope and pay grow as you prove yourself.



Bonus Points If You Have:

• Experience running cold
 or cold LinkedIn outreach to home service business owners (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, etc.).

• Experience with cold outreach tools like Instantly, Smartlead, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or Lemlist.

• Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — funnels, pipelines, automations, calendars.

• Experience producing UGC-style or “owner-talking-to-camera” video ad creatives.

• Worked at a B2B agency or SaaS company doing in-house lead generation.



Tools You Will Use

Paid Media: Meta Ads Manager

Creative: Canva • CapCut • Ideogram V3 • our internal ad copy + creative skill library (provided)

Cold Outreach: Apollo • LinkedIn Sales Navigator • Instantly or Smartlead • our internal LinkedIn prospect agent

CRM & Pipeline: GoHighLevel (GHL) • performance tracker (Google Sheets)

Communication: Slack (daily) • Gmail • Google Workspace

Reporting: Daily summary template • weekly performance report template



Schedule & Engagement:

Work Hours

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Standard Time (CST), Monday through Friday



Starting Hours

20–25 hours per week during the 30-day trial period



Growth Path

Hours expand to 30–40/week after a successful trial; clear path to full-time Lead Generation Specialist as the agency grows



Contract Type

Independent contractor (freelance arrangement)



Payment

Paid weekly, based on logged hours and delivered work, submitted with invoice



Trial Period

First 30 days are a paid working trial — both sides evaluate fit



Communication

Daily summary by 9:30 AM CST; available in Slack during work hours



How to Apply — Read This Carefully

We get a lot of applications. The way you apply tells us more than your resume. Follow these instructions exactly — applications that do not follow them will not be reviewed.
 your response to 
 (subject line: Lead Gen VA Application — [Your Name]).



1. Start your application message with the phrase:

   “I bring leads, not excuses.”

   This confirms you read the full posting.

1. In 4–6 sentences, tell us:

   • What kind of business you have run paid Meta ads for, and what your best result was (numbers — CPL, ROAS, leads, scale — not adjectives).

   • What kind of cold outreach you have run 
, LinkedIn, DM), what tools you used, and what your reply or booking rates looked like.

   • The creative tools you use to produce ad creatives and short-form video.

   • One example of a lead, campaign, or sequence that almost slipped through the cracks, and how you caught it.

1. Send 2–3 examples of static ad creatives or short-form video ads you have personally produced (links, screenshots, or attachments — anything we can actually look at).

1. Include your resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile.

   Make sure your profile is complete and reflects your real, current experience.

1. Confirm your availability.

   Tell us your time zone and confirm you can work 9 AM – 5 PM CST, Monday through Friday.



What We Look For in an Application:

We are not looking for the longest application or the longest list of tools. We are looking for someone who reads carefully, follows instructions, and shows in their application the same self-discipline and attention to detail they would bring to running our pipeline.



Applicants who skip the phrase in Step 1 are not reviewed. Applicants who send a one-line message are not reviewed. Applicants who send no creative samples are not reviewed. Show us how you work — that is the job.



What Happens After You Apply:



Application Review

We review all complete applications within 3–5 business days. If you followed the instructions, you will hear from us.



Short Interview

A 20–30 minute video call to walk through your background, your numbers, and your past creative and outreach work.



Paid Trial Task

You will receive a real scenario — ICP, offer, budget — and produce a Meta campaign brief with two ad creatives and matching ad copy, plus a 5-step cold
 sequence targeting HVAC owners. Paid for your time.



30-Day Paid Trial

If you pass the task, we start a 30-day paid trial at 20–25 hours/week. Both sides evaluate fit.



Long-Term Offer

Strong trial performance leads to a formal long-term engagement with expanded hours, expanded scope, and a real path to a senior lead gen role inside the agency.



A Note from the Founder



I built ComfortGrowth AI to deliver real, measurable lead flow for HVAC and air duct cleaning businesses. We do not sell fluff — we sell booked jobs. To keep growing, we need a steady stream of qualified business owners coming into our own pipeline every week. That is what this role is for.



I am looking for someone who takes the same approach to their work that I take to mine: show up, run the numbers, fix what is broken, ship the creative, send the outreach, hit the goal, and keep moving. If you are self-motivated, results-driven, detail-obsessed, and you would rather get the job done than be managed through it — I want to talk to you.



— Jamal Henry, Founder & CEO, ComfortGrowth AI



ComfortGrowth AI (Royality LLC DBA ComfortGrowth AI) • Remote Position • Philippines-Based VA • 2026

title: Social Media Meme Content
description:
I am looking for an individual to provide 50-60 
s daily for social media posting. The 
s can be sourced through X, IG, and any other media outlet. 60% of the 
s should be put together through X posts so they are new, but all together I would like 50-60 a day, monday-fri.



You will need to provide US based 
s, mostly surrounding current things in pop culture. I can go over in more detail when we talk. 



I would like them turned in between 6-10am US time if possible. I am looking for someone that has experience with this, and isn't new to

The hours on this can fluctuate - you could be done in 4 hours a day or done in 8. Either way, I am willing to pay the salary as long as it is done to my standard.

title: Customer Service / Data Entry / Business Intern / Marketing
description:
We are a U.S.-based, 10-year Amazon FBA business, looking for a few talented, enthusiastic A-players who have big growth potential within our company. Our initial hourly rate is $3/hr, with weekly payments via PayPal. This is a long-term opportunity with significant growth potential for those who demonstrate the capacity to take on more responsibility and excel in their role.                                      



Prior experience is not required.



However, the ideal candidate should possess the following qualities:



1. Strong independent research skills, with the ability to acquire new knowledge through self-directed learning and thorough investigation.

2. Proactive mindset, actively contributing insights to improve workflow and processes while offering constructive feedback.

3. Patience and attention to detail, ensuring accuracy and consistency in all tasks.
