title: Email Marketing Specialist
description:
About the role: 



We are looking for a creative and data-driven
 Marketing Specialist to join our growing marketing team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, executing, and optimizing
 marketing campaigns that drive engagement, conversions, and customer retention. You will work closely with the content, design, and analytics teams to deliver compelling
 experiences across our subscriber base.



Key Responsibilities

- Plan, create, and execute end-to-end
 marketing campaigns, including promotional, transactional, and automated workflows.

- Develop and manage
 content calendars aligned with broader marketing goals and product launches.

- Segment
 lists and personalize campaigns based on user behavior, demographics, and lifecycle stage.

- Monitor, analyze, and report on key
 metrics such as open rates, click-through rates, conversion rates, and unsubscribe rates.

- Conduct A/B tests on subject lines, content, CTAs, and send times to continuously improve performance.

- Maintain and grow the
 subscriber list while ensuring compliance with GDPR, CAN-SPAM, and other data privacy regulations.

- Collaborate with the design team to produce visually appealing, mobile-responsive
 templates.

- Integrate
 marketing strategies with CRM tools and other digital marketing channels.

- Manage and optimize marketing automation flows using platforms such as HubSpot, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar.

- Stay current with
 marketing best practices, industry trends, and deliverability standards.



Qualifications & Requirements

- 2–5 years of hands-on experience in
 marketing or a related digital marketing role.

- Proficiency with at least one major
 marketing platform (e.g., Mailchimp, HubSpot, Klaviyo, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, ActiveCampaign).

- Strong understanding of
 marketing metrics, segmentation, and personalization strategies.

- Experience with HTML/CSS for
 template customization.

- Familiarity with marketing automation, customer journey mapping, and drip campaigns.

- Solid analytical skills; comfortable working with data to measure campaign performance.

- Excellent written communication skills and keen attention to detail.

- Knowledge of GDPR, CAN-SPAM, and other
 compliance requirements.



Skills & Competencies

- Creative thinking with strong copywriting abilities.

- Analytical mindset with a test-and-learn approach.

- Excellent project management and organizational skills.

- Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously and meet deadlines.

- Strong collaboration skills and ability to work cross-functionally.

- Self-motivated with a growth mindset and eagerness to stay updated on industry trends.



To Apply: Please fill out this form: 



Note:  We only accept applications through the form.

title: Manhwa recap Script writer
description:
We are looking for a skilled writer to create narration scripts based on manhwa (Korean webtoon/comic) chapters for use in video content.



What you'll be doing:

- Reading the actual manhwa chapters

- Writing chapter-by-chapter recaps

- Writing in a smooth, easy-to-follow narration style

- Clearly labeling each chapter in the script so the video editor can cut and match scenes easily

- Rewording dialogue and descriptions in your own words — do NOT copy text verbatim from the source material



The finished script must be approximately 10,000 words (roughly 1 hour of spoken audio).



Pay: $20 USD per completed script



IMPORTANT: Before applying, please confirm in your application that you are comfortable with the $20/script rate and the ~10,000 word requirement per script. If this rate does not work for you, please do not apply.

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant
description:
E-commerce Virtual Assistant (Etsy, Shopify, Amazon) – Faith-Based Brand for Moms | Part-Time ? Full-Time



**Company:** GloFusion Creations LLC

**Industry:** Faith-Based Apparel & Gifts for Christian Moms

**Location:** Remote

**Position Type:** Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time Opportunity



About Us



GloFusion Creations is a growing Christian lifestyle brand focused on uplifting, faith-filled products for moms. We sell across Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon, and we’re building a scalable brand that combines creativity, systems, and purpose.



We are looking for a **detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant** who can help manage and grow our stores while maintaining a high standard of quality and consistency.



Your Role

You will be responsible for **day-to-day store operations, listing optimization, and backend management** across our platforms.



This is not just a task-based role — we are looking for someone who can **think, improve systems, and grow with the business.**



Responsibilities



**Store Management**

* Manage Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon listings

* Upload and optimize new products (titles, descriptions, tags, images)

* Ensure all listings follow SEO best practices

* Maintain consistency across all platforms



Product Listings & SEO

* Use provided templates to create high-converting listings

* Conduct keyword research (Etsy + Amazon)

* Update underperforming listings



Order & Customer Support

* Monitor orders and ensure smooth fulfillment (Printify)

* Respond to customer messages in a professional, warm tone

* Handle basic customer issues (tracking, delays, etc.)



Design & Content Support

* Use Canva to create simple mockups, size charts, and info cards

* Upload and organize product images

* Assist with Pinterest or basic social media posting (optional bonus)



Operations & Organization

* Keep spreadsheets updated (product tracking, uploads, performance)

* Help maintain organized workflows

* Suggest improvements to systems and processes



Requirements



Experience

* Proven experience with Etsy (REQUIRED)

* Shopify and/or Amazon experience (HIGHLY preferred)

* Familiarity with Printify or Print-on-Demand



Skills

* Strong understanding of SEO for product listings

* Excellent written English (clear, professional communication)

* High attention to detail (VERY important)

* Organized and able to follow systems



Tools (Preferred but not required)

* Canva

* ChatGPT or AI tools

* Google Sheets / Excel



 Ideal Candidate

* Proactive (doesn’t wait to be told everything)

* Reliable and consistent

* Has a growth mindset

* Can follow instructions but also improve systems

* Comfortable working with a faith-based brand



Compensation

* Starting: $4/hour (based on experience)

* Performance-based increases

* Opportunity to move into a full-time role



Growth Opportunity

This role can grow into a **Store Manager position** where you help oversee operations, manage systems, and scale the business.



How to Apply

To apply, include the following:

1. Your experience with Etsy, Shopify, or Amazon

2. Examples of listings you have created or managed

3. What SEO strategies you use for product listings

4. Your favorite productivity tool and why

5. Include the word **“GLOW”** in your application so we know you read everything



Important



We are looking for someone long-term. If you are only looking for short-term work, this may not be a good fit.



We’re excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and be part of building something meaningful.



????

title: Researcher
description:
Job Title: Private Investigator / Researcher.

Type of work: Private Investigation - Contractor.



Compensation: You will begin with a compensation of $700 USD per month ($350 USD biweekly), with performance-based increases to be considered after the first, second, third, fourth and sixth months. 



As a reference point, most of our candidates are earning $850 after the sixth month. 



Schedule: Monday through Friday 9 AM - 5 PM.



About the Role



We are seeking a motivated individual to join our team as a Private Investigator (Contractor), focusing on insurance research. This is a fully remote, long-term, work-from-home position. You will be hired as an independent contractor, not as an employee.



While you will have some freedom to manage your own schedule, please note that our company operates within U.S. business hours. All completed cases must be submitted between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM (Pacific Standard Time), as support is only available during these times. Please do not apply unless you have full availability during these hours.



Please note that your performance will be reviewed at the end of the first and second months, which constitute the Onboarding/Training period. Based on the results of these evaluations, we will determine whether to continue a long-term working relationship.



Job Requirements



• Language: English (C2 - Advanced, or native proficiency). Preference will be given to candidates with a neutral or minimal accent. 

• Education: Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in any field. The specific area of study is not important, but an undergraduate degree is required.

• Experience: A minimum of 2 years of experience as an Insurance Researcher or, alternatively, at least 7 years of experience in a different field. Comprehensive in-house training will be provided to less experienced individuals.



Skills & Traits We Value



We have a hands-off approach to management, so success in this role requires independence and accountability. Ideal candidates will demonstrate the following:



• Strong self-motivation and discipline.

• Excellent attention to detail.

• Ability to learn quickly.

• Openness to feedback and constructive criticism.

• Effective time management skills.

• Strong problem-solving abilities.

• Personal accountability for results.

• Clear and consistent communication.



Benefits:



•       Paid training (3 Sessions). 

•       US Federal Holidays are off and paid. 

•       Somewhat Flexible.

title: UGC Communication Specialist for DTC Beauty Brand
description:
Important Note: Please do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.





We are a performance-driven DTC beauty and personal care brand focused on producing high-quality, conversion-ready content for social platforms.



We are looking for a freelance, remote UGC Communication Specialist to manage creator communication, production tracking, feedback, and approvals.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and experienced in fast-moving DTC content workflows.



You will work closely with creators, editors, creative strategists, and the media buying team to make sure every asset moves smoothly from creator filming to final delivery.



Company: By Lash Babe

Website: 

Language: English

Availability: 20 hours per week, open to full-time

Time Zone: Flexible

Work Type: Freelancer

Niche: Beauty & Personal Care

Payment: $1,000 to $1,600, negotiable





Responsibilities



-Manage the full creator production workflow, from package shipment to final asset delivery.



-Stay in daily communication with creators to keep filming, timelines, and deliverables on track.



-Coordinate handoffs between creators, editors, creative strategists, and the media buying team.



-Track package status, creator updates, revisions, approvals, blockers, and final deliveries.



-Support creative strategists with production organization and workflow coordination.



-Organize Google Drive folders, file names, and version control so assets are easy to find.



-Monitor due dates and pipeline status, then flag issues early to avoid delays.



-Keep content storage clean and organized for easy retrieval and repurposing.



-Coordinate reshoots or pickups when content gaps, quality issues, or compliance concerns come up.



-Prepare clear editor handoffs with context, timestamps, usage notes, and creative direction.



Must-Haves



-Strong project management and organizational skills.



-Experience managing a high-volume creator or content pipeline.



-Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



-Ability to document workflows, feedback, approvals, and revisions clearly.



-Fast, proactive communication style with strong attention to detail.



-Experience managing Google Drive folders, naming systems, and asset organization.



-Reliable availability for 20 to 40 hours per week.



-Familiarity with DTC performance content and UGC for paid social.



-Comfortable acting as the main communication bridge between creators, editors, strategists, and media buyers.



Nice To Haves



-Experience in beauty, personal care, or creator-led content production.



-Familiarity with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts workflows.



-Experience using Airtable, Notion, Asana, or similar project management tools.



-Basic understanding of video specs, editing workflows, and content formats.



-Exposure to paid ads production and creative testing cycles.



-Ability to source, vet, and onboard new creators.



-Awareness of platform guidelines, claims, disclosures, and compliance requirements.



Benefits



-Fully remote role with flexible working hours.



-Central role in a fast-moving paid ads production engine.



-Close collaboration with creative strategists, editors, and media buyers.



-Opportunity to work with a high-volume creator pipeline and improve production operations skills.

title: Social media manager / content creator
description:
Social Media Content Creator & Manager 



Brand: Inkd SMP

Type: Part-time (up to 25 hrs/week) ? Potential full-time



Role Overview



We’re looking for a high-level content creator + social media manager who understands how to build attention, drive leads, and scale a premium brand.



This is not just posting content. You’ll be an Integral part of our fun team and growing brand! 



Responsible for turning strategy into execution, using short-form video, trend research, and platform-native storytelling to grow Inkd SMP globally.



You’ll work closely with the founder to execute content that converts, not just looks good. 





Key Responsibilities



Content Creation & Editing



* Edit high-performing short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

* Turn raw clinic footage into scroll-stopping content

* Add captions, hooks, cuts, sound, and pacing that retain attention

* Repurpose content across platforms efficiently



Trend Research & Strategy



* Identify viral trends, formats, and hooks in beauty, hair loss, and personal branding

* Translate trends into brand-relevant content (not copy/paste)

* Bring weekly content ideas backed by performance thinking







Content Planning & Scheduling



* Plan and schedule content across Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms

* Maintain a consistent posting rhythm aligned with campaigns

* Organise content calendar across multiple offers (clients, training, online)



Growth & Performance



* Understand what drives views, saves, shares, and conversions

* Analyse content performance and iterate weekly

* Optimise hooks, formats, and messaging based on data

* schedule posts across multiple accounts using Go High Level 

* Using funnels and lead magnets to attract clients and students 



Brand Alignment



* Maintain a premium, authoritative tone

* Understand positioning in the hair loss / SMP / education space

* Ensure content supports lead generation and brand



Community engagement 

* reply to all comments 

* set up automations where applicable 



What We’re Looking For



* Strong video editing skills, modern feel (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

* Deep understanding of short-form content and algorithm behaviour

* Ability to spot trends early and adapt them strategically

* Experience growing or managing social media accounts

* Strong sense of hooks, storytelling, and audience psychology

* Organised, proactive, and able to work independently



Bonus (Highly Valued)



* Experience in beauty, aesthetics, or personal brands

* Understanding of conversion-focused content (not just viral)

* Basic knowledge of ads/content synergy

* Copywriting for captions and hooks





KPIs / Success Metrics



* Content output consistency

* Growth in reach, engagement, and followers

* Increase in inbound leads and enquiries

* Ability to identify and scale winning content formats



Why Join Inkd SMP



* Work directly with a globally recognised SMP brand

* Directly helping others find hair loss solutions 

* Be part of scaling a category-leading education + treatment business

* opportunity for growth across other brands 





If you’re experienced, please reach out and let’s connect. Please tell us about your experience and how your skills would fit within the business 



Warmest regards

title: Creative Marketing Manager (Content & Systems)
description:
About Us



The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is simple: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role



We are seeking a high-level Creative Marketing Manager to own the visual and written soul of our brand. This role is for someone who is equal parts "Artist" and "Architect." You will be responsible for creating the elite content that establishes Lisa Barry’s voice in the industry while managing the backend systems that keep our business running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities

1. Content Creation & Growth



Video Production: Create high-impact Reels, TikToks, and Shorts from scratch. You’ll research trends, develop unique hooks, and execute flawless edits.



Audience Building: Execute the strategy to reach 50,000 – 100,000 followers through elite short-form content and daily engagement.



Community Connection: Engage with our audience daily to build deep relationships using Lisa’s authentic, "New World" voice.



2. Systems & Funnels



GoHighLevel Mastery: Build, manage, and optimize landing pages and sales funnels. You ensure every page is visually stunning, premium, and functional.



Operations: Maintain our ClickUp workspace. You are responsible for keeping projects on track and ensuring no task falls through the cracks.



Asset Design: Create high-converting lead magnets, PDF guides, and pitch decks that look like 7-figure products.



3. Writing & Creative Direction



Copywriting: Ghostwrite our weekly Substack, the "Wednesday Drop" newsletter, and all social captions. You’ll capture Lisa’s voice perfectly to inspire action.



Innovation: Stay ahead of marketing trends to keep the brand fresh, modern, and visually elite.



4. AI Collaboration (The Claude Requirement)



Power User: Use Claude as your primary co-working partner for writing, strategy, and technical troubleshooting.



Co-Pilot Mentality: You aren't just copy-pasting; you are coaching the AI to "Lisa-fy" every piece of content to ensure it is never generic.



Who You Are

An Owner: You don’t wait for a task list. You see gaps and fill them with brilliance.



System-Oriented: You enjoy the "backend" tech (GHL/ClickUp) as much as the "front end" creative.



Design-Obsessed: If it isn’t world-class, it doesn’t get published.



High-Performance: You thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in hitting growth targets.



Qualifications & Skills

Technical: Deep proficiency in GoHighLevel and ClickUp.



AI Mastery: Expert-level ability to use Claude for high-speed, high-quality output.



Design/Video: Expert in short-form video editing (CapCut) and visual design (Canva/Photoshop).



Experience: 2–3+ years working for high-ticket coaches or agencies.



Communication: Flawless English with a talent for voice matching.



Work Arrangement & Compensation

Location: Remote (Based in the Philippines)



Hours: 9am – 5pm AEST/AEDT (Full-Time)



Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month + performance-based growth opportunities.



How to Apply

To ensure you are a high-level collaborator and not just "copy-pasting" with AI, we require the following:



Your Portfolio: Links to original Short-Form Video (Reels/TikTok) and marketing designs.



The "Loom" Intro: A 2-minute video introducing yourself. Tell us about one time you used Claude to solve a complex problem or speed up a project.



DISC Profile: Please include your DISC assessment results (PDF or screenshot).



Subject Line: Please use the subject line: [Your Name] | Creative Marketing Manager



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid trial.

title: Creative Specialist – Video Editor
description:
BENEFITS

• Paid 13th Month

• Pag-IBIG Contribution

• SSS Contribution

• Flexible Schedule

• Paid Time Off

• Work Anniversary PTO Bonus

• Philippine Holiday Time Off

• Paid Birthdays Off

• Paid Every Friday via Wise. WE COVER THE FEES!

• Bonuses Paid

• Software Provided



JOB OVERVIEW



Murray Marketing Services is looking for a Creative Specialist to join our team and support client campaigns and internal projects. This new role is ideal for someone who loves video editing, creating ad concepts, and building digital marketing assets. You’ll work directly with the owner (Nathan) as his creative right-hand, helping bring marketing ideas to life.



Bonuses will be paid on top of wages as we grow and win. I want to share our success with you!



COMPANY



Murray Marketing Services LLC

(USA | Remote)



About Us



Launched in 2021 and based in Knoxville, Tennessee, Murray Marketing Services is a growing digital marketing agency that partners with service-based businesses. We specialize in Google Ads, paid social, website design (Duda, WordPress, Shopify, GoHighLevel), AI system integrations,
 marketing, and SEO. Currently run by the founder, Nathan (26), we’re expanding with a Creative Specialist to help us deliver next-level results.



Why Join Us?



Creative Focus: Work on exciting projects that include ad design, editing, and digital campaign support. Being a small team of the founder, Executive Assistant, and a Digital Marketing Support Specialist, you'll have a great mix of clients and creative work that keeps your days interesting and hopefully fun.



Ground-Floor Opportunity: Collaborate directly with the founder and be part of a fast-growing agency.



Skill Growth: Gain real-world experience with tools like Eleven Labs, Canva, CapCut, and AI platforms like Ideogram and Arcads.



Flexible & Remote: Work from anywhere, flexibility to your preferred shift time, with consistent communication via Google Chat,
, and Google Meet.



Room to Grow: Opportunity to expand hours, pay, and responsibilities as the agency continues to scale.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



Video & Audio Production



• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut Pro, Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar tools.

• Add captions, music, transitions, and branding to optimize for social platforms.

• Use AI voiceover tools (Eleven Labs or similar) to create high-quality audio for ads.



Creative Strategy Support



• Brainstorm ad angles, creative hooks, and campaign themes.

• Assist in testing new creative formats and tracking what works.

• Brainstorm social media content and captions for both Murray Marketing Services LLC and our clients.

• Guidance and training provided where necessary.



Key Qualifications



• English Proficiency: Strong written/spoken communication skills.

• Video Editing: Strong experience with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar.

• AI Tools: Willingness to learn AI tools like ChatGPT, Ideogram, and Arcads.

• Reliability: Must be proactive and dependable.

• Creativity: Willing to come up with ideas on your own at times.



Compensation & Hours



• Rate: $1000 - $1200+ USD/month (depending on skills & experience).

• Hours: 30-40 hours per week (6-8 hours/day depending on skills & experience). If you are very skilled, this will grow quickly.

• Contract Basis: Independent Contractor.



How to Apply



Please send:

1. Your resume.

2. Portfolio samples (video ads, organic social media content).

3. A short introduction explaining why this role excites you.





If it’s a fit, we’ll set up a video introduction call!

title: Social Media Manager
description:
What You Will Do



1. Optimise LinkedIn profiles for clients

Build and refine LinkedIn profiles using the Profile Optimisation Prompt. Triple-check every detail (company name, dates, location, contact info). Position each client as the authority in their industry and local area. Pull supporting images from client websites and Google Reviews for the Featured section. Brief banner designs that mirror previously approved examples



2. Post on LinkedIn 3x per week for each client

Schedule and publish 3 posts per week per client, written in their voice, following the PCB content framework. Hooks under 10 words. One sentence per line. Every post needs an image. Mix of education, social proof, and personal story. CTAs rotated, never repeated



.3. Optimise Google My Business profiles and post weekly

Audit each client's GMB listing. Optimise category, services, attributes, photos, and keyword positioning. Publish one post per week per client using Jamie's content framework. Track keyword movement and review responses.



4. Outbound LinkedIn connections and messages to ICP

Send connection requests and messages to each client's ideal customer profile using Dripify and the trust-ladder sequencing (checklist, YouTube, testimonials, VSL). Cold messages never imply familiarity. Message 1 has no pitch. Track response rates and report weekly.



5. Review KPI metrics weekly

Update the content tracker every Monday across all clients. Pull metrics from LinkedIn, GMB, and outbound campaigns. Flag underperforming content and outliers. Hand the tracker to Jamie for the monthly 80/20 review.



6. Use Sandcastles AI to locate content outliers

Run weekly outlier analysis to identify high-performing content from competitors and similar accounts in the trades and contracting space. Compile a shortlist of formats, hooks, and angles worth adapting for client content. Present findings in a clear weekly summary.



We will use Slack to communicate with myself and my clients

title: Operations Assistant
description:
Mabuhay!



I’m Chi, a Pinay founder running a small but growing agency here in Florida.



We already have a small offshore team supporting clients in different markets and states, and we are now preparing to grow this service more intentionally as we focus on offering VA support to local businesses here in Florida.



I hope to find someone who can understand the vision behind what we are building, while also respecting the vision, goals, and working style of the clients we onboard too.



What You’ll Help With

You’ll help with candidate screening, VA shortlists, client onboarding support, VA coordination, follow-ups, internal trackers, simple SOPs creation, meeting notes, and occasional client-facing virtual meetings when needed.



You do not need to lead sales calls. That is my role, and I will be the one handling that locally.



However, once a client has already engaged with us, you should be comfortable helping with follow-ups, speaking professionally, taking notes, asking clear questions, and documenting next steps.



Who I’m Looking For

I’m looking for someone with at least 2–3 years of VA experience, preferably with admin, coordination, client communication, recruitment support, or project assistance experience.



I also want to be transparent that this role may not be the right fit for someone with very senior or extensive operations experience. Since we are still growing, if your experience is already at a senior operations level, you deserve a role or client that can properly match that value. 



For now, I’m looking for someone with VA experience, good judgment, and the willingness to grow with the agency as we continue building the VA service side properly.



Important Notes: 

1. Please be honest about your current workload.  If you are already handling two full-time clients and another part-time client, or have a full-time on-site, and two part time online, this may not be the right fit. 



I understand the hustle since I’ve been a VA myself for more than a decade, but I also know from experience that being overloaded can lead to burnout, missed details, and inconsistent work, heavily rely on AI tools, and no work like balance. 



2.  This is not a work arbitrage setup. When I say this is not a work arbitrage setup, I mean this role is not for someone who plans to accept the position, pass the work to someone else, overload themselves with too many clients, or use our client relationships for side arrangements.



We are building a small, structured team where the work, communication, and client relationships stay clear and properly managed through the agency.



This can be implemented if a client eventually needs more than one person or a bigger support setup, I will assess that properly case by case. 



We use AI tools in the agency, but I’m not looking for someone who depends heavily on AI for everything. Kung lahat na lang iaasa sa AI without understanding the task, writing, checking details, then it defeats the purpose of hiring for this role.



Screening 

Please do not attach any IDs in your initial application or send them directly through rando
ssages on any platforms we have. If you are shortlisted, we will give you proper instructions on where and how to submit the required IDs securely.  



For final screening, shortlisted applicants must be willing to provide two valid and verifiable IDs for identity verification.



Team Culture Note

We do not work with people who belittle others, look down on teammates, or act as if they are above the team because of education, experience, title, or background.



This standard also applies to the clients we work with. If a client cannot respect our process, rules, and team, then they may not be the right fit for the agency.  Plain and simple. 



Life is already hard enough. Life is too short.  We do not need that kind of attitude inside the team, working locally and offshore.



Rate

Please include your expected rate when applying.  I want to understand how you understand this job post and if whether it fits the current stage of the agency.



We are still growing, so I may not be the right fit for someone who is already at a senior operations rate.  At the same time, I also don’t want to lowball someone who has strong skills and deserves a client or role that can match that level.



If you are someone who wants to grow with us, please be honest about your rate, availability, and what you can bring to the role.  



Schedule

Monday to Friday preferred | U.S. Eastern Timezone



To Apply

(Don't get too overwhelmed with the job post..)

Create a short video introduction, the naturally "You"..

- Your VA or operations experience 

- Tools you’ve used

- Your (honest) current workload and availability 

- Which city are you in, and what’s the best food place in your area?   

- If I ask you to write a short client update without AI, would you be comfortable doing that?

- What do you think about the important notes, screening process and culture fit?



To Get Shortlisted Quicker



** Please send your short video introduction to my personal Gmail for now: 

Subject:  Chi, dami mong sinabi paboba tea ka na!.

** Please do not send your CV at this stage. Just send the short video introduction based on the details listed above.



Thank you for reading everything. I know medyo mahaba, but I would rather be clear from the beginning.



If this role feels aligned with your experience, current capacity, and work style, please send your short video introduction based on the instructions above.



Once shortlisted, you will receive a response from our internal company
.



Salamat, and I appreciate your interest. -Chi

title: Frontend Operations Manager for DTC Ecommerce Brand
description:
Important Note: Please do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.





About Us



We are a fast-growing, performance-driven DTC ecommerce brand focused on scaling products through creative testing, fast launches, and strong frontend execution.



We are looking for a freelance, remote Frontend Operations Manager to manage marketing execution, campaign launches, landing page readiness, and creative workflows.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced DTC growth environment.



You will work closely with creative, copy, development, and media buying teams to make sure every campaign and launch goes live on time, accurately, and without avoidable delays.





Company: Try Strawberry

Language: English

Availability: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: EST, required overlap from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST

Work Type: Freelance, remote, flexible hours

Niche: DTC / Ecommerce

Payment: $1,000 to $2,000, negotiable





Role Details



Location: Remote with required 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap



Reports To: Head of Growth / Head of Ecommerce



Primary Focus: Marketing execution, launch management, and creative workflow



Core KPIs: Launch timeliness, campaign accuracy, landing page readiness, asset delivery speed, and error reduction



Tools: Shopify, Trello or similar project management tools, Klaviyo, SMS platforms, and UTM/tracking systems





Responsibilities



-Own end-to-end timelines for product launches and seasonal campaigns.



-Make sure all launch deliverables go live on schedule.



-Act as the main bridge between designers, copywriters, developers, and media buyers.



-Coordinate the full launch cycle from creative briefing to live deployment.



-Source, organize, and manage marketing assets for pre-landers, landing pages, and campaign needs.



-Test
 flows, SMS campaigns, tracking links, and launch assets before paid media goes live.



-Run final QA checks on landing pages, product pages, links, pricing, bundles, offers, and checkout flow.



-Manage hands-on Shopify updates, including product pages, SKUs, pricing changes, bundles, and marketing app integrations.



-Keep Trello or similar task boards organized and updated for clear launch visibility.



-Identify workflow bottlenecks and improve systems across creative and marketing operations.



-Work with media buyers to make sure frontend readiness supports scaling plans.





Must-Haves



-At least 1 year of DTC or ecommerce experience.



-Strong Shopify experience, including product setup, landing page updates, and app integrations.



-Experience using Trello or similar project management tools in fast-moving teams.



-3+ years of experience in DTC marketing operations, ecommerce operations, or creative agency project management.



-Strong understanding of digital marketing launch workflows, including pre-landers, creatives, tracking,
 flows, and SMS.



-Excellent organization, timeline management, and attention to detail.



-Experience coordinating cross-functional teams across creative, development, and media buying.



-Reliable availability with 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST overlap.





Nice To Haves



-Experience working with 7-figure monthly ad spend accounts.



-Basic understanding of CRO principles and landing page psychology.



-Familiarity with Klaviyo and SMS platforms.



-Experience building QA systems for campaign and launch readiness.



-Process-building mindset with experience improving operational workflows.





Benefits



-Remote role with flexible hours and defined EST overlap.



-High-impact ownership of marketing execution for a scaling DTC brand.



-Direct collaboration with growth, paid media, and creative leadership.



-Opportunity to improve and build structured launch systems.



-Competitive, experience-based compensation with a 6-month contract and potential extension.

title: Ecom AI Video Editor
description:
Nurae is looking for a D2C Supplement Video Editor to join our team! As our lead editor, you will be responsible for taking creative briefs and transforming them into high-converting video assets, with a massive focus on Video Sales Letters (VSLs) and psychology-based creatives for our paid marketing channels.



We are looking to hire someone with 2+ years of video editing experience. The ideal candidate has prior experience in creating direct response paid advertisements specifically for Meta Platforms, a deep understanding of pacing and visual storytelling for health supplements, and extensive experience utilizing advanced AI tools to streamline production.



---



Who Are We?



At Nurae, we are dedicated to transforming lives through science-backed health solutions. Our flagship product is a daily gut health soft gel — a patented probiotic blend, designed to soothe inflammation, restore gut balance, and help your body release the buildup that causes daily bloating, fatigue, and brain fog. Since our launch, we have grown rapidly through high-converting direct response marketing, building a passionate community of customers who've experienced life-changing results. We operate with a small but mighty team focused on innovation and continuous growth, and we're excited to bring on an editor to play a pivotal role in scaling our brand even further.



---



What Is Our Culture Like & Who Is a Good Fit?



Culture-fit is our #1 factor when hiring! We have a genuine will-to-win. No work is beneath us if it moves us towards our goals. We utilize creativity to do more with less and quickly. We use data to make decisions and live by the following core values: "work smart", "overdeliver", "speed is king" and "better everyday". We love learning, every problem is an opportunity to grow. If you want a stress-free corporate 9-5 job, this isn't it.



If you want to challenge yourself and shape a fast-growing company... Drive results with a group of passionate, smart & hardworking fun people... Work in an environment without politics or corporate chicanery... Play a big part in our growth being hands-on, active, and doing what is necessary with an excellent bonus plan based on performance then you have come to the right place.



---



Key Objectives & Workflow:



Brief Execution: Take creative briefs, provided scripts, and suggested angles, and autonomously build out high-converting video narratives.



Mastering the VSL: Serve as the primary driver for our Video Sales Letter (VSL) production, ensuring ruthless pacing, precise cuts, and maximum viewer retention.



AI Integration: Seamlessly utilize AI platforms (including HeyGen, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, Claude, and Gemini) to generate lifelike voiceovers, enhance video quality, remove unwanted text/overlays, and rapidly produce or refine assets.



Metric-Driven Editing: Drive measurable improvements in core advertising metrics (CPA, CTR, Hook Rate, Hold Rate) across Meta platforms by iterating on video hooks and visual storytelling.



Iterative Testing: Deliver multiple rapid hook variations and video cutdowns to allow the marketing team to test and scale efficiently.



---



Requirements:



Fully remote

Fluent in English

Direct Response Expertise: 2+ years of experience editing performance creatives for DTC health/supplement brands.

Advanced AI Proficiency: Hands-on experience executing workflows with HeyGen, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, and conversational AI tools to accelerate and elevate video production.

Visual Storytelling: A master of the timeline, you understand how pacing, sound design, and visual B-roll keep viewers glued to the screen.

E-commerce Focus: Deep understanding of direct response principles, retention graphs, and what visually stops the scroll on Meta.

No issue working overtime or on weekends if needed. You wouldn't know what to do with your free time if you were working less. You are passionate about your work.

Excellent cultural fit as per our values above.



---



Accountabilities:



Go the Extra Mile: While you won't be writing the scripts from scratch, we expect you to bring your own creative flair to the editing suite. You shouldn't just do the bare minimum; you need to proactively find the perfect B-roll, nail the pacing, and elevate the baseline brief into a highly engaging final product.

Consistent Delivery: Deliver polished, ready-to-test VSLs and short-form video ads on a regular cadence based on provided briefs.

Collaborative Execution: Work directly with the team to ensure visual assets perfectly align with the intended script and emotional angle.

Rapid Iteration: Update winning videos with iterations.



---



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate:



When hiring, we'll work with you to define the KPIs you'll be responsible for (such as video output volume and turnaround times) and set targets. This removes ambiguity around wondering if you're doing a good job after you start.



For this specific role, we will walk you through the long-term vision of our brand and how your editing fits into the puzzle. We will show you our current video style and competitors that are currently crushing it, and outline exactly where we need your expertise to take our creatives next. 



---



Salary Expectation:



Starting at USD $12,000 per year ($1,000/month) base salary + Performance Bonus Structure. (Bonuses are tied directly to ad performance metrics and the overall success of the creatives you edit).



Ollie

Reply with a mango emoji if your serious

title: SPEAKING ENGAGEMENT & BRAND MANAGER (PART TIME)
description:
SPEAKING ENGAGEMENT & BRAND MANAGER

**Must have experience**

Positions Available: 1 | Part-Time 2-4hrs per day  

Location: Remote

Hourly Rate: AUD $6 – AUD $7 per hour



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a proactive, resourceful, and strategic individual to support the growth of Tristan’s personal brand and secure high-quality speaking engagements.



This role focuses on identifying, outreaching, and coordinating opportunities across podcasts, events, and platforms, while also contributing to the overall positioning and visibility of Tristan in the market.



ABOUT PURPOSE ADVISORY

We’re a heart-led, integrative professional services firm focused on helping individuals live their most fulfilled life. Our team is composed of passionate professionals across Australia and the Philippines, working together to create meaningful impact in our clients’ lives through clarity, strategy, and aligned action.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Speaking Engagement Outreach & Booking

• Research and identify relevant podcasts, events, and speaking opportunities

• Conduct outreach to event organisers, podcast hosts, and communities

• Build and maintain a pipeline of speaking opportunities

• Track outreach, responses, and bookings in Airtable or similar tools



Event Platforms Management

• Identify and manage opportunities on platforms such as Meetup, Humanitix, Eventbrite, and LinkedIn Events

• Apply for relevant speaking slots and collaboration opportunities

• Create and publish event listings for Tristan-led events

• Optimise event titles, descriptions, and positioning to attract the right audience



Brand & Positioning Support

• Assist in refining Tristan’s speaking topics and messaging

• Ensure alignment between speaking opportunities and target audience

• Support content ideas that strengthen Tristan’s authority and visibility



Event & Project Coordination

• Coordinate logistics for confirmed speaking engagements

• Organise and manage Tristan-led workshops or events when required

• Track performance metrics (registrations, attendance, engagement)



CANDIDATE MUST HAVE

• Experience in marketing, branding, outreach, or business development

• Strong research skills (ability to find relevant and high-quality opportunities)

• Excellent written communication skills (clear and persuasive)

• Strong organisational and project management skills

• Ability to work independently and take initiative

• Experience using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)



NICE TO HAVE

• Experience booking speaking engagements or podcast outreach (A MUST!)

• Familiarity with Meetup, Humanitix, Eventbrite, or similar platforms

• Experience working with personal brands, coaches, or consultants

• Basic understanding of content strategy and audience targeting



KEY TRAITS

• Proactive and resourceful

• Strategic thinker (not just task-based)

• Detail-oriented and organised

• Strong follow-through and accountability



WE OFFER

• A flexible, remote working environment

• Opportunity to work closely with a purpose-driven brand

• Long-term growth potential within the team



APPLICATION PROCESS

To apply, please submit the following:

• A 2–3 minute video introducing yourself and your relevant experience

• Your updated CV and LinkedIn profile link

• Examples of past work related to outreach, marketing, or events (if available)



Additional Requirement:

Kindly submit your complete application to 
 THOSE WITH COMPLETE APPLICATION WILL BE CONSIDERED.

title: Content Strategy & Research Expert: $800/month | Paid Every Two Weeks
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

title: Business Administration Officer - Permanent Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***

Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 15 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking an administrative officer to join our friendly team.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work-from-home position, ideally between 25 and 35 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 300php and 370php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



We are seeking a candidate who has:



- A keen interest in working in a process-driven environment and working together with a technology-focused team

- A desire to utilise a mix of creative and process-based problem solving

- Excellent English, both written and spoken

- A high level of attention to detail - you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered!

- A good sense of humour!



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have access to internal mentoring, certificates and training programs to encourage you to work with a wider range of systems. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- At least two years of experience working in an business administration position, ideally in IT services organisation

- Experience with various features of Xero, such as bank rules, activity statements, reporting and troubleshooting account issues

- Familiarity or experience with the Australian taxation system

- Ability to work with a variety of documents and spreadsheets, including the use of formulas and advanced formatting

- Experience with AI tools and automation



Your duties will include the following:



- Manage financial operations including accounts payable and receivable, bank reconciliation, billing, payroll processing, and financial reporting via Xero

- Oversee the complete client lifecycle by coordinating Managed Services Client (MSC) onboarding and offboarding, tracking SLA performance, and maintaining strong ongoing client relationships.

- Provide essential operational support through inventory and RMA management, meeting coordination, and regular audits of technician maintenance schedules via Quire.

- Coordinate human resources functions such as recruitment support, team rostering, leave management, and employee onboarding.

- Drive process improvement and compliance by auditing software licensing, reviewing team communications for quality, managing legal documentation, and identifying opportunities for workflow automation.

- Maintain the company's digital presence and sales collateral by executing
 campaigns, performing basic WordPress website updates, basic social media management, and organising centralised documentation.



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via this form to be considered - all other application methods will be IGNORED: 
/form-admin-officer-application



Please also check and re-check the links to your resume to ensure they are correct. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Service Delivery Manager (Fully- Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



We’re looking for a Service Delivery Manager to lead our growing service delivery team.





If you’re great at managing people, keeping projects on track, and making sure customers get an amazing experience this role is for you.



We’re seeking a visionary Service Delivery Manager to join our Executive Team and own the end-to-end delivery of IT services for our customers.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 40+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.





Join our team of A-players—if you’re one too, apply now!



? Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here’s what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus 

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization 

Paid National/Local Holidays 



???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!





???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Job Overview:



The Service Delivery Manager is the senior operational leader accountable for the end-to-end Service Delivery System – delivery, quality, and profitability – of itGenius’s client facing Managed Services IT. 



The role owns service excellence across all aspects of customer service delivery including helpdesk, technical delivery, project management and any other team that delivers customer facing value. 



It requires an executive who demonstrates extreme ownership, resourcefulness, initiative and proactivity – spotting service gaps, risks and system improvements then taking action on them within delegated authority.  





Core Accountabilities:

The Service Delivery Manager is held accountable for the following specific, measurable accountabilities, delegated from the CEO’s Exceptional Customer Value and Organizational Effectiveness accountabilities:



- Exceptional Service Delivery and Customer Satisfaction: Ensure the consistent delivery of high-quality, responsive IT services that result in outstanding customer value, satisfaction, loyalty, and advocacy.



- Operational Efficiency and Scalability of Service: Optimize service delivery processes, systems, and team structures to achieve maximum operational efficiency and enable scalable growth across all service offerings.



- Service Innovation and AI Integration: Drive the strategic integration of AI and automation into service delivery workflows to enhance productivity, reduce errors, and improve the customer experience.



- Service Team Performance and Development: Build, lead, and develop a high-performing global service delivery team that consistently meets performance targets and embodies the company’s values.





Key Responsibilities:



1. Ownership of Service Delivery

Hold end-to-end accountability for the performance of service delivery across all functions: Service Desk, Escalations, MSP, and Projects.

Continuously improve, drive initiatives and self-source tasks from customer data, tickets, trends, and team behaviour. Do not operate as a task-taker – you are a task maker.

Take extreme ownership. It’s its customer facing, its your problem. Own the outcome and coordinate the fix.

Be the senior point of escalation for any service issue that risks client churn, SLA breach, or reputation damage, and close the loop personally.

Attend and actively contribute to the leaders standups, retrospectives and executive meetings. Present findings & insights, not status updates.

Own a quarterly systems improvement programme to constantly drive service excellence.



2. QA, Proactive Risk Management and Client Retention

Own the relationship between CSAT, NPS, FCR, SLA adherence, and client retention.

Run an independent quality assurance function across all aspects of customer service. Right people, right process, right tools, clear reporting.

Proactively address customer churn risk through regular spot checks, ‘walking the floor’ and searching for ‘smoke’ – finding risks before them become issues – harnessing our advanced tech platforms and AI tools to give you a deep level of insight while connecting with the humans to get the real story.

Take personal accountability for top accounts. Build relationships and keep your eye on them.

Build a direct, unmediated sense of the customer journey so you can pin point where problem might occur and work to solve them.

Prioritise customer relationships but never loose sight of the data. Stay in constant touch with shifts in customer satisfaction, sentiment, ticket volumes and team capacity.

Conduct and document monthly service reviews & executive level reporting.



3. Escalations and Critical I
 Management

Own the Escalations system end to end. No escalation left behind, stale checks run weekly, and responses coordinated across Service Desk, Projects, and MSP.

Own critical i
, such as major customer complaints or churn events. See them through to conclusion, ensuring the learnings, performance notes & systems level improvements are discovered and actioned.

Ensure every escalation is reviewed after resolution for systemic improvement, not just closed.

Ensure clean, completed data on customer complaints for analysis. Data driven decision making to identify systems gaps & improvements.



4. System Fluency and Operational Discipline

Fervently adopt, own & promote use of our technology stack, including use of AI, operational system of record & ticketing platforms.

Hold the team accountable to tool use & excellent data integrity.

Keep your queues clean – inbox zero policy.

Establish automation (workflow and AI) where there’s a demonstrable ROI. Don’t exclude humans from the loop. We are AI first, but humans have the final say.

Own continuous improvement of internal process documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base entries.





5. Team Leadership and Collaboration

Lead, mentor, and develop Team Leaders across Service Desk, Escalations, and MSP. Build above-the-line behaviour, clear agreements, and collaborative problem-solving.

Cover the full span of service functions. Do not over-index on any single team.

Work with the Head of People, Culture and Operations to run structured performance conversations, including private feedback where required.

Partner with the Head of Growth to ensure seamless onboarding, service activation, and ongoing customer lifecycle value.

Partner with Finance to ensure service profitability and accurate billing tied to service delivery data.

Partner with the Head of People, Culture and Operations on staffing stability, role clarity, and team development.

Surface strategic insights, customer feedback themes, and service trend data to the Executive team with recommendations, not just observations.



Required Qualifications:

Executive Leadership and Operations

- 5+ years in a senior service delivery, operations, or Managed Services leadership role with direct accountability for client retention and service KPIs.

- Minimum 3+ years in Managed Services Provider (MSP) leadership or service delivery management, preferably with a recognised service framework such as ITIL.

- Proven track record of owning end-to-end service delivery at executive level, including multi-pod or multi-function oversight.

- Demonstrated experience designing and scaling service delivery processes in a remote-first or globally distributed team.

- Experience running quality assurance and spot-check programs, not just reporting dashboards.

- Hands-on system fluency with work management platform, ticketing systems such and documentation tools.

- Experience integrating AI and automation into support workflows is strongly preferred.

- Experience supporting small business clients (1 to 30 employees) preferred.

- Project Management: Demonstrated success managing multiple IT projects and service improvement initiatives. PMP certification preferred.



Technical Expertise

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field.

- 10+ years in IT service delivery or technical support.

- Advanced certifications highly regarded: Microsoft Certified Azure Administrator or Engineer, Google Workspace Administrator, CCNP, or CompTIA Security+.

- Solid understanding of compliance frameworks, IT security practices, and i
 response processes.

- Demonstrated success in resolving complex, escalated technical issues across diverse environments with minimal supervision.

- Strong diagnostic, root cause analysis, and performance tuning skills to ensure reliability and scalability of IT systems.

- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms and services (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS), including migrations, hybrid integrations, and identity management are nice to have but not required.



Delegated Authority to Spend

- Annually budgeted spend for service delivery tools, training, and team incentives.

- All other expenses require CEO approval.

 



Work Schedule

Full-time, 8-hour shift, Monday to Friday, weekends off.

Shift timing aligned to Australian business hours where client coverage requires.

Public holiday observance per the candidate’s country of engagement (Philippines, South Africa, or Malaysia)





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Customer Support and Collections Agent
description:
If you enjoy resolving payment issues, guiding customers through repayment options, and have experience in fintech or Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, then this role is for you. Apply here: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

About us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset.

What You’ll Do

As a Customer Operations & Collections Agent, you’ll be the trusted point of contact for our customers - helping them manage their payments, resolve account issues, and stay on track with repayments. You’ll handle everything from contacting customers to settle accounts, guiding them through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery efforts.

IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Team Lead/Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Bi-weekly salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holiday, listed here

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech





Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 6pm - 1am PH, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Work extensively with AI-driven tools as a core part of your daily workflow. This is a very AI-forward role, so genuine comfort and curiosity with AI is a must.

* Build a real understanding of our processes, not just rely on AI outputs. Speed matters, but so does knowing the reasoning behind what you're doing.

* As the team grows, take on increasing ownership of the Collections function, leading agents, refining SOPs, improving recovery processes, and working closely with Customer Service Operations to keep both teams aligned and running smoothly.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or * lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form
