title: Creative Strategist - US Market
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





About Us



We operate a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across the US and Southeast Asian markets. Our brands are in the 7–8 figure range, and our growth is built entirely on creative research, testing, iteration, and the discipline to do all three at volume.



We run a structured, data-driven creative system. Testing velocity and iteration discipline are what determine how fast we grow. If you want to work somewhere that treats creative strategy as a real performance function, not a vibes-based exercise, this is it.



As a US Creative Strategist, you'll be dedicated to our US market brands, developing and testing concepts for American audiences with the specific buyer psychology, market awareness stages, and offer positioning that move cold traffic in that market.

 

Compensation

This role offers a competitive base salary plus performance-based commissions tied directly to winning concepts that validate and scale. You earn more when your creative drives results - it's that simple.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Research & Concept Development

•   	Developing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats. Typically, video concepts make up 70–80% of your weekly output, with image concepts making up the balance; this ratio shifts based on what's scaling and where the priorities are

•   	Conducting deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts for US audiences

•   	Studying competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology, mass desire, and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities specific to the US market

•   	Building concepts that are rooted in how American buyers think, what they respond to, and what's already saturated in the market



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

•   	Writing compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold US audiences and drive them to purchase (and potentially work in tandem with a dedicated copywriter)

•   	Producing clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers - tight enough that the execution team can move fast without ambiguity

•   	Owning the creative pipeline for your assigned brands: research ? ideation ? scripting ? post-launch performance analysis and iteration

•   	Writing across formats: UGC-style scripts, direct-address video ads, static ad copy, and image concept briefs with the same conversion logic applied to each



Collaboration & Iteration

•   	Working closely with the Lead Strategist at the strategic level and with editors and designers at the execution level

•   	Leveraging proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing velocity

•   	Feeding insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

•   	Analyzing winners and losers weekly - documenting what worked, why it worked, and what to test next

•   	Rapidly iterating winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	Proven direct-response experience > you've written scripts, hooks, or ad concepts that have run on Meta or TikTok (paid socials)

•   	Strong copywriting skills across video and static formats > your writing pulls people in and keeps them moving toward a purchase

•   	Deep understanding of consumer psychology, awareness stages, and what makes cold traffic convert in the  target market

•   	Obsessive researcher > you go beyond surface-level competitive intel and find angles other people miss

•   	High output capacity, averaging 15–20 concepts a week, is the expectation, not the ceiling, and you can sustain it without the quality slipping



Instant No's

•   	You don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting

•   	You want to spend weeks polishing one campaign > this role requires speed, iteration, and high-quality output simultaneously

•   	You struggle with volume, operational workflows, or fast feedback cycles

•   	You're uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins > failure is data, not a problem

•   	You're balancing multiple jobs or clients > this requires full-time, dedicated ownership

 

What Success Looks Like

•   	Consistently producing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats

•   	Achieving a 10%+ creative hit rate -concepts that validate, scale, and drive real spend

•   	Operating as a reliable creative partner to the editors, designers, and lead strategists around you

 

Why Join Us

•   	Hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands with real paid media budgets behind them

•   	Performance-based upside - base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

•   	High ownership - your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth

•   	Rapid learning environment with proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

•   	Clear growth path to Lead Strategist or larger brand scope as you prove your output

 

???? If you don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting, please do not apply. If you do and you're ready to operate at volume in one of the most competitive DTC markets in the world, we'd like to hear from you.



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: Project-Based CAD Drafter — European Architectural Work (Per-Task Pay)
description:
About SchaalStudio



SchaalStudio is a drafting services company producing architectural permit drawings for established European construction firms. 



We're building a small, careful team of Filipino CAD drafters (AutoCAD, BricsCAD, Revit, ArchiCAD) to support our growing project pipeline. This is a remote, project-based role — you work on your own schedule, we pay you per completed task.

We're not looking for a virtual assistant. We're looking for someone who takes pride in clean, accurate technical drawings and wants to build a long-term relationship with a steady source of work.

What you'll do

You'll produce 2D architectural drawings based on briefs we provide. Typical deliverables:



Floor plans (existing condition + new design)

Elevations (4 facades — front, back, both sides)

Cross-sections

Detail drawings at 1:5 scale (wall buildups, etc.)

Room and material schedules



Final delivery is always in DWG and PDF format — what tool you use to produce them is up to you, as long as the output is clean.

What we pay

Per-task, fixed price agreed before you start. We pay for the deliverable, not the time you spend on it. Examples:



Small modification (1 drawing, simple changes): P1,200–2,400

Medium task (2–4 sheets, moderate complexity): P2,400–5,000

Full permit set (8–12 sheets, full WABO package): P10,000–18,000



You d
 how long to spend on each task. Faster, accurate drafters effectively earn more per hour worked. Sloppy work gets sent back for revision before payment. The price is for the finished, accepted deliverable.

Payment via Wise, PayPal, GCash, or local bank transfer within 3 days of accepted final delivery. A small paid trial task (P500) is part of the hiring process — paid for any genuine, complete attempt at the brief.

Requirements

You must have:



Working CAD software on your own computer that can produce and export DWG files. We accept any of: AutoCAD (any version 2018 or newer, preferred), BricsCAD (fully accepted), Revit (accepted for 2D permit drawings), or ArchiCAD (with clean DWG export). Please specify which software and version you use in your application.

Reliable internet capable of uploading 50–200 MB files

At least 2 years of professional drafting experience, preferably in architectural or construction work

Strong attention to detail — dimensions must be accurate, layers must be disciplined, line work must be clean

Ability to follow written briefs precisely and ask clear questions when something is unclear

Comfortable working with PDF references and converting them into accurate DWG drawings

Clear written English (you don't need to be fluent — clear is enough)



Helpful but not required: prior experience with Dutch / European architectural conventions, experience with multiple CAD tools, architectural or civil engineering educational background.

Who this is NOT for



Anyone looking for a guaranteed monthly salary in the first 3 months

Anyone who hasn't actually worked in a CAD tool recently

Anyone using a borrowed, school, or shared software license

Anyone who only has SketchUp, Photoshop, or 3D rendering tools — we need 2D technical drafting capability with DWG output

Anyone uncomfortable with constructive feedback — we will mark up your drawings and you will revise them



How to apply

Send a message including ALL of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



Subject line: CAD Drafter Application — [Your Name]

Years of CAD drafting experience and which software + version you currently use

3 sample drawings you've personally produced (PDF or image format). At least one floor plan and one elevation. Redacted versions are fine if your past work is confidential.

Brief description (3–5 sentences) of the most complex CAD project you've worked on

Your timezone availability — what hours are you typically online?



We respond within 3–5 days to applications that follow these instructions. Good fits will be invited to a paid trial task (P500). Top performers move to ongoing project-based work.

Visit 
 to see how we work.



— SchaalStudio

title: Social Media Support and Content Editing
description:
Virtual Assistant – Social Media & Content Support

Part-Time | Remote | ~8–10 hours per week



Overview

Sleepyhead Studios (
) is hiring a Virtual Assistant to support social media growth and content editing for a professional music producer and mix engineer. The role focuses on short-form video editing and social media discovery tasks within the online music production and audio engineering community.



The assistant will help identify engagement opportunities, mine audience questions, upload content, and edit short-form videos.



The VA will like posts for engagement but will not comment publicly on behalf of the account. Instead, the assistant will collect posts for the account owner to review and comment on.



The role will start with approximately 7 videos per week, with the potential to increase to up to 14 videos per week beginning around July.



Sleepyhead Studios will also be releasing music production software in July. At that time, video editing and engagement needs will increase. The goal is to have a VA in place by May in order to build an efficient workflow before the workload increases.



Core Responsibilities

1. Short-Form Video Editing: Edit vertical short-form videos for social media.

Initial volume: ~7 videos per week

Potential future volume in 1-2 months: up to 14 videos per week



Editing tasks

trim dead space

add subtitles/captions

apply jump cuts where needed

add light zoom cuts for pacing

export vertical format (9:16)



2. Engagement Post Discovery: Identify posts where the account owner should engage.

Two categories must be collected each week.

Artist / Producer Posts

Posts from:

artists showcasing their music

producers showing their beats or songs

Deliverable:

15 posts per week including: creator name, link to the post, and a short note explaining why it’s a good post to engage with

The VA may like these posts but should not comment.

Music Creator Posts

Posts from creators discussing the craft of production or mixing.

Target accounts include:

mix engineers

producer educators

producer creators discussing workflow, mixing, gear, or production techniques

Deliverable:

15 posts per week including: creator name, link to the post, short description of the post topic

The VA may like these posts but should not comment.



3. Comment Mining (Audience Questions): Collect useful questions from comments on music production or mixing posts.

Focus on questions related to:

mixing issues

production workflow

plugin usage

sound design

beginner production or mixing problems



Deliverable: 10–20 comments per week that could inspire content ideas.



4. Content Posting / Repurposing: Upload finished videos onto Instagram Reels, TikTok. YouTube Shorts

Tasks include:

uploading videos

inserting captions

adding hashtags

selecting a thumbnail frame



5. Weekly Analytics Summary: Provide a short weekly report tracking views, likes, saves, comments, follower growth



Estimated Weekly Workload

Video editing (7 videos): ~3–4 hours

Engagement discovery: ~2 hours

Comment mining: ~45 minutes

Content posting: ~1–1.5 hours

Analytics: ~30 minutes

Estimated total: ~8–10 hours per week with potential of 15-20 hours by July.





Security Requirements

The assistant must:

use a VPN set to the United States when accessing social media accounts

use login credentials provided by the company only for work purposes





Requirements

Candidates should:

have experience editing short-form video

understand social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

be comfortable researching creators in the music niche

be organized and detail-oriented



Preferred:

interest in music production and/or audio engineering

familiarity with producer or mixing communities online



Compensation:

Starting hourly rate of $3 to $5 based on experience.

Starting workload: 8–10 hours per week.

The role will expand to 15-20 hours per week as video volume increases and the software launch approaches.





Test Task: Applicants will be given a short raw vertical video clip. The applicant must edit it into a short-form social media video.



The final edit should include:

dead space removed

clear pacing with jump cuts

subtitles/captions added

light zoom cuts for visual movement

final export in vertical 9:16 format

Please reference these TikToks to see how I like my videos edited. I am open to all ideas on how to make the video edits more engaging.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Us

Skills to Change teaches neuroplasticity — the science of how to change memories and the patterns they create. Our founder, Robert, is a behavioral engineer who has spent decades training practitioners and helping people move past trauma and limiting beliefs. Our audience is mostly adults aged 30–60 (majority around 45–50) who are ready to do serious inner work, and many go on to become practitioners themselves.




. 
 
/healingmagic  I am all over the place



We have a YouTube channel with 1,800+ videos (including a full podcast), a website full of teachings, and years of recordings, testimonials, and course materials. Our previous social media manager built a working system — Opus Clip for multi-platform clipping, VidIQ for YouTube SEO, Social Champ for scheduling, Manychat for Instagram DMs, Jibble for time tracking — and documented it well. You are stepping into a running operation and taking it to the next level, not building from scratch.

Why This Role Is Different



This is more than a social media job. As part of working with me, you will learn how the brain actually works — and how to change the memories that have been running your life. You’ll be trained in the same system I teach my practitioners and paying students. It is a life-changing system, and to write for me well you will need to listen to it, learn it, and live it. That is the unspoken bonus of this role: your own quality of life will improve right alongside your work.

I’m looking for a long-term partner — someone who wants to grow with me for years, not months.



What You’ll Do

Short-form content production (main focus)

• Produce short-form clips from long-form content — podcast episodes, teachings, testimonials

• Target output: 8 reels produced per day, 3 posted per day across platforms, the rest held as backup inventory

• Edit for pacing and fillers, write hooks, add text overlays, select music and outros

• Use AI-assisted hook analysis to QC every reel before publishing

• Never let a complete thought go to waste — each reel delivers a full idea



Platform management

• Manage posting and community on
, Instagram, TikTok, X 
), and YouTube

• Write captions in Robert’s voice for each platform

• Schedule content using Opus Clip and Social Champ

• Community management — watch the full video before replying so responses are informed and on-brand; reply to DMs (including Manychat-based Instagram flows)



YouTube channel management

• Keep the channel optimized — titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails, cards, end screens, chapter markers, pinned comments

• Maintain monetization eligibility and flag videos that need review

• Run SEO and hashtag research in VidIQ

• Moderate the community — welcome messages, guidelines, comment moderation

• Review analytics regularly and send a written report to the team via Slack



Operations within the role

• Extract Q&A from each reel and log to the shared Google Sheet

• Track time daily in Jibble with detailed notes

• Check in and coordinate with the team in Slack

• Flag access or tool issues early (e.g., expired platform tokens, payment failures) rather than letting them block work



Must-Haves

• Excellent written English — you will be writing in Robert’s voice across five platforms

• At least 2 years managing social for a real brand (podcast, coaching, wellness, or education preferred)

• Hands-on with Opus Clip, VidIQ, Canva, a video editor (CapCut or similar), Social Champ or a comparable scheduler, and 



Manychat

• Experience clipping long-form content (1–2 hour podcast episodes) into tight, high-retention shorts

• Real YouTube channel optimization experience — monetization, SEO, chapters, cards, end screens

• Organized and accountable — comfortable tracking time in Jibble, logging Q&A to Google Sheets, reporting in Slack

• Reliable internet, quiet workspace, good headset



Nice-to-Haves

• Experience with podcast-based content workflows and long-form repurposing

• Copywriting training (bonus if you follow copywriters like Daniel Throssell, Ray Edwards, and others.)

• Familiarity with neuroplasticity, trauma-informed content, or transformational healing

• Paid ads experience (Meta, YouTube) — we may add ad support once the organic system is humming

•
 marketing or funnel experience



Tools You’ll Use

Opus Clip · VidIQ · Social Champ · Manychat · Canva · CapCut (or similar) · YouTube Studio · Google Drive · Google Sheets · Dropbox · Vimeo · Slack · Jibble · ChatGPT, Claude



Schedule & Pay

• 20–30 hours per week to start, with room to grow into more

• Rate: 26,500 plus per month, depending on experience, paid on 1st and 16th through PayPal only

• Long-term role for the right person.



How to Apply

Send me three things:

1. Your resume or a short summary of your experience

2. Links to 2–3 social media accounts you currently manage or have managed — ideally showing podcast clips or long-form repurposing work

3. In 2–3 sentences, answer this: What draws you to work in the healing/transformation space?



Applications without the answer to #3 will not be reviewed. In the subject line, please write: 

“Memory Manager — [Your Name]” so I know you read the full post.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
About Us

The Weekend Project is a UK-based company that sells event tickets and merchandise through Shopify. We've been growing rapidly — from around £12k in sales in H2 2024 to over £90k in 2025 — and we need a skilled bookkeeper to make sure our financials are clean, accurate, and fully reconciled before we close out the year.



What You'll Be Doing

This is a focused clean-up project covering our full 2025 accounts and 2026 YTD, with the goal of producing a reconciled balance sheet and P&L we can rely on. Specifically:



Reconcile the full balance sheet as at 31 December 2025 and 31 March 2026

Ensure all Shopify Payments clearing accounts are fully reconciled to zero (or with documented timing differences only)

Post any missing journal entries for Shopify sales, processor fees, discounts, refunds, and shipping income

Cross-check processor fees against official Shopify Payments monthly invoices

Reconcile the Revolut bank account to the QuickBooks general ledger

Review and clean up any mispostings or duplicate entries

Produce a clean P&L for the full year 2025 and YTD 2026 split by product category (tickets vs. merchandise)

Document your work with a reconciliation workpaper for each account





Systems We Use



QuickBooks Online (UK)

Shopify / Shopify Payments

Revolut (main business bank account)

Stripe (payment processor — same as Shopify Payments)





Our Chart of Accounts Structure (you'll need to understand this)

We use a clearing account approach for Shopify income:



Shopify Clearing ? Shopify Payments Clearing (sub-account)

Monthly Sales JEs post gross sales by category (40001 Shopify Ticket Sales, 40002 Shopify Merch Sales), with separate lines for discounts (41001/41002), refunds (42001/42002), shipping income, processor fees, and the net clearing debit

Processor fees come from official Shopify Payments invoices issued the 5th of the following month





Who We're Looking For



Proven experience with QuickBooks Online — you must be comfortable posting and editing journal entries, running reports, and reconciling accounts

Experience with Shopify, Stripe, or e-commerce bookkeeping — this is important; the settlement/payout timing nuances matter

Strong attention to detail — we've already identified specific discrepancies (fee methodology differences, missing JEs) and need someone who can work through these systematically

Able to work independently with minimal hand-holding — we'll give you access and clear documentation of what's been done so far, but we need someone who can take it from there

Clear written English — you'll be providing reconciliation workpapers and brief written summaries of your findings

Experience with UK-based companies is a plus (though not essential)





What We'll Provide



Read/write access to QuickBooks Online

Shopify Payments payout exports and official monthly invoices

Revolut bank statements

A detailed reconciliation workpaper already prepared covering the Shopify Payments Clearing account, so you know exactly where we stand and what's outstanding

Clear documentation of our JE structure with examples





Deliverables



Fully reconciled balance sheet as at 31 Dec 2025 and 31 Mar 2026

Clean P&L for 2025 (Jan–Dec) and 2026 YTD (Jan–Mar) by category

All missing journal entries posted and documented

Reconciliation workpaper for each balance sheet account

A short summary of any issues found and how they were resolved

title: Bathroom/Kitchen - 2D designs
description:
**Company Overview:**

As a leading bathroom and kitchen company in the Netherlands, we are dedicated to ensuring that our customers never overpay at retail stores. By offering fair pricing and unbiased quality advice, we have grown into the largest online entity in our sector. To support our continuous growth, we are looking to expand our team with skilled individuals who have a passion for design and innovation.



**Job Description:**

We are seeking a Bathroom and Kitchen Design Specialist proficient in using Microsoft Visio for bathroom layouts and the online tool 
 for kitchen layouts. This role involves creating detailed and aesthetically pleasing designs that meet our clients' specifications and needs. While prior knowledge of bathroom and kitchen design is advantageous, it is not mandatory as we offer comprehensive training to equip you with the necessary skills. The ideal candidate will support our team for 14-15 hours per week, helping us to deliver exceptional 2D designs that enhance our customers' living spaces. There is potential for this position to evolve into a full-time role based on performance and business needs.



**Major Functions:**

- Designing bathrooms using Microsoft Visio and kitchens using 
 based on client specifications.

- Collaborating closely with the sales and marketing teams to understand customer requirements and design preferences.

- Revising and optimizing designs based on feedback to ensure final plans meet customer satisfaction.

- Staying updated with the latest trends in bathroom and kitchen design to incorporate modern and functional elements into each project.



**Required Skills:**

- Proficiency in Microsoft Visio and familiarity with online design tools like 
.

- Basic understanding of space planning principles, especially for bathrooms and kitchens.

- Ability to translate client needs into practical and aesthetic designs.

- Strong attention to detail and a keen eye for aesthetics.

- Excellent communication skills, with the ability to provide regular updates and respond to feedback effectively.

- Reliable internet connection for remote collaboration and design submission.



**Availability:**

This part-time role requires a commitment of approximately 14-16 hours per week. Hours are flexible, and candidates are expected to manage their schedules effectively while adhering to project deadlines.



**Expectations:**

Candidates should have access to a computer capable of running Microsoft Visio, which we will provide and Chrome to use 
. A commitment to maintaining high standards of work and thorough documentation of design processes is essential.



**Working Conditions/Salary:**

We offer a starting salary of €125 per month for the part-time role, with opportunities for growth into a full-time position and increased compensation based on performance.



**Bonuses:**

- Paid Time Off (PTO) after 1.5 months.

- Regular salary reviews every 2-3 months, with increases based on performance.

- Special leave on the first day of menstrual periods.

- Access to professional development courses as part of our commitment to your growth.

- A second monitor provided after 6 months.

- A new laptop provided after 2 years.



Join our team and help us continue our mission to make purchasing bathrooms and kitchens a delightful and fair experience for everyone. If you have a passion for design and a desire to create beautiful, functional spaces, we would love to see your CV and a portfolio of your work.

title: Ecommerce Operations Specialist - Tech Background Required (Long-term, Remote)
description:
ABOUT US

We run multiple Shopify stores selling via Google Shopping. 

The founders handle media buying and product strategy. 

We're hiring an operations specialist who will grow into a senior 

role over time.



The work involves topics like proxies, browser fingerprinting, JSON 

schema, technical SEO, server-side tracking, and ecommerce policy 

compliance. You don't need to know all of this on day one, but you 

DO need a technical brain and the curiosity to learn fast. We will 

train you on everything specific to our business.



WHAT YOU'LL DO (ONCE TRAINED)

- Monitor Google Merchant Center health daily across our accounts

- Run technical compliance audits on our Shopify stores (schema, 

  canonical URLs, page speed, image optimization, policy pages)

- Manage the multi-account infrastructure: proxies, antidetect 

  browsers, identity isolation (we'll teach you our stack)

- Handle account suspensions and write reinstatement appeals

- Coordinate with external partners (developers, e-reputation 

  specialists) for tasks you can't execute yourself

- Test new tools and methods, report findings back proactively

- Keep learning and bringing fresh ideas to the founders



NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS

- Genuine technical background: CS/IT degree, prior developer/IT/

  cybersecurity role, or strong self-taught background with real 

  projects we can verify

- Working knowledge of Google Ads (or another serious Ads 

  platform: Amazon Ads, Meta Ads). You understand campaigns, 

  bidding, conversion tracking.

- Hands-on Shopify experience: backend, themes, apps. No coding 

  required, but you should be able to read a Liquid template.

- You can read a technical document (network, web, schema) and 

  actually understand it

- Strong written English

- Curious by nature: you read, test, tinker

- Self-managed: you take ownership and report proactively

- Open mindset on unconventional ecommerce methods



WHAT'S A BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Any Google Merchant Center exposure

- Antidetect browser or proxy experience (AdsPower, Multilogin, 

  GoLogin, residential proxies)

- Dropshipping or print-on-demand background

- Active in tech or ecommerce communities (Reddit, 
, HN, 

 
)



WHAT YOU GET

- $2,500 to $3,000 per month via Wise, based on level and 

  experience

- Real training from operators running multiple stores

- Long-term growth path: junior to senior to team lead

- Performance bonuses tied to portfolio uptime



TO APPLY

Send us:

- A short message telling us why this role interests you 

  (3-5 sentences max, written in your own words)

- Your CV or LinkedIn

- Links to any of: GitHub, portfolio, projects, certifications, 

  or a previous client/employer reference we can verify

- Your expected monthly salary



Shortlisted candidates will do a paid technical assessment.

mbers who bring additional skills such as:

**Position Title:** B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer  

**Location:** 100% Remote  

**Employment Type:** Full-time  



---



## About the Company



We are an innovative B2B solutions provider specializing in digital transformation for modern businesses. We help companies streamline their operations by offering advanced e-invoicing, accounting, and financial solutions, all supported by powerful marketing and automation tools like GoHighLevel. We are looking for an ambitious, tech-savvy, and results-driven **B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer** to spearhead our online presence and drive lead generation across key Southeast Asian markets, specifically Singapore and Malaysia.



---



## Role Overview



In this fully remote role, you will be the engine behind our B2B pipeline growth and digital footprint. You will act as the digital voice and the first point of contact for our company. You will be responsible for creating and executing outbound lead generation strategies, managing our professional brand on LinkedIn, and taking care of our company website. 



Because you will be marketing technical financial and workflow solutions, you must be IT-savvy, able to understand diverse business models, and highly proficient in written and spoken English.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### 1. Lead Generation & Customer Outreach

* **Outbound Lead Generation:** Design and execute B2B outreach campaigns targeting decision-makers (CFOs, Finance Directors, and Operations Managers) on LinkedIn and
.

* **First Point of Contact:** Act as the initial point of interaction for potential customers, qualify leads, and determine their business needs.

* **Customer Enquiries:** Act as the first responder to incoming queries, providing clear, value-driven communication.

* **Regional Focus:** Leverage an understanding of the Singapore and Malaysian business markets to tailor messaging and drive targeted acquisition.



### 2. Digital Marketing,
 Marketing & Content Creation

* *
 Marketing:** Plan, set up, and execute bulk
 campaigns, automated nurture sequences, and newsletters using GHL (or related
ing tools) to turn prospects into qualified leads.

* **LinkedIn Management:** Build and elevate the company’s presence on LinkedIn, including managing the company page and posting industry-relevant content.

* **Content Writing:** Write compelling, high-converting marketing materials, short-form posts, and professional correspondence in English.

* **Website Management:** Manage and update the company website to ensure messaging remains accurate and aligned with our service offerings.



### 3. Workflow Automation & Technical Consulting

* **Understand the Tech Stack:** Master our digital offerings, specifically e-invoicing and financial solutions, and translate their value to prospects across diverse industries.

* **Automation & Strategy:** Utilize **GoHighLevel** (or similar CRM/automation platforms) to build, manage, and optimize lead-nurturing workflows and customer journeys.



---



## Performance Metrics (KPIs) & Targets



To measure success in your first few months, you will be evaluated against the following key onboarding targets:



* **Customer Acquisition Target:** Successfully onboard a minimum of **4 customers** to take up our Free-of-Charge (FOC) or Paid solution.

* **Enterprise Milestone:** Secure at least **1 Enterprise Customer** out of the required minimum customer acquisitions.



---



## Qualifications & Attributes



* **Experience:** Proven track record in B2B marketing, lead generation, or outbound sales.

* **Market Knowledge:** Past experience serving the Singapore or Malaysian markets is highly desirable.

* **Tech Savviness:** Comfortable discussing and demonstrating IT, accounting, finance, and e-invoicing solutions.

* **Platform Knowledge:** Hands-on experience or familiarity with **GoHighLevel (GHL)** or similar all-in-one marketing automation tools, including
 marketing modules, campaign creation, and list segmentation.

* **Communication Skills:** Exceptional proficiency in English, both written and verbal, with a knack for writing engaging business content.

* **Adaptability:** A fast learner with the ability to quickly understand the core nature of a prospect’s business and propose relevant solutions.



---



## What We Offer



* Competitive base salary with an attractive performance-based commission/bonus structure.

* Completely remote working arrangement with flexible hours.

* Opportunity to work with modern technologies and a dynamic team across the APAC region.



---



Would you like to explore tips on how to use LinkedIn automation to hit your enterprise customer KPI faster?

title: Product Listing Specialist & Keyword Researcher
description:

Familiarity with Google Ads Keyword Planner

Excellent written English

Experience with Shopify is a plus

What We Offer

Flexible working hours

Salary growth based on performance and effort

Any examples of previous work if available



We are looking for someone trustworthy and committed who takes pride in their work. Salary will grow as you grow with us!

title: AI Operations Engineer
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



Position Title: AI Operations Engineer

Department: Operations / Marketing

Reports To: Agency Owner

Location: New York (Remote/Hybrid)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About the Company

We are a growing marketing and SEO agency based in New York, serving local and e-commerce brands. Our lean, high-performing team of five specializes in design, SEO, marketing strategy, finance, and CRM management. We are committed to leveraging AI-powered tools and automation to deliver exceptional results for our clients while maximizing internal efficiency.



About the Role

This is not a traditional operations position. We are looking for an AI Operations Engineer who will design, build, and manage AI agents and automated workflows that replace and enhance manual operational tasks across the agency. You will start by automating executive assistant functions and then expand to build agentic AI solutions for SEO, design, marketing, finance, and CRM workflows used by the entire team.



The ideal candidate is someone who thinks in systems, is deeply familiar with no-code AI platforms, and can architect intelligent automations that save hours of repetitive work each week.



Key Responsibilities

 • Design and deploy AI agents using no-code platforms such as n8n, Zapier, Claude, Claude Code, Notion and make to automate executive assistant tasks including scheduling, communications, reporting, and task management.

 • Build agentic AI workflows that handle SEO research, keyword tracking, content optimization, and reporting tasks with minimal human oversight.

 • Develop and maintain automated processes for CRM management, client onboarding, lead nurturing, and pipeline tracking.

 • Create AI-powered automations for marketing workflows including social media scheduling,
 campaigns, and performance reporting.

 • Work with each tea
mber to identify repetitive tasks and build tailored AI agents to streamline their work.

 • Architect and manage prompt engineering strategies to ensure consistent, high-quality AI outputs across all workflows.

 • Document all automations, workflows, and AI agent configurations so the team can understand and maintain them.

 • Stay current with emerging AI tools, platforms, and best practices to continuously improve the agency’s automation capabilities.

 • Monitor and troubleshoot existing automations to ensure reliability and accuracy.

 • Support light operational and administrative tasks as needed during the transition to full automation.



Required Qualifications

 • Proven experience building AI agents and automated workflows using no-code tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make or similar platforms.

 • Strong proficiency with AI platforms including Claude, ChatGPT, and other large language model tools.

 • Demonstrated skill in prompt engineering and designing multi-step AI agent workflows.

 • Excellent understanding of business operations, particularly in a marketing or agency environment.

 • Ability to map complex manual processes and translate them into reliable automated systems.

 • Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple automation projects simultaneously.

 • Clear English and communication skills with the ability to explain technical workflows to non-technical tea
mbers.

 • Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a small team environment.



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience with Claude Code or similar AI-assisted coding tools.

 • Familiarity with SEO tools and workflows (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console). 

 • Experience with CRM platforms (e.g., HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce).

 • Knowledge of marketing automation platforms and
 marketing tools.

 • Background in operations management, project management, or executive support.

 • Experience working in or with digital marketing agencies. Add ops26 to be considered on application.



Tools & Platforms

AI & Automation: Claude, ChatGPT, n8n, Zapier, Claude Code (bonus)

SEO & Marketing: Various SEO and marketing platforms as used by the team

Operations: CRM systems (Go High Level), project management tools (Notion), communication platforms



Why Join Us

 • Be at the forefront of AI-driven agency operations — this role is shaping the future of how our agency works.

 • High autonomy and direct impact in a small, collaborative team.

 • Opportunity to build systems from the ground up and see your work drive real efficiency gains.

 • Work with a team that embraces AI and innovation as core to how we operate.

 • Competitive compensation commensurate with experience.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with examples of AI automations or agentic workflows you have built. We are particularly interested in seeing real-world projects where you used no-code AI tools to solve operational challenges. A brief description of your approach and the results achieved will help us understand your capabilities. 



Pay: $
(negotiable on experience)

title: Sales- Venue Lead Generator
description:
Job Title



Venue Lead Generator – Live Events Touring Show (Australia)



Job Overview



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Venue Lead Generator to join our team and help expand bookings for one of Australia’s leading live entertainment shows.



You will be working with Sydney’s Hotshots, a professional touring stage show similar to Magic Mike-style productions. We have been operating for over 20 years, touring across Australia and Tasmania and New Zealand with professional teams performing high-quality, choreographed shows. We receive excellent reviews and many venues rebook us year after year.



Your role will be to find new venue opportunities, contact venues, and generate qualified leads that our office team can convert into confirmed bookings.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.





Position Details



Hours: 4 hours per day

Days: Monday to Friday

Pay: $10 AUD per hour

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Support: Full support and training provided by our office team





Main Responsibilities



Your role will focus on finding and contacting potential venues across Australia and Tasmania and New Zealand.



Daily tasks will include:



Research towns and regions that have not hosted similar shows recently

Identify suitable venues (clubs, hotels, pubs, entertainment venues)

Find the correct decision-makers (venue managers, entertainment managers, etc.)

Collect and verify contact details 
, phone numbers)

Send structured outreach
s to venues

Make follow-up calls where required

Categorise leads as Hot, Warm, or Cold

Maintain clear records of all contacts

Pass qualified leads to our office team (Zach) for follow-up

Keep daily reports of work completed



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly organised and detail-oriented

Comfortable sending
s and speaking on the phone

Confident communicating in English

Able to follow instructions and systems

Comfortable researching online and finding accurate information

Self-motivated and consistent

Interested in long-term work

Experience in sales, lead generation, or customer outreach is preferred but not essential.





About Our Company



Sydney’s Hotshots is one of Australia’s longest-running touring stage shows, performing for over 20 years across Australia and New Zealand.



We operate multiple touring teams and perform in towns ranging from small regional communities to major cities. Our shows are professional, high-energy productions with strong customer demand and repeat bookings.



We are focused on keeping our teams busy with five shows per week, and your role will help us expand into new areas and secure future bookings.





Daily Reporting Requirements



You will be required to:



Send a start-of-day

Send an end-of-day report

Provide lists of venues contacted

Provide notes on responses received

Maintain accurate contact records



How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience with lead generation or sales

Your English level (written and spoken)

Your internet speed

A short voice recording introducing yourself



Your availability to start

title: Part Time WordPress and SEO Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and efficient WordPress assistant who can help us build and manage websites quickly using templates and basic SEO tools.



This role is focused on execution and efficiency, not design work.



Pay starts at $5 per hour depending on experience. The position begins part time (15 to 20 hours per week) and may become full time as more projects are completed and additional clients are added.



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who:



• Communicates clearly and directly

• Works independently and solves technical issues quickly

• Is comfortable working inside WordPress

• Can follow a simple process without overthinking design decisions

• Knows how to move fast and stay organized



A positive attitude and reliability are very important.



Main Responsibilities

1. Website Setup Using Templates



Our process is simple. We do not redesign websites.



• Select a template

• Install the template in WordPress

• Replace the content based on business information

• Keep the design consistent with the template



We typically spend 4 to 8 hours building a website.



ChatGPT is used to generate text that matches the structure and word length of the template.



We avoid changing layouts, fonts, or structure unless necessary.



2. Website Functionality



After content is added, you will:



• Ensure contact forms work correctly

• Confirm
 notifications are received

• Check navigation and menus

• Configure basic features included in the template



This step typically takes 2 to 4 hours.



3. SEO Setup and Ongoing Optimization



We use SE Ranking for SEO management.



Typical tasks include:



• Ensuring pages are indexed in Google

• Fixing indexing issues

• Basic on page SEO optimization

• Tracking keyword rankings

• Monitoring competitor rankings

• Creating one blog post per week

• Planning simple outreach for backlinks

• Following white hat SEO practices



Each client typically requires 5 to 10 hours per month.



Workload Expectations



Part time assistants usually manage up to 10 clients.



Full time assistants may manage around 20 clients.



Because we use templates and simple SEO processes, efficiency is very important.



Technical Skills



You should be comfortable with:



• WordPress

• Installing and editing templates

• Basic HTML (for small adjustments like menus or sections)

• ChatGPT for content generation

• Basic SEO tools (SE Ranking experience is a plus)



Experience with Shopify is a plus but not required.



Important



This role is not focused on graphic design.



We prioritize speed, consistency, and execution over redesigning layouts or making aesthetic changes.



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow into a full time position if:



• Projects are completed efficiently

• Clients are managed successfully

• More work becomes available



Reliable assistants who perform well will have the opportunity to grow with the company.

title: Tax and Billing Specialist
description:
Job Description:

JWe are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Tax and Billing Specialist to manage sales tax compliance, billing verification, and tax-related processes. This role is responsible for ensuring accurate tax filings, invoice processing, and maintaining compliance with US and international tax regulations.

Job Type: Full Time (40 hours)  - Remote

Schedule: 9AM - 6PM EST

Responsibilities:

Tax Compliance & Reporting

Prepare and submit sales data for US sales tax and international GST/VAT compliance.

Verify US sales taxes and international GST/VAT calculations to ensure accuracy.

Handle in-house tax filings for US entities in a timely and compliant manner.

Serve as the primary liaison for tax-related concerns, inquiries, and issues.

Compile tax returns and maintain organized, up-to-date tax records.

Billing & Invoice Verification

Review, verify, and process warehouse invoices for accuracy and completeness.

Review, verify, and process freight invoices in alignment with company records.

Verify and process customs and broker invoices, ensuring proper documentation and compliance.

Ensure all invoices are accurately recorded and processed within deadlines.



Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Proven experience in tax compliance, billing, or accounts payable.

Knowledge of US sales tax and international GST/VAT regulations.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

Excellent communication skills for handling tax-related concerns.

title: BRANDING, WEBSITE & MARKETING ORCHESTRATOR (FULL TIME)
description:
If you have a great eye for design, love coordinating tools and platforms (like AI Tools, outsourced designers, etc), happy to get your hands dirty tweaking designs, and love to keep things looking sharp, we want to hear from you.



===============================================================

BRANDING, WEBSITE & MARKETING ORCHESTRATOR (FULL TIME)

===============================================================

[ SYSTEM BOOTING: ABOUT US ]



We are an Australian tech crew that keeps businesses running smoothly.

We don't just fix computers; we manage entire IT infrastructures.



Our mission:

-> Bridge the gap between businesses and their technology

-> Provide expert IT support, automation, and infrastructure management

-> Keep tech—and our business operations—simple, honest, and stress-free



[ MODULE LOADED: ROLE OVERVIEW ]



You are the creative eye running the visual side of our network.



In today’s world, we don't need a traditional graphic designer who builds everything from scratch. We need a curator and an orchestrator. Somebody who can use the tools, and engage other professionals when needed, to achieve the desired result.



You’re the one making sure:

-> Our internal brand looks sharp, clean, and focused

-> Our clients' websites, socials, and assets are top-tier

-> AI tools and modern editors are leveraged to their full potential

-> The whole digital aesthetic runs smoothly

 signatures, letterheads, and
 pages etc.

-> Jump in on any other creative tasks that pop up based on these core duties



[ REQUIRED STATS: ABOUT YOU ]

You are a creative orchestrator who knows exactly what good design looks like.



Required attributes:



IMPECCABLE TASTE

You intuitively understand visual hierarchy, layout, and what makes a brand look professional



AI-FORWARD

BASIC CODER

HIGHLY ORGANISED

CLEAR SPOKEN ENGLISH

Easy for Australian customers and our team to communicate with



You do NOT need:

You DO need:

-> The ability to take a concept, engage the right tools (including AI), and deliver a polished final product



[ PERKS & POWER-UPS ]

-> Supportive, down-to-earth team

-> Role where your eye for design genuinely improves:

     -> Our clients' professional image

     -> Overall marketing workflow



[ INSERT COIN TO APPLY ]



-> To Apply, fill in your details here: 
/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/group/4/create/19



[PAY SCALE]

-> Depending on skill level, you will start on 20,000-30,000PHP

-> You will increase
PHP every month until you hit 50,000PHP as long as you complete the required training and your performance reviews are successful.

-> Future pay increases will be based on continued performance reviews.

title: Construction Bookkeeper
description:
JOB RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO:



Client Accounting Services:

*Serve as the primary point of contact for multiple construction clients, ensuring their accounting needs are met with excellence and reliability.

*Mentor and train accounting tea
mbers within our firm, promoting professional growth and embodying our values-driven culture.

Partner with our client accounting services (CAS) team and clients to identify opportunities for process improvement and *increased efficiency.

*Stay abreast of industry trends, tools, and best practices in construction accounting to provide forward-thinking solutions for our clients.

*Lead efforts to refine and improve internal and client-facing workflows, enhancing service delivery.



Accounts Payable Management:

*Oversee the processing of vendor invoices through platforms such as Timberscan (or alternative software), ensuring timely vendor payments and compliance.

*Assist clients in managing payables, receivables, and subcontractor compliance, including tracking lien waivers and insurance documentation.

*Manage trade partner payment workflows, including compliance verification and coordination with project owners for fund releases.

*Resolve invoice and payment discrepancies, collaborating with tea
mbers and trade partners.



Compliance Oversight:

*Maintain and monitor compliance checklists for trade partners, ensuring adherence to regulatory and contractual obligations.

*Assist in preparing financial compliance reports and coordinating with external auditors as required.



Accounting Operations:

*Ensure accurate data entry and reconciliation of bank and credit card transactions within accounting systems (e.g., Sage).

*Support month-end and year-end closing processes, including preparation of journal entries and financial reconciliations.

*Prepare reports on accounts payable aging, cash flow projections, and other key metrics.



Team Leadership and Collaboration:

*Train and mentor accounting tea
mbers, fostering professional growth and a culture of accountability.

*Act as a key liaison between accounting, operations, and project management teams to address financial questions and improve processes.



Process Improvement:

*Identify and implement enhancements to accounting workflows to increase efficiency and accuracy.

*Stay updated on industry trends, software tools, and best practices in construction accounting.



Reporting and Communication:

*Provide regular updates to executive leadership on financial performance and compliance.

*Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements, reports, and audits.





EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS REQUIRED:

*Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

*Active CPA license preferred.

*Minimum 5 years of progressive experience in accounting, with at least 2 years in the construction industry.

*Expertise in public accounting, specifically serving construction clients and managing multiple client accounts.

*Strong proficiency in accounting systems (e.g., Sage, Timberscan) and project management tools (e.g., ProCore).

*Deep understanding of construction accounting standards, including WIP reporting, retainage, and cost allocation.

*Passion for delivering exceptional client service and fostering lasting client relationships.

*Excellent organizational and time-management skills to balance multiple client priorities.

*Strong leadership and team development capabilities.

*Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

*High attention to detail and commitment to accuracy.

*Ability to communicate complex financial concepts to non-financial stakeholders.



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed



Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: To be Announced

Salary Range: Php 60,000 - Php 90,000 monthly, Depending on experience

title: Accounts Executive
description:
Job Timing: 9:00am to 6:00pm MST US Time Zone

Location: Remote

Salary:15k - 20k php/month

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Finance / Operations / Sales Support



Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Account Executive to manage financial records, support sales operations, and maintain strong client relationships. The ideal candidate will be responsible for bookkeeping, back-office coordination, invoicing, client onboarding, and ensuring customer satisfaction and retention.



Key Responsibilities:

Bookkeeping & Financial Management



Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers.

Record daily transactions, reconcile bank statements, and manage accounts receivable/payable.

Assist in preparing financial summaries, reports, and budgets.

Ensure timely and accurate invoice generation and payment follow-ups.

Back Office & Administrative Support



Handle documentation, data entry, and internal record-keeping.

Coordinate with different departments (sales, operations, HR) to ensure smooth internal processes.

Maintain organized filing systems and client databases.

Invoicing & Billing



Prepare and issue invoices to clients in a timely manner.

Track payments, manage outstanding invoices, and send payment reminders.

Coordinate with the finance team to reconcile billing and payment discrepancies.

Client Onboarding & Relationship Management



Assist in onboarding new clients by gathering required information and ensuring a smooth setup process.

Maintain strong client communication to ensure satisfaction and resolve issues promptly.

Support account management by tracking contract renewals and client feedback.

Sales Communication & Retention



Collaborate with the sales team to prepare proposals, quotes, and follow-up communications.

Support client retention initiatives by building long-term relationships and ensuring consistent service quality.

Identify upselling or cross-selling opportunities in coordination with the sales team.

Reporting & Coordination



Prepare periodic reports on sales activities, invoicing, and client accounts.

Provide administrative and operational support to management.

Ensure compliance with company policies and procedures in all account-related activities.



Qualifications & Skills:



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.

2+ years of experience in bookkeeping, account management, or back-office operations.

Proficiency in MS Office and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Xero, or ERP systems).

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Excellent organizational skills with attention to detail.

Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.

Customer service mindset and problem-solving attitude.



Preferred Skills (Optional):



Experience in client onboarding and CRM systems.

Knowledge of sales support and retention strategies.

Familiarity with financial reporting tools and automation platforms.

title: CapCut Editor Wanted: 30+ Social Media Videos/Week
description:
I am looking for a reliable, fast-paced video editor to join my content team. I produce high-volume educational and lifestyle content (30+ videos per week) and need someone who can take raw "talking head" footage and turn it into polished, engaging TikToks/Reels.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Editing: Professional cutting, pacing, and captions for 60-second clips.



Branding: Following briefs for 3+ different brands.



Workflow: Checking branding guide/briefs, finding raw video in CapCut space, editing, and moving it into a "completed" folder on CapCut space.



Collaboration: Working within CapCut Shared Spaces (requires a stable connection/VPN) and communicating via messages or Slack.



Requirements:



Expertise in CapCut (Desktop preferred).



Ability to handle high volume without losing attention to detail. This is a scaled opportunity: I am actively growing. As I scale, there is a significant opportunity for increased hours and higher responsibility for a reliable editor who proves they can handle the current volume.



??REGIONAL ACCESS & VPN: We utilize CapCut Shared Spaces (US-Region) for all project collaboration. Due to CapCut’s current regional security locks, you MUST have a high-speed, reliable VPN set to a USA server to access our workspace, sync project files, and use our specific brand assets.



Note: If you cannot operate via a US-based VPN, the collaboration links will show as "Expired," and you will not be able to access the footage. Please only apply if you are comfortable with this technical setup and have a stable enough internet connection to upload/download video files while the VPN is active.



Reliable internet for uploading/downloading large video files.



HOW TO APPLY:



The Keyword: To show me you have read this entire posting, please start your application with the word "ELLIE" in all caps.



Portfolio: Provide a link to your best social media or "talking head" edits.



VPN Confirmation: Confirm you have a VPN and are comfortable using it for this role.



Turnaround Time: Roughly how long does it take you to edit a 60-second talking head clip with captions?

title: Recruitment Expert
description:
# Recruitment Agent — Source High-Quality Video Talent (AI Creators & Editors)



**Hourly Rate + $100 Commission Per Successful Hire**



We're looking for a driven recruitment agent to help us find and vet top-tier video talent on an ongoing basis. You'll be paid your hourly rate plus a $100 USD bonus for every successful hire you bring us.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



You'll source, engage, and screen candidates for two types of roles, then send us only the best. We do NOT want to interview low-quality applicants — your job is to be the quality filter.



**Your responsibilities:**

- Find candidates through job boards, communities, freelance platforms, social media, and your own network

- Review their portfolios carefully against the criteria below

- Have a conversation with each candidate to confirm their skills, availability, and interest

- Submit only vetted, high-quality candidates to us with a short summary and portfolio links



---



## Role 1: AI Video Content Creator



We need creators who work with AI video generation tools and produce polished, creative output — not just raw AI dumps.



**Required:**

- Hands-on experience with Seedance, Nano Banana, or similar AI video generation tools

- Familiarity with other AI tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, etc.) is a plus

- Strong prompt engineering skills and ability to refine AI outputs to a high standard

- Good eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual composition



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 completed AI-generated video projects

- Evidence of creative direction (not just default outputs)

- Quality refinement and iteration on AI-generated content



---



## Role 2: Professional Video Editor



We need editors who can deliver polished, professional-grade video across formats.



**Required:**

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or Avid Media Composer

- Solid skills in colour grading, audio mixing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience editing for social media (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) and/or long-form content

- Ability to work from briefs and hit deadlines



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 professionally edited video projects

- Variety of styles or formats (social, commercial, narrative, etc.)

- Clean technique, good pacing, and polished audio/visuals



---



## Compensation



- **Hourly rate** — tell us your rate based on your experience

- **Plus $100 USD bonus per successful hire** — no cap on placements

- Bonuses paid upon candidate acceptance and confirmation

- Ongoing engagement with room to grow



---



## Do NOT Send Us



- Candidates with generic or low-effort demo reels

- Portfolios of unedited, raw AI outputs with no refinement

- Editors whose only experience is with basic tools like iMovie or CapCut

- Anyone who can't demonstrate real, hands-on use of the required tools

- Applicants who can't communicate clearly or follow a brief



---



## To Apply



Tell us:

1. A brief intro about your recruiting experience, especially in creative/video talent

2. Examples of past placements or sourcing work (if available)

3. Your preferred sourcing channels and methods

4. Your hourly rate



We're looking for agents who take quality seriously. If that's you, we'd love to work together.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
## Do you solve problems — not just close tickets?



We're hiring **modern Customer Experience specialists** who can work alongside AI, solve root causes, and own outcomes — not just respond to tickets.



This is a role for operators who are comfortable **reviewing AI decisions, improving systems, and driving real fixes across the business**.



Join a women-led brand that has grown from zero to 8 figures annually and is scaling fast across the US, UK, and EU. This is not traditional support — it’s **AI-augmented CX with real ownership**.







—



## [1] About the Company



We are a women-led sexual wellness and intimate health brand, redefining how women experience pleasure, confidence, and comfort. We have grown from zero to 8 figures in annual revenue and are scaling rapidly across the US, UK, EU, and beyond.



Customer experience is central to our mission — especially given the sensitive, deeply personal nature of our category. We approach this with empathy, discretion, and clarity.



We are building a team of **problem-solvers and systems thinkers — not ticket machines.**



—



## [2] The Role



As a Customer Experience Specialist, your role sits at the intersection of **support, AI, and operations**.



AI handles a large share of first responses. Your job is to:



- Step in where complexity begins

- Ensure quality and accuracy

- Identify patterns and fix underlying issues



You will split your time between:



- **Complex support & resolutions (~60–70%)**

- **QA, reporting, and systems improvement (~30–40%)**



You are not just executing — you are **improving how the system works.**



This role reports to the Head of CX and works alongside a small, high-performance team.



**Schedule:** This role may require availability to work weekends, as customer needs don't pause on Saturdays and Sundays. Specific shifts will be discussed during the interview process.



—



## [3] What You'll Do



### Complex Support & Resolutions (~60–70%)



- Handle escalated and nuanced customer issues that require judgment, not scripts

- Manage end-to-end resolution — investigation, decision-making, and follow-through

- Navigate sensitive conversations around sexual wellness with empathy and discretion

- Step in where AI responses fall short or require human context

- Make confident calls in grey areas where policies don’t neatly apply

- Escalate with clear thinking and proposed solutions (not just problems)



---



### AI QA, Reporting & Systems (~30–40%)



- Review and quality-check AI-generated responses to ensure accuracy, tone, and correctness

- Identify where AI is failing (logic gaps, tone issues, incorrect resolutions) and improve it

- Build and maintain reporting on ticket trends, product issues, and operational gaps

- Spot patterns (e.g. defective batches, courier failures, confusing UX) and drive root-cause fixes

- Work cross-functionally with ops, product, and marketing to resolve systemic issues

- Create and refine SOPs, macros, and AI workflows



—



## [4] What We're Looking For



### Must-haves:



- 2+ years of customer service experience (D2C, e-commerce, or consumer-facing roles preferred)

- Strong problem-solving ability — you think in root causes, not surface-level fixes

- Comfortable handling sensitive topics including sexual wellness and intimacy

- High ownership mindset — you take initiative without waiting to be told

- Excellent attention to detail while working at speed

- Experience with tools like Gorgias, Zendesk, Intercom, or similar



---



### Nice-to-haves:



- Experience with Shopify or e-commerce operations

- Comfort working with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automation workflows, prompt writing)

- Basic reporting/analysis skills (Google Sheets, Excel, dashboards)

- Experience QA-ing AI outputs or improving automation systems

- Familiarity with tools like Claude Code, Zapier, Make, or internal AI agents

- Cross-functional exposure (ops, logistics, product, marketing)



—



## [5] What You'll Get



- USD $850–$1,100 / month (40 hours/week)

- Performance-based growth — compensation tied to impact

- **Paid 2-week training and probationary period** to get you fully ramped up on our systems, tools, and AI workflows before stepping into the full role

- Hands-on experience with **AI-first CX systems and workflows**

- Fully remote work

- Direct exposure to a fast-scaling global brand (US, UK, EU)

- Ownership of real problems and projects — not just ticket queues

- Opportunity to shape how a modern CX function is built



—



## [6] HOW TO APPLY



Apply here:







You will be asked to:



1. Upload your most updated CV

2. Answer a few short questions

3. Record a short Loom (2–3 mins):

    - Why this role interests you

    - One AI tool or workflow you'd bring into our CX team on day one, and why



Applications sent outside this link will not be reviewed.

nts from raw footage

title: Sales Specialist / Lead Generation Specialist for Digital Marketing Agency
description:
We are a growing digital marketing agency offering website design and development packages to small and medium-sized businesses. We're looking for a motivated, results-driven Sales Specialist or Lead Generator who can help us land new clients — either through cold calling,
 outreach, social media prospecting, or any proven method you bring to the table.

If you know how to find business owners who need a website, get them on the phone or in a conversation, and close the deal (or set the appointment for closing), we want to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing



Reaching out to business owners who need a professional website or a website upgrade (cold calling, cold
ing, LinkedIn outreach, or your own preferred method)

Pitching our website packages clearly and confidently

Qualifying leads and booking sales calls or demos

Following up with prospects and nurturing leads through the pipeline

Tracking all outreach activity and results in a CRM or spreadsheet

Meeting weekly outreach and appointment-setting targets

Providing feedback on what's working and what's not so we can improve together





What We're Looking For



Proven experience in B2B sales, cold calling, telemarketing, appointment setting, or lead generation

Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be speaking directly with business owners in the US, Canada, or Australia

Confident phone presence — you're not afraid to pick up the phone and start conversations

Self-starter who can work independently without micromanagement

Familiarity with digital marketing or web design services is a big plus (but not required — we'll train you on our packages)

Experience using CRMs, dialers, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or
 outreach tools is a bonus

If you have your own lead generation method that gets results, we're open to it — tell us about it in your application





Bonus Points If You Have



A track record of hitting sales targets or quotas

Experience selling websites, SEO, social media marketing, or any digital service

Your own system or process for generating leads (we love initiative)

Experience with tools like GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Apollo, Instantly, or similar platforms





What We Offer



Base pay + performance-based bonuses/commissions for every closed deal

Training on our website packages so you feel confident selling them

Long-term position with room to grow into a sales manager role

Flexible schedule — we care about results, not hours in a seat

A supportive team that values your input and ideas





How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your sales or lead generation experience

What method(s) you use or prefer for generating leads and getting clients

Any results or numbers you can share (calls made per day, appointments set, deals closed, etc.)

A short voice recording or video introduction (1–2 minutes) so we can hear your English and communication style



Start your application with the word "CLOSER" so we know you read the full post.

title: Outbound Caller
description:
Part time or full time up to you. Seeking one person for now but will need more in future.



I will have a CRM with leads for you to outbound warm calls for people asking for Health Insurance Coverage or a switch in their plan. I will give you a script, and you would call the leads to ask them 5-8 questions to fill out a "Fact Finder" form. The goal would be 25 FFs (Fact Finders) per week or more. This will be during USA business hours of course between 9am and as late as 7pm. I would encourage part time seekers to apply as maybe you have a second job and I will eventually like to be able to get you paid enough that you won't need the second job. 



You would get a small bonus for every FF you submit up to a max of $5 extra per day (if you do more than this we would of course discuss the next bonus for production as you're obviously bringing a higher value to the company, and I will want to pay you for that. Also each confirmed sale will give you a bonus as well which has no limit. Potentially you can make more than double your base salary rate any given day/week/month. I will consider a lower requested salary as priority over higher so that I can build in your bonuses and extra earnings. 



I reward success and when I scale would be adding more VAs and will eventually need a manager role if interested. I also will eventually lease a physical building in the Philippines, which will have a day care center, gym, and cafeteria for employees to use. This project is about 1 year out. 



TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE PLEASE SUBMIT TO ME A VIDEO LINK/CAN BE AUDIO AS WELL BUT EVENTUALLY WE WILL MEET ON ZOOM BRIEFLY OF 60 SECONDS TO HEAR YOUR VOICE AND SEE SOME OF YOUR TONE/SPEAKING/SKILLS. IF YOU DO NOT INCLUDE A VIDEO OR AUDIO RECORDING I WILL NOT RESPOND TO YOUR REQUEST.



NEXT TO SEE IF YOU FOLLOW SIMPLE INSTRUCTIONS SOMEWHERE IN YOUR REPLY INCLUDE YOUR FAVORITE HOBBY OR ACTIVITY OR MAYBE IF YOU'RE STUDYING SOMETHING IN SCHOOL.

title: Accounting Clerk / Bookkeeper – QuickBooks, AP/AR, Invoicing & Data Entry
description:
We are hiring a full-time remote Accounting Clerk / Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant to join our growing back-office accounting team. This is a long-term role for a detail-oriented accounting professional with strong QuickBooks Desktop / QuickBooks Enterprise experience who enjoys hands-on bookkeeping, data entry, and Accounts Payable / Accounts Receivable work.



You will perform daily data entry into our financial ERP systems (Fishbowl Inventory Advanced, QuickBooks Enterprise, and Asana), audit transactions for accuracy, process AP and AR transactions, and handle other day-to-day administrative accounting and back-office support functions.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES



- Post cash receipts and record daily financial transactions.

- Invoice customers and follow up on outstanding balances to collect payments.

- Enter customer purchase orders into our ERP / financial systems.

- Process Accounts Receivable transactions, including customer credit card, ACH, and wire transfer payments.

- Review vendor bills and purchase orders for accuracy and proper coding.

- Assist with bank reconciliations and general ledger account reconciliations.

- Provide administrative backup and support to the sales team as needed.

- Perform other bookkeeping, accounting, financial, and administrative tasks as required.



REQUIREMENTS



- College degree in Accountancy, Accounting, Finance, or equivalent.

- Prior experience in an accounting department, bookkeeping role, or other financial/back-office position.

- 3+ years of advanced, hands-on experience with QuickBooks Desktop / QuickBooks Enterprise.

- Strong skills handling financial and numeric data with a high degree of accuracy.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel, including VLOOKUP and Pivot Tables.

- Ability to maintain strict confidentiality when handling sensitive financial information.

- Highly organized, persistent, and detail-oriented.

- Strong critical thinking, multitasking, prioritization, and time management skills.

- Excellent written and spoken English for clear communication with our US-based team.

- Reliable computer, stable high-speed internet, and a quiet home-office setup.



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with Fishbowl Inventory or other inventory/ERP systems.

- Experience using Asana or similar project management tools.

- Background supporting a US-based company, e-commerce business, or consumer products manufacturer.



ABOUT US



Accessory Power is a US-based consumer electronics manufacturer that has been providing high-quality products for over 30 years. We design, manufacture, and market thousands of products under our four main brands — GOgroove, ENHANCE, ReVIVE, and USA Gear — along with several other product lines and accessory categories. We are growing quickly and need your help to keep our accounting operations running smoothly.



Learn more about our company at: 
/about



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your accounting background.

2. Your years of experience with QuickBooks Desktop / Enterprise and any other ERP systems you have used.

3. Your expected monthly salary (in USD or PHP).

4. Your available start date and number of hours per week you can commit.

5. An updated résumé or CV.



We look forward to reviewing your application.
