title: Executive Assistant for US Tax Advisory Firm
description:
Hi. I run a US tax advisory firm based in Washington, DC. I am hiring a long-term Executive Assistant to operate my client pipeline and free me up to focus on client work. This is a serious role for someone who wants to grow with the firm over multiple years.

This role is detailed, repetitive in the best sense, and rewards precision over speed. If you take pride in catching small errors and running clean systems, you will love this work. If you prefer fast-paced creative variety, this is not the right fit.

What you will do

Prospect pipeline operations. Process new intake forms, verify completeness, maintain CRM records, coordinate discovery call scheduling, quality-check generated proposal documents before delivery.

Client scheduling. Schedule recurring meetings for active clients on annual, quarterly, or monthly cadences. Send prep materials and post-meeting recap
s.

Marketing support. Edit second drafts of LinkedIn posts and blog content. Repurpose blog posts into LinkedIn content. Create Canva graphics from written briefs. Maintain content calendar.

Past prospect re-engagement. Maintain segmented nurture cadences for prospects who did not convert. Surface re-engagement opportunities when triggers fire.

Systems administration. Maintain data integrity across CRM, scheduling, and document tools. Run TaxDome client onboarding workflows for signed engagements.

Required qualifications

• Strong written English (B2 minimum, C1 strongly preferred)

• Two or more years as an Executive Assistant or Virtual Assistant

• Detail-oriented with proven ability to follow checklists precisely

• Reliable home internet (25 Mbps minimum) and a quiet workspace

Preferred qualifications

• Prior experience supporting a US-based tax, legal, or financial services firm

• Familiarity with Google Office Suite, Folk CRM, Calendly, or Canva

What you will not do

• Prepare tax returns or provide tax advice

• Negotiate fees or lead client meetings

How to apply

Send your application with these two items:

1. Your resume

2. Your draft reply to this prospect
, in 3 sentences or fewer: "Hi, I need to push our discovery call back two weeks because of a family situation. Sorry for the late notice."

Important: Start your reply with the words "Tax season" so I know you read the full posting. Applications missing the code phrase or the screening question response will not be reviewed.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

description:
Video Editor Needed (YouTube, Instagram & TikTok) – Long-Term Opportunity



We’re looking for a high-level video editor who understands content, not just editing.

This is not just about cutting clips together…

This is about helping us communicate powerful ideas, build authority, and drive growth.



We are looking for an editor who can:

Edit YouTube videos (10–20 mins) with clean, engaging flow

Create short-form content (Reels/TikTok) from long-form videos

Add subtitles/captions (clean, modern style)

Use cuts, zooms, b-roll, and pacing to keep attention high

Understand storytelling and retention, not just aesthetics

Match a clean, premium, authoritative brand style

Stay up to date with current editing trends



Work Details

Ongoing / long-term role

Weekly deliverables

Remote



What We’re Looking For

This role is for someone who:

Takes initiative

Is reliable and meets deadlines

Communicates clearly

Wants to grow with a brand long-term



How to Apply

Please include:

Your portfolio (YouTube + short-form)

Your completed task (link)

Your rates (per video or monthly)

The word “Identity” at the top of your application

title: Social Media Content/Video Editor (Experienced)
description:
About Us:

Serene Cosmetic is the UK's leading cosmetic surgery concierge, with a 111K Instagram folders and an audience that lives for transformation content. We work with many high-profile celebrities and our co-founder Lois is the face of the brand, with her to-camera surgery story content consistently outperforming everything else in our niche.



We move fast, we test relentlessly, and we need an editor who can match the pace and the quality.



The Role:

You will be editing short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, plus longer-form YouTube content. The job is to take raw footage and turn it into scroll-stopping, high-retention assets that grow our audience and build authority.



What You'll Do:

- Edit 10-20 short-form videos per day (Reels, TikToks, Shorts), each 15-90 seconds

- Build scroll-stopping hooks in the first 3 seconds (pattern interrupts, curiosity gaps, transformation teases). Scripts and briefs will be provided to you.

- Add captions, b-roll, sound design, trending audio, and on-screen text that retains viewers past the 50% drop-off point

- Edit longer-form YouTube content (8-15 minutes) using Mr Beast-style retention pacing

- Repurpose long-form footage into multiple short-form angles

- Maintain a tight, recognisable Serene visual style across every asset

- Scripts and briefs will be provided. Bonus if you can also generate your own content ideas and research trends for the business, but not essential





Must-Haves:

- 3+ years editing short-form video for brands, influencers, or agencies (portfolio essential, evidence of work required)

- Ideally fluent in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve. CapCut, Edits and similar app-based editors alone may be considered if quality of portfolio work is high enough. Bonus for After Effects experience

- Native-level English comprehension for captioning and hook rewriting

- Strong understanding of current Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube algorithm preferences

- Fast turnaround. Same-day edits when needed

- Reliable internet, backup power, and your own editing rig





Bonus Points

* Experience editing in the beauty, cosmetic surgery, wellness, or aesthetics niche

* Familiarity with thumbnail design for YouTube and Instagram

* Experience using Google Docs/Business Suite





What You Get:

- A long-term position with a fast-scaling brand

- Direct creative collaboration with the founders, no middle-management bottleneck

- Performance bonuses for videos that hit virality thresholds

- Quarterly performance reviews with a clear career progression path if desired

•
 subject must start with “AI777” and include your full name

title: BASE + COMMISSION: Perfectly Fast Moving – Long Distance Moving Carrier

Job Description:

You will begin as a call opener, engaging with potential customers and collecting their moving details. With training and strong performance, you will grow into a closer—handling full sales calls and securing bookings. This role offers a clear career path and high earning potential.

Transition into a closer role to handle complete sales calls and secure bookings.



Work with a team to meet company goals and daily call targets.

Strong communication and listening skills.



Sales background preferred but not required (training provided).



Must have a reliable computer, stable internet connection, and quiet workspace.

PLEASE SUBMIT A VOICE RECORIDNG EXPLAINING YOUR WORK AND SALES EXPERIENCE, YOUR CURRENT WORK STATUS AND AVAILABILITY.



Daily training and support provided via Zoom

title: Remote Appointment Setter (Cycling Coaching Business)
description:
If you enjoy talking to people, following a clear process, and being measured on your results, keep reading.



About us:

We’re Bulletproof Cycling. We coach cyclists 50+ to ride stronger for longer without wrecking their life. Clients are mostly successful professionals and retired entrepreneurs who take their goals seriously.



We’re now hiring Remote Appointment Setters to help us handle the volume of warm leads coming in. You do not have to generate your own leads. Your job is simple: talk to riders who already requested more information and book them into the next call.



What you’ll do

Speak to warm leads from our funnels (inbound leads, reactivation lists, and existing conversations).

Use proven scripts to start and continue conversations via
, and short calls.

Qualify interest and book appointments for our closer.

Follow up with riders who haven’t replied or haven’t booked yet.

Hit clear daily and weekly targets (conversations started, appointments booked, show rate).

Log activity and notes in our CRM so the closer has context.

You are not selling the full program. Your focus is high?quality appointments.



What we provide:

A steady flow of warm leads.

Scripts, objection handling, and conversation frameworks.

Training on our avatar (cyclists 50+) and our offer.

Regular coaching so you can improve your numbers.

A clear progression path for top performers.

Pay and progression



This role includes:

A fixed monthly amount plus

Additional pay that increases with your performance

Most new tea
mbers who meet target activity and quality metrics earn around $3000–$3500 per month once ramped. Strong performers who consistently exceed targets can earn more and may be considered for more senior roles over time.



Exact details of the structure, targets, and progression path are explained during the interview process.



You’re a fit if:

You can work UK evenings / business hours and be available for live conversations.

You like using scripts and can also adapt based on feedback.

You’re motivated by improving your numbers and seeing that reflected in your pay.

You have reliable internet, a working computer, a webcam, and a quiet place to work.

Requirements:



Strong written and spoken English.

Comfortable on Zoom and phone.

Able to work Mon–Sa, 9am –5pm UK



How to apply:



This is a short form where we ask about your experience, availability, and income expectations.

If it looks like a potential fit on paper, we’ll invite you to a live group interview on Wednesday at 7pm UK.

Top candidates from the group interview will be invited to a short 1:1 call and a paid trial period.

Job Type: Full-time



Work Location: Remote

title: IT Project Technician
description:
Job Posting: Project Technician

Location: Work from Home (Remote)

Shift: Monday to Friday, 8am-5pm Pacific Standard Time (PST), US

About Us:

We are a leading Managed IT Service Provider based in Portland, Oregon. We pride ourselves on delivering efficient and professional IT support to our clients. As we continue to grow, we are looking to expand our team with dedicated and enthusiastic IT professionals.

Job Description:

Bytagig is seeking a motivated and skilled individual to join our team as a Project Technician. In this role, you’ll assist with the installation, configuration, and troubleshooting of hardware, software, and network equipment for various projects. We’re looking for someone with strong technical skills, excellent communication abilities, and a team-oriented mindset.

Duties and Responsibilities:

- Assist in Installation and Configuration: Help in the installation, configuration, and troubleshooting of hardware, software, and network equipment for projects.

- Client IT Project Support: Provide support for client IT projects, including system deployments, upgrades, and migrations.

- Basic Troubleshooting: Perform basic troubleshooting for IT systems and services to ensure everything runs smoothly.

- User Setup Assistance: Assist with user setup, including creating accounts, configuring devices, and ensuring appropriate access levels.

- Documentation and Procedures: Follow documentation and procedures to ensure consistency and accuracy in project tasks.

- Task Coordination: Coordinate with senior technicians and project managers to ensure all tasks are completed on time.

- Issue Reporting: Report any issues or challenges encountered during project work to senior tea
mbers.

- Client Communication: Assist with client communications, gathering requirements, and providing basic training as needed.

- Documentation of Work: Document all work performed, ensuring that all systems are properly labeled and inventory is updated.

- Project Reviews Participation: Participate in project reviews and contribute suggestions for improvements in processes or systems.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in IT support or a related field.

- Strong technical acumen and problem-solving abilities.

- Excellent communication skills (verbal and written) to explain technical concepts to non- technical users.

- Basic understanding of computer hardware, software, and network troubleshooting.

- Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Positive attitude and a customer service orientation.

- Willingness to learn and grow within the role. Working Hours and Timekeeping:

- Scheduled to work during USA - Pacific (PST) time zones, 8am-5pm.

- Keep track of time via Timeproof.

- Be a part of the company, not just a virtual assistant.

- Desire to grow personally, professionally, and financially.

How to Apply:

Interested applicants are requested to
 their updated resume along with a brief cover letter and video intro detailing their relevant experience to 
 use the subject line: "Project Technician - [Your Full Name]".

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your interest and thank all applicants in advance.

title: Career Coach
description:
Named one of Oregon’s 100 Best Companies to Work For, Threo is a rapidly growing company that helps executives thrive by unpacking their purpose through helping them find top executive positions, start a business, or buy a business or franchise.

Our mission is to help 1,000 families deliver their love letter to the world by providing the structure to support their purpose so that eternal profits are multiplied.

We are looking for an Executive Career Coach / Career Advisor who is passionate about helping people find clarity, confidence, and direction in their next career move.

This is not just a coaching role—it is a business-building role. You will help executives find the right path while also building your own book of business through strategic outreach, relationship building, and consistent follow-up.

________________________________________

Role Description

As an Executive Career Coach, you will guide high-achieving professionals through career transitions, helping them secure top executive roles, improve their personal brand, and explore additional opportunities such as business ownership, franchise ownership, and executive coaching programs.

Our ideal candidate possesses a passion for impacting lives. Your main responsibilities will be establishing and managing client relationships, leading candidate sourcing efforts, and helping executives gain clarity on whether their next best step is a new executive role, career coaching, franchise ownership, or business ownership.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Career Planning

• Guide clients in aligning their purpose with high-compensation executive roles

• Develop personalized career roadmaps and action plans

• Create customized strategies with clear milestones aligned to client goals

• Coach clients on interviewing, compensation negotiation, and executive positioning

• Conduct virtual coaching sessions, workshops, and live webinars

________________________________________

Personal Branding & Documentation

• Create ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters

• Build high-converting LinkedIn profiles

• Help clients craft compelling personal branding materials

• Position executives for stronger visibility and better opportunities in the job market

________________________________________

Sales and Business Development

• Build your book of business by calling resumes of executives in career transition

• Prospect executives actively searching for leadership opportunities

• Invite qualified candidates to live webinars and coaching consultations

• Follow up and close opportunities for career coaching programs, franchise opportunities, and business ownership programs

• Negotiate and close coaching agreements and client service agreements

• Track all follow-up and activity inside CRM systems daily

This is where long-term income is built.

Cold calling is hard—but these are executives actively searching for jobs and often need help getting clarity on what comes next.

________________________________________

Client Success & Team Leadership

• Maintain and grow strong client relationships

• Create raving fans through excellent service and delivery

• Lead and develop the outreach team to improve sourcing quality and consistency

• Hire, train, coach, and mentor appointment setters and sourcing specialists

• Help develop future Career Coaches and Junior Consultants inside the organization

title: Accounting Assistant & Bookkeeper
description:
Payment Studio is currently in search of a detail-oriented and highly motivated bookkeeper to join our team. The ideal candidate will be well-organized, reliable, and proficient in handling multiple tasks simultaneously. As an integral part of our team, you will be responsible for managing both Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable processes, utilizing your expertise in QuickBooks Online. The role demands excellent time management skills, basic mathematical problem-solving abilities, and meticulous attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain accurate records of financial transactions by establishing accounts, posting transactions, and ensuring compliance with legal requirements.

- Develop a systematic approach to account for financial transactions, including establishing a chart of accounts and defining bookkeeping policies and procedures.

- Verify, allocate, and post transactions to subsidiary accounts.

- Reconcile entries and balance subsidiary accounts.

- Transfer subsidiary account summaries to maintain the general ledger.

- Prepare trial balances and reconcile entries to balance the general ledger.

- File historical records and documents.

- Compile, analyze, and summarize account information and trends to prepare financial reports.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local legal requirements by studying, enforcing adherence, filing reports, and advising management on necessary actions.

- Contribute to the team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or equivalent field preferred.

- Strong knowledge of accounting and bookkeeping principles.

- Proficient in using Google Sheets and Excel.

- Excellent understanding of QuickBooks Online.

- Power BI experience preferred. 

- AI Tools experience prederred (Claude, ChatGPT...)

- Minimum of 2 years of bookkeeping experience.

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.

- Motivated individual with a positive and flexible attitude.

- Capable of working collaboratively with others as well as independently.

- Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.





PLEASE NOTE: 

1. This position will require the use of Hubstaff as a time tracker tool.

2. Availability M-F, 9AM-6PM CST required

3. Payments submitted through Wise ONLY (a verified Wise account under your name is needed prior to onboarding)



How To Apply:

Kindly submit your resume and a brief description of why you should be considered for the role. 



If your application is selected for further consideration, we will contact you via email to schedule a virtual interview.



Thank you for considering Payment Studio as your next professional endeavor!

title: Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market
description:
Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Engagement Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor (40 hours per week, Australian Business Hours)



Company: CDM Direct



About Us CDM Direct is a leading provider of outsourced operational support and customer experience solutions. We are currently executing a major expansion across the Australia and New Zealand (ANZ) markets, specifically targeting the Aged Care and National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) sectors.



We provide high-value, tech-enabled operational support—including our flagship 'Rostering as a Service' (RaaS) solution powered by Zoom Contact Centre AI—to solve severe administrative, financial, and compliance bottlenecks for healthcare providers.



The Role This is not a scripted call centre role. This is a highly strategic, consultative B2B sales position working directly alongside our Australian leadership team.



As our market expansion lead, you will be responsible for driving new business acquisition across the ANZ health sector. You will:

• Conduct highly targeted, unscripted outreach to engage senior business decision-makers (CEOs, CFOs, Partners, and Operations Managers).

• Lead commercial conversations to uncover operational chaos, staffing bottlenecks, and financial pain points.

• Position CDM Direct’s RaaS and outsourced solutions with absolute clarity and commercial credibility.

• Secure "Qualified Meetings" (QMBs) for our senior sales executives, directly driving the top of the revenue pipeline.



The Ideal Candidate (The "Hunter") We are exclusively recruiting Tier 1 B2B sales talent. To succeed in this role, you must possess severe commercial resilience and a genuine "hunter" mentality. You will be dealing with busy executives in a highly regulated industry; you must be comfortable handling objections, navigating gatekeepers, and creating commercial urgency from scratch.



• Minimum 3+ years of proven success in outbound B2B sales, KPO, or SaaS business development.

• Exceptional, polished English communication skills capable of peer-to-peer conversations with Australian C-Suite executives.



• Deep discipline, self-management, and the resilience to execute daily strategic outreach in a remote environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Entry-level customer service or call centre agents.

• Telemarketers who rely on rigid scripts.

• Candidates seeking a passive account management role; this is a proactive pipeline-generation position.



Remuneration & Commercial Benefits



We offer a highly lucrative, performance-driven commercial package designed to reward top performers:



• Base Retainer: PHP 85,000 per month.

• Health & Wellbeing: Up to PHP 50,000 annual allowance to fully reimburse the cost of a premium private HMO plan for you and one dependent.

• Year-End Bonus: An annual service bonus equivalent to one month's base fee (13th month), paid in December.

• Activity Bonus: NZ$50 for every Qualified Meeting Booked (QMB) to supplement your income while your pipeline builds.

• Revenue Commission: An uncapped 2.5% commission on the Year 1 Contract Value of closed deals, with an accelerator to 5% for high performance.



• Leave & Lifestyle: You will observe standard Australian public holidays as non-working days without any reduction to your base fee. After 12 months, you are permitted 10 days of planned unavailability per annum.



How to Apply



If you have the resilience and the commercial acumen to drive this expansion, please submit:

1. Your updated CV.

2. A link to your LinkedIn profile.

3. A brief cover letter outlining your most successful experience generating outbound B2B meetings with senior executives.

title: Virtual Assistant/Influencer Coordinator (Part Time) – Female-Fashion Focused
description:
Role: Virtual Assistant/Influencer Coordinator (Part Time) – Female-Fashion Focused

Location: Remote

Hours: 15–20 hrs/week (Requires flexibility for weekends and USA hours)

Start Date: ASAP



Calily Bridal is a fast-growing, direct-to-consumer bridal brand offering wedding veils and accessories to brides worldwide. Our influencer program is scaling quickly, and we need a sharp, organized Virtual Assistant to keep it running smoothly.



About the Role

You'll work alongside our Outreach Specialist and Onboarding Specialist, supporting both with the high-volume execution work that keeps our creator program moving: outreach, order fulfillment, follow-ups, and daily reporting.



This is a fully remote role for someone who is highly organized, detail-obsessed, communicative and reliable. While it starts as a part-time position, there is scope for this to grow into a full-time role for the right person!



What You’ll Do



Fulfill Orders: Place creator orders through Shopify, set up affiliate codes and tracking links, and proactively follow up on shipments.



Manage Follow-Ups: Monitor the influencer inbox and DMs: replying within 24 hours, chasing outstanding deliverables using our templates, and keeping creators on track.



Maintain CRM Hygiene: Keep our 
 boards perfectly accurate, organized, and up to date so nothing falls through the cracks.



Provide Daily Reporting: Post a short daily update for the team on packages shipped, creators expected to post, and any outstanding follow-ups.



You’ll Be a Great Fit If You…



Are heavily detail-oriented: You are highly organized, comfortable executing high-volume repetitive work without losing accuracy, and never let things slip.



Are a master communicator: You have excellent written English with a warm, professional communication style and pride yourself on being a quick, responsive communicator (24-hour response standard).



Are proactive and reliable: You naturally flag problems early and keep the team updated without needing to be chased.



Are available to overlap with Australian and US business hours for at least 2–3 hours daily.



(Bonus!) Have experience with 
, Shopify, or influencer marketing.



Application Task

As part of your application, please complete this short task to help us understand how you think about creator selection (there is no right answer, we're just looking for your reasoning!):



Identify 3 creators on Instagram or TikTok who you think would be a great fit for Calily Bridal.



For each one, share their handle and a link to their profile.



Include 2–3 sentences explaining why they'd be a good fit (consider their audience, content style, engagement, and niche relevance).



And at the very top of your application, please write: “I like dogs” – this is our way of knowing you read the full job post.

title: AI CONTENT CREATOR & VIDEO EDITOR
description:
The Opportunity

This isn't a conventional role. You don't need years of experience or an impressive portfolio — you need passion, curiosity, and the drive to become exceptional at AI-powered content creation.

We operate in the ingredients and cosmetics industry, creating content that educates, engages, and converts. You'll work with cutting-edge AI video tools to produce short-form content for social media, and grow with us as the role expands. We'll provide the workflows, the tool knowledge, and the creative direction. You bring the hunger.



Tools You'll Work With

CapCut — primary editing platform for all short-form content

Flow / Veo — AI video generation and scene creation

HeyGen — AI avatar and talking-head video production

ElevenLabs — AI voiceover and audio generation



What You'll Be Doing

Editing short-form AI videos for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts using CapCut

Generating AI footage, avatars, and voiceovers using Flow/Veo, HeyGen, and ElevenLabs

Adding captions, transitions, effects, and music to polished, engaging cuts

Repurposing content into multiple formats efficiently

Keeping production consistent with clear communication and organized files



What We're Looking For

Must have:

Experience with CapCut video editing

Familiarity with AI content tools

Understanding of short-form video formats

Good English communication skills

Reliable, detail-oriented, and self-managed

Nice to have:

Hands-on experience with HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or Veo

Background in social media content

Basic graphic design knowledge



Who We're Really Looking For

The right person doesn't need a perfect background. They need to be genuinely excited about where AI content is heading — and willing to put in the effort to master the tools and the craft.

If you're the type who watches tutorials in your free time, experiments with new tools out of curiosity, and gets excited about what AI can do for video and storytelling, this role was made for you.



How to Apply

To help us find the best fit, please include all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



A short intro about yourself and what drives you in content creation

Examples of your CapCut edits — links or file attachments (required)

Any AI-generated video content you've made using HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Veo, or similar tools

Your availability and preferred working hours

One thing you've learned recently about AI content that genuinely excited you





Compensation

Starting rate is $3 per hour. Long-term creators who deliver quality work will receive more hours and expanded opportunities. This is a ground-floor role with real room to grow.

title: Video Editor (Real Estate Media)
description:
About Tygo Studio



Tygo Studio is a U.S.–based real estate media company creating cinematic listing videos, drone footage, and short-form content for agents who want to stand out. We’re building a team that values quality, consistency, and a clean, modern editing style.



Who We’re Looking For



We’re hiring a Rockstar Video Editor who understands what makes a great video — strong visuals, intentional pacing, music selection, sound design, and clean color grading.



You’re a great fit if you:



•  Have strong editing fundamentals and an eye for storytelling

•  Prefer clean, modern edits over heavy effects

•  Are reliable, communicative, and eager to grow

•  Understand English and can speak English

•  Are highly proficient in Final Cut Pro (preferred)

•  Are committed to improving your craft over time



Here's a link to a video edit we are looking for. If you can create something like this, you are a good fit.





What You’ll Be Editing



•  Real estate content: listing videos, closings, branding pieces, lifestyle clips

• Short-form content for Instagram Reels & TikTok

• Long-form content for YouTube

•  Motion graphics, captions, and simple text animations



Turnaround Expectations



Some projects require a 24-hour turnaround, and a sense of urgency is essential. This fast, consistent workflow is a core part of our team culture.



This Role Isn’t for You If You:



•  Prefer freelance or per-project work

•  Rely heavily on flashy transitions or effects

•  Struggle with deadlines or need frequent reminders

•  Don’t enjoy working within a consistent brand style

•  Can’t commit to a 24-hour turnaround when needed



Compensation & Structure



•  This is a team position, not a gig

•  Stable, consistent weekly workload

•  Competitive pay based on experience

•  Opportunities to learn and grow as the company expands

• Performance-based raises over time



Why Join Tygo Studio



•  Be part of a growing Arizona brand

•  Consistent editing work every week

•  A creative environment where your ideas matter

•  Room to grow your skills and responsibilities



How to Apply

3. Your portfolio (real estate or similar styles preferred)

4. Your expected compensation range



Only applicants who follow the above instructions will be considered.

title: Amazon Operations Specialist
description:
SPCR Distribution is a fast-growing UK-based wholesale eCommerce business, founded just 2.5 years ago and already operating at scale across Amazon and eBay. We have grown rapidly using a wholesale model and are now transitioning towards a brand-direct strategy, with plans to expand into Amazon EU, Amazon US, TikTok Shop, and Shopify.



We operate with a lean, high-output team of five (two directors, one VA, and two warehouse staff), focused on building a scalable, systems-driven operation.



We are now hiring for a hands-on operations role to take ownership of backend execution across the business. This is a critical position responsible for keeping day-to-day operations running smoothly across inventory management, supplier coordination, warehouse workflows, and Amazon account operations.



You will work directly with the directors, taking over existing responsibilities and improving how things are done, while helping build the operational foundation required to scale into new markets and sales channels.



This role is not just task-based. You will be responsible for owning processes end-to-end, maintaining accuracy, and ensuring consistency across all operational areas. Strong attention to detail, organisation, and the ability to take responsibility without constant oversight are essential.



Amazon Account Operations

- Own day-to-day operations within Amazon Seller Central, ensuring the account runs without disruption

- Monitor Account Health, performance notifications, and proactively resolve issues before they escalate

- Identify and take action on listing issues, stranded inventory, suppressed ASINs, and operational blockers

- Manage and resolve Amazon cases in line with SOPs, ensuring timely and accurate outcomes



Inventory & Purchasing

- Track inventory levels and stock availability using SoStocked

- Ensure inventory data is accurate and up to date across all systems

- Create and manage purchase orders accurately and on time

- Coordinate closely with warehouse staff via WhatsApp and, where needed, phone calls to ensure smooth inbound processing and issue resolution

- Maintain clear and consistent communication with the warehouse to resolve discrepancies, delays, or errors quickly

Supplier & Operational Coordination

- Communicate with suppliers via
, managing orders, timelines, and ongoing relationships

- Ensure all supplier communication is clear, professional, and handled efficiently

- Confident written communication is essential, with a strong preference for candidates comfortable speaking with suppliers over the phone when required

- Support product and sales analysis using internal tools and spreadsheets

- Maintain and update spreadsheets, trackers, and internal systems with a high level of accuracy



Important: As part of this application, please include “002” in the subject line. Applications without this may not be considered.



Process Ownership & Improvement

- Follow existing SOPs while identifying gaps, inefficiencies, or recurring issues

- Proactively suggest and implement improvements to streamline operations and reduce errors

- Flag issues early, ask questions, and ensure problems are solved properly—not repeatedly



Systems & Tools You Will Use

- Amazon Seller Central

- SellerToolkit

- Sellerboard

- SellerSnap (repricer)

- SoStocked

- Google Sheets / Excel



Experience with repricers (especially SellerSnap) and Amazon analytics tools is a strong advantage.



Requirements

- Previous experience working with Amazon Seller Central

- Strong organisational skills and high attention to detail

- Confident using Google Sheets / Excel

- Excellent written and spoken English (must be fluent and professional)

- Strong communication skills across
, WhatsApp, and phone

- Comfortable coordinating daily with both suppliers and warehouse staff

- Ability to follow structured processes while taking ownership of outcomes

- Reliable, proactive, and able to manage daily tasks independently

- A questioning mindset, willing to flag issues, ask for clarification, and improve processes



Added Extras (Not Core Responsibilities)

The following are not required, but experience in any of these areas is a bonus and may lead to additional responsibility over time:

- PPC support or campaign management

- Listing optimisation

- Graphic design (basic image or asset updates)

- Helium 10 & Keepa knowledge



These tasks are not core expectations for the role.



What We’re Looking For

- This is an execution-heavy role responsible for keeping core operations running smoothly every day.

- You will not be building strategy, but you will be expected to take ownership of processes, solve problems independently, and ensure tasks are completed accurately and on time.

- This role suits someone who is highly organised, detail-focused, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where things don’t always go to plan.



Working Hours

- Full-time

- Aligned with UK working hours

title: Invoicing Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Invoicing Specialist to join our team. This role is primarily focused on ensuring accurate billing, timely collections, and smooth financial operations, while also supporting a limited scope of structured administrative and HR-related tasks.



The ideal candidate will have a strong grasp of calculations, strong attention to detail, and the ability to manage credits, discounts, and follow-ups with professionalism.



As an Invoicing Specialist, you will be responsible for preparing and issuing invoices, calculating adjustments, monitoring payment status, and maintaining accurate billing records. In addition, you will support basic administrative processes such as maintaining employee records and coordinating onboarding and offboarding system access.



Key Responsibilities:

-Prepare, review, and issue accurate invoices based on client agreements and internal records

-Calculate credits, discounts, cancellations, and other billing adjustments

-Monitor payment status and proactively follow up on overdue invoices

-Ensure all billing details are correct, including names, rates, lesson records, and payment terms

-Maintain organized documentation of invoices, credits, payments, and adjustments

-Communicate professionally with clients to address billing inquiries and resolve discrepancies

-Work in close collaboration with the customer relations team

-Generate regular reports on invoicing status and outstanding payments

-Support general finance administrative tasks and coordinate with accountants as required

-Recommend improvements to invoicing processes and payment follow-up procedures

-HR Administrative support: maintain employee data in HR systems, ensure accuracy of personal and employment records, support onboarding & offboarding processes



Job Requirements:

-Proven experience in invoicing, billing, finance, or accounts receivable roles

-Strong numerical and calculation skills with high attention to detail

-Ability to handle complex pricing structures, discounts, and adjustments

-Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously

-Strong follow-up skills with a proactive approach to collections and client communication

-Familiarity with invoicing software, spreadsheets, and billing systems (Google Sheets experience a plus)

-Professional communication skills in English (written and spoken)

-Integrity, reliability, and a service-oriented mindset

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field preferred



Working Hours & Availability:

Must be available to work 40 hours per week



Standard working hours are (including break on full work days):

Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Wednesday: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM (Jakarta Time)

Thursday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Jakarta Time)

Saturday: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM (Jakarta Time)



Willingness to work overtime when required to meet billing deadlines or critical follow-ups

Hey there! I am looking for a proactive, experienced Virtual Assistant who loves social media and building communities! You'll be joining our small, purpose-driven team (right now its just 2 of us) to help us create magic through tasks like scheduling posts, engaging with our community on socials, supporting launches, editing podcast episodes and keeping our WordPress pages fresh and updated.

title: Social Media & Growth Manager (Kids Music Brand)
description:
Company Overview:

We have recently launched a fast-growing, values-driven children’s music brand focused on producing high-quality songs, videos, and content for kids and families. Our goal is to build a globally recognized brand that entertains, inspires, and connects with children in a meaningful way.



We are looking for a creative, data-driven Social Media & Growth Manager to take full ownership of our online presence and help scale our audience across platforms.





Role Overview:

This is not a basic posting role. We are looking for someone who can own and drive growth across all social platforms, combining content strategy, paid advertising, analytics, and platform optimization.



You will be responsible for turning our content into real traction—views, followers, subscribers, and listeners.





Key Responsibilities:



Content Strategy & Execution

 • Plan and execute a consistent posting schedule across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms

 • Collaborate with our production team to turn songs into high-performing social content (clips, reels, shorts, etc.)

 • Identify trends and adapt them into our brand voice (kids/family-friendly)



Growth & Audience Development

 • Build and grow followers, subscribers, and engagement across all platforms

 • Develop strategies to increase YouTube subscribers and Spotify listeners

 • Create and manage playlist strategies and content funnels



Paid Ads Management

 • Plan, launch, and optimize ad campaigns (Meta, YouTube, TikTok)

 • Run targeted campaigns to drive traffic to songs, playlists, and videos

 • Continuously test creatives, audiences, and messaging to improve ROI



Analytics & Optimization

 • Track performance across platforms (views, retention, CTR, conversions)

 • Use data to refine strategy and double down on what’s working

 • Provide regular reports with clear insights and next steps



Platform Optimization

 • Optimize titles, thumbnails, captions, and hashtags

 • Improve discoverability through SEO and algorithm strategies

 • Stay up to date with platform changes and best practices





Qualifications:

 • Proven experience growing social media accounts (especially YouTube, Instagram, or TikTok)

 • Strong understanding of content that performs (short-form + long-form)

 • Experience running and optimizing paid social campaigns

 • Data-driven mindset with ability to analyze and act on metrics

 • Creative thinker with strong instincts for viral / engaging content

 • Bonus: Experience in music, kids content, or family brands





What We’re Looking For:

 • Someone who takes ownership, not just executes tasks

 • Someone who understands that growth = content + distribution

 • Someone who is hungry to build something big from the ground up

 • Someone aligned with positive, family-friendly values

title: TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager (Full-Time Remote, US Hours)
description:
Location: Remote (Must work US Eastern Time hours: 9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



Compensation: $1,000 - $1,500 per month (based on experience and performance)



Experience Level: Intermediate (1-2 years in affiliate marketing, social media management, or e-commerce preferred)



About Us:

We're a growing e-commerce brand specializing in survival and first-aid products, like our innovative Burn MOD hydrogel dressings. We sell via TikTok Shop and are expanding into Amazon affiliates and website traffic through Refersion. Our affiliate program is thriving with top creators in the prepper, wellness, and outdoor niches. We're looking for a proactive manager to scale this—someone who can spot talent, build relationships, and drive GMV through creative campaigns and competitions.



What You'll Do:

As our TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager, you'll own the end-to-end affiliate ecosystem. This starts with a 3-month onboarding phase where you'll shadow me closely, learning our processes, tools, and strategies. After that, you'll run the program independently with my ongoing guidance. Key responsibilities include:



Vetting & Onboarding Affiliates: 

Review applications for free product samples on TikTok Shop. Assess audience fit, content quality, and performance history to approve the best creators.



Communications Management: 

Handle outreach and updates via Euka (our
 tool). Set up global messages, segment lists (e.g., by niche or performance tier), and nurture relationships to keep affiliates engaged.



Negotiations & Retainers: 

Identify high-potential creators and negotiate monthly retainers ($300-$1,500) in exchange for 8-12 videos per month, plus commissions on sales. Draft offers, track deliverables, and optimize for ROI.



Community & Competitions: 

Manage our 
 server for 50+ affiliates. Run monthly contests rewarding top video posters and GMV generators with prizes. Use tools like Refunnel to track submissions, attribute sales, and create leaderboards.



Expansion Support: 

Help transition affiliates to Amazon attribution and Refersion for website traffic, ensuring seamless multi-channel growth.



Performance Tracking: 

Monitor GMV, engagement, and ROI using TikTok analytics, Google Sheets, and affiliate dashboards. Report weekly insights to optimize campaigns.



You'll report directly to me (the founder) and collaborate with our small remote team. Expect a dynamic role with room to innovate—great ideas get rewarded!

What We're Looking For



Skills & Experience:



*Proven track record in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or social e-commerce (TikTok Shop experience a huge plus).

*Comfortable with tools like Euka 
 automation), 
 (community mod), Refunnel (UGC tracking), Canva (content briefs), and Google Sheets (reporting).

*Strong negotiation skills for retainers and partnerships; bonus if you've managed paid creator programs.

*Excellent English communication—written and verbal—for
s, DMs, and 
 interactions.

*Analytical mindset: Comfortable with metrics like GMV, engagement rates, and ROI.





*Personal Traits: Organized, proactive, and creative. You're a people person who thrives in fast-paced remote work and loves spotting viral potential in creator content.



Requirements:



Full-time availability during US EST hours (flexible within that window).

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace.

Based in the Philippines (preferred for time zone alignment and platform familiarity).

Available to start immediately after a quick paid test task.





How to Apply

If this sounds like your next challenge, apply now! Tell us in your cover letter: "What's one affiliate campaign you've run that drove real sales, and why?" 



We're excited to build something big together.

title: Roblox Codes Verifier - 2 Month Fixed-term Gig
description:
About us:



We run one of the largest Roblox content websites. Our biggest section is our game codes directory, and we need a reliable person to keep it accurate and up-to-date.



Job details:



- 30 hours/week minimum (6 hours/day × 5 days, flexible hours, work whenever suits you)

- 2-month gig to start, with strong potential to convert to long-term part-time for the right person

- $10/hr USD

- Remote, anywhere with good English



What you'll be doing:



You'll work from a custom dashboard (the "CUN") that automatically detects new 
 codes from
, 
, etc and creates alerts for you to review. Your job is to verify each one. For every alert, you'll:



1. Open the relevant Roblox game

2. Test the code to confirm it works

3. Lightly edit the auto-generated description if needed (clear, well-written English)

4. Approve it (or reject it if invalid).



You'll handle 100+ codes/day, so this is a high-volume role where efficiency matters. The work runs in daily batches. No need to be always-on or respond to alerts in real time.



You'll have full authority to approve or reject codes yourself. For edge cases, you are expected to communicate with the team to work out the best way to handle these. We'll figure out the right call together.



What we need from you:



- Roblox familiarity: you don't need to know every game, but you should be comfortable with the platform, navigating games, and redeeming codes

- Strong written English: you'll be lightly editing code descriptions, so your English needs to be clean and natural

- Gaming-capable PC: Roblox needs to run smoothly for you to test codes efficiently. A laggy machine will make this job miserable

- Stable, fast internet: you'll be loading games all day

- Comfortable with computers: keyboard shortcuts, copy/paste, switching between tabs/games quickly. We shouldn't need to explain the basics

- Good judgment and attention to detail: wrong codes ending up on the site is the worst-case outcome we're trying to avoid

- Reliability: hitting your 30 hours and showing up consistently matters more than working specific hours



Nice to have:



- An established Roblox account with playtime history (preferred but not required)



Tools and reimbursements:



- We'll communicate via Slack with occasional video calls

- If a game ever requires Robux to test a code, we'll reimburse you, never spend your own money on this



Why this is worth applying for:



This starts as a 2-month gig, but we're explicitly looking for someone we can keep on long-term as a part-time role. If the initial contract goes well, this becomes a stable, ongoing position. You'll be working directly with me and a small remote team on one of the biggest Roblox websites in the world.



Please answer the following questions in your cover letter:



1. Describe your computer specs and your internet speed (run a speedtest.net test and paste the result)

2. What hours of the day do you usually work? (Just so we know your timezone/availability)

3. In one short paragraph, why do you think you'd be good at this role?

4. What's your favourite Roblox game?

5. Have you ever claimed codes in Roblox games, and if so, what's a code you remember claiming?

title: Virtual Sales Closer / B2B Sales Rep (US Market) – Base + Commission
description:
We are a marketing agency looking for a remote sales rep / closer to speak with local business owners in the USA.



You do not need previous sales experience, but it is preferred. The most important things for this role are:

- great/excellent English

- confidence speaking with prospects

- comfort being on camera

- professionalism and coachability



This role has a lot of room for growth. You will receive training and support to improve your sales skills, perform at a higher level, and increase your earnings over time. This is a very lucrative opportunity for the right person.



You will be talking to business owners about our marketing services, so you must be able to communicate clearly, build trust, and speak confidently on video calls.



Responsibilities:

- Speak with leads and prospects from US local businesses

- Join discovery and sales calls

- Communicate our marketing services clearly and confidently

- Build rapport with prospects

- Answer questions and handle objections professionally

- Follow up with leads when needed

- Keep notes and pipeline updated in the CRM

- Work hours that overlap with the US market



Must-have requirements:

- Great/excellent spoken and written English

- Must have a webcam

- Must be comfortable speaking on video calls with prospects

- Professional communication skills

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet workspace for calls

- Organized, dependable, and coachable



Preferred:

- Sales experience

- B2B experience

- Experience speaking with US customers

- Familiarity with marketing or agency services

- Familiarity with CRMs like HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, or similar



Compensation:

- Base pay + commission

- OTE: $2,000–$3,000/month

- Pay depends on communication skills, experience, and performance



How to apply:

To apply, you must do ALL of the following:



1. Submit a voice recording or video recording that is 60 seconds maximum (Video submission preferred)

3. In the recording, include the following:

   - Todays Date (Recording date)

   - your past experience

   - why you feel you are a good fit for this role

4. Include the word "Orange" in your application titles submission

5. Include your whatsapp contact



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



This is not a customer service or general VA role. This is a sales role for someone who is confident speaking live with prospects and helping move conversations toward a sale.



We are looking for someone who is professional, hungry, confident, and great at communicating. If you have excellent English and are comfortable on camera, we would like to hear from you.

title: Content Creator, Social Media Manager & Lead Gen Specialist
description:
Hi! I'm Andrew, founder of Trustwise Marketing — a US based marketing agency helping local service businesses grow. I'm looking for a creative, hardworking, self-driven person to handle my agency's social media presence AND help bring in new clients through outreach. This is a long-term role for the right person  I want a partner, not a freelancer juggling 10 other clients.



Starts part-time, very likely converts to full-time within 2 months if it's a good fit.



Please read the entire post and answer EVERY question. Lazy or incomplete applications get rejected on sight.



What you'll be doing:

Content Creation (40% of your time)

* Edit short-form video for Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn (mostly founder talking-head + repurposed long-form)

* Design educational carousels and static graphics in Canva

* Repurpose Loom videos, podcast clips, and client wins into shareable content

* Capture B-roll from raw footage I send you and turn it into polished clips

* Write captions that match my voice (casual, direct, value-first — not generic agency-speak)



Social Media Management (30% of your time)

* Plan and schedule posts across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn (and YouTube Shorts when relevant)

* Engage with comments, DMs, and our community daily

* Track what's working and adapt — you'll own the content calendar

* Stay on top of trending audio, formats, and hooks to help us strategize new content



Lead Generation & Outreach (30% of your time)

* Build prospect lists of local service businesses (mobile mechanics, cleaners, contractors, chiropractors, attorneys, detailers, etc.)

* Send DM outreach using approved scripts (mostly Instagram, some LinkedIn)

* Engage authentically with prospect content before pitching

* Manage IG keyword DM triggers and lead magnet delivery

* Track everything in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

* Book qualified discovery calls onto my calendar



Skills I need (must-haves):

* 2+ years of hands-on social media work for a brand, agency, or business

* Strong video editing in CapCut or Premiere — talking-head + B-roll + captions

* Strong graphic design in Canva

* Excellent written English with a casual, conversatonal voice

* Comfortable doing outbound DM outreach

* AI-savvy — you actively use modern tools to work faster

* Self-managed — I shouldn't need to chase you for updates



Skills that are a HUGE plus:

* Adobe Premiere or After Effects

* Familiarity with Opus Clip, Submagic, Descript, or ElevenLabs

* Apollo, Apify, Instantly, or other outbound tools

* GoHighLevel experience (or willingness to learn)

* Local service business marketing experience



Questions — please answer every single one:

Background and Experience

1. Walk me through 2-3 brands or businesses you've handled social media for in the last year. Include platforms, what you did, and real results (followers, engagement, leads — actual numbers).

2. How many clients are you currently working with?

3. Whose content do you admire and try to learn from? (Creators, agencies, brands.)

4. Have you done outbound lead gen before? How? For who, how, and what results did you get?



AI Tools (be specific)

1. What AI tools do you use in your daily work? List each one and what you use it for. 

2. Walk me through how AI has saved you real time on a recent project.

3. How would you use AI to research a new prospect's business before sending them a cold DM?



Content Creation

1. Send me 3-5 short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, or YouTube Shorts) you edited yourself. Talking-head content preferred. Be honest — I only want work YOU made.

2. Send me 3-5 graphics or carousels you designed.

3. What tools do you use for video editing? Walk me through your editing process for a 60-second talking-head Reel.

4. How do you stay on top of trending hooks, audio, and formats?



Social Media Management

1. What's your process for building a content calendar for a B2B service business?

2. How do you d
 what to post when, and on which platform?

3. Find me a local service business in Texas that needs a website and share the link here to their social media. 



Lead Generation

1. What tools and techniques do you use to build prospect lists?

2. Walk me through your DM outreach process from "found the lead" to "booked a call."

3. How do you avoid getting flagged or banned on Instagram for outreach?



Work Habits and Communication

1. How do you organize your work? (

2. How do you track time?

3. What are your typical working hours in your timezone AND in PST?

4. How quickly do you typically respond to messages during work hours?



Logistics

1. Are you comfortable completing a paid sample task at a higher rate before being hired full-time?

2. What is your desired monthly rate (in USD)? Is it flexible? Be honest — I'd rather know upfront.

3. How many hours per week can you work right now? Is that flexible?

4. Do you have reliable internet, a working webcam/mic, and a quiet workspace? Where do you usually work? Please send computer and phone specs.



Work Preferences

1. Are you looking for a long-term commitment or short-term gig?

2. Are you currently employed elsewhere? Do you plan to continue if hired?



Critical Thinking

1. Did I make any spelling mistakes in this job post? If so, which words?



What I'm looking for:

* Creative, fast-moving, and hungry to grow

* Strong taste — you can tell good content from bad

* Hardworking AND smart-working (uses AI, doesn't redo work, builds systems)

* Honest about strengths AND weaknesses

* Comfortable wearing multiple hats

* Long-term mindset



How to apply:

Send your full answers, your resume, and links to your best work. Throughly answer every question — short answers tell me you're not the right fit. I read every application carefully and reply quickly to strong ones.



Looking forward to building something real with the right person.



— Andrew, Trustwise Marketing

title: Executive assistant to Business Advisor
description:
About the Role



I run The Granite Table — a business advisory firm that partners with small business owners to build systems that run without them at the center. I work across multiple client engagements simultaneously, which means my time is best spent advising, building, and closing — not managing my inbox, my calendar, chasing follow-ups, or figuring out what to post on LinkedIn.



I need an assistant who can step into that gap and own it.



This is the first hire inside my business. You won't just be executing tasks — you'll be learning how I think, learning my voice, and helping me stay consistent and accountable as the business grows. There's real room to grow here for the right person.



---



What You'll Do



• Draft and schedule LinkedIn posts based on my ideas, notes, and voice — I'll give you the raw material, you make it ready to post

• Send outreach messages and connection requests to business professionals on my behalf — not cold spam, warm and intentional

• Schedule calls, meetings, and networking sit-downs and manage my calendar end-to-end

• Keep my open task list organized and follow up on items that are sitting too long

• Hold me accountable to my weekly priorities and flag when something is slipping

• Handle administrative tasks — applications, research, platform setup, and similar items that need attention but not my direct involvement



---



What I'm Looking For



• Strong written English — you'll be communicating as an extension of me

• Comfortable with technology and actively uses AI tools in your work — this is non-negotiable

• Experience managing social media or professional outreach, LinkedIn preferred

• Organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently without being managed

• Reliable internet connection and availability for occasional overlap with US Mountain Time

• Someone who wants to grow with a business, not just fill a role

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive AI Automation Specialist to join our team on a part-time basis. In this role, you will serve as the chief architect of our internal systems, responsible for auditing our entire business operations and identifying opportunities to streamline, optimize, and automate workflows using cutting-edge AI technology.



Your primary goal is to make our operations simpler, faster, and more efficient, ultimately allowing us to deliver superior results to our clients. You will not just execute tasks; you will proactively design the systems that execute tasks.



Key Responsibilities

•Comprehensive Business Audit: Conduct a deep-dive analysis of our current standard operating procedures (SOPs), marketing funnels, and client fulfillment processes to identify bottlenecks and manual inefficiencies.

•System Architecture & Automation: Design, build, and maintain complex automation workflows to eliminate repetitive tasks across the business.

•GoHighLevel Mastery: Manage and optimize our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM, including building advanced pipelines, automated
/SMS sequences, appointment scheduling, and AI-driven lead nurturing systems.

•AI Agent Integration: Deploy and manage advanced AI tools, specifically Manus and Claude Code, to automate complex, multi-step workflows, research, and data processing tasks.

•Continuous Improvement: Actively monitor system performance and proactively suggest new AI tools, software features, or workflow adjustments to improve operational efficiency and client outcomes.

•Documentation: Create and maintain clear, step-by-step documentation for all automated systems and workflows built.



Required Skills and Qualifications

•Proven experience as an Automation Specialist, Systems Architect, or highly technical Virtual Assistant.

•Expert-level proficiency in GoHighLevel (GHL). Official HighLevel Certifications (e.g., Certified Admin) are highly preferred.

•Demonstrated experience utilizing advanced AI agents and coding assistants, specifically Manus and Claude / Claude Code, for workflow automation.

•Strong understanding of API integrations, webhooks (Zapier/Make), and system connectivity.

•Exceptional analytical and "systems thinking" skills; ability to visualize complex processes and simplify them.

•Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

•A highly proactive, self-directed work ethic. You must be comfortable taking ownership of projects and presenting solutions rather than waiting for instructions.



How to Apply

Click Apply Now and submit a brief video introduction and a portfolio or case study of a complex automation workflow you have successfully built on here or to

title: Client Nurturing Specialist
description:
About Proactive Marketing



The Proactive Marketing mission: “To help Chiropractors build their dream practice while having a positive impact on the health of their patients.”



We not only guarantee the best results for our clients, but we also prioritize building a one-of-a-kind working experience for our team. We are 100% remote, and we encourage our employees to work from anywhere in the world.



We have a strong company culture that focuses on innovation, personal development, leadership, and cultivating a winning environment. We believe that our company is most productive when our employees are fulfilled, challenged, and working to achieve both their personal and professional goals, while constantly striving for their own personal next level.



Our #1 Core Value: Better Than Yesterday



In today’s world taking initiative is a critical component of success. Therefore, we encourage tea
mbers to take initiative in the direction that they see fit so that they can learn valuable lessons along the way and contribute to relevant team goals. We don’t micromanage and we encourage an environment of responsibility and leadership.



About the Role



We are looking for a Client Nurturing Specialist to help manage and protect our client experience behind the scenes.



This role is not sales and not account management — your primary mission is to ensure clients feel supported, tracked, and never forgotten, while reducing administrative workload for our Account Managers so they can focus on high-value conversations and faster response times.



If you are highly organized, process-driven, and naturally attentive to client satisfaction, this role is for you.



Primary Objective



To reduce administrative workload for Account Managers by owning client tracking, follow-ups, and quality control — ultimately improving retention, continuity, and overall client experience.



Key Responsibilities



  -Client Onboarding & Launch Oversight

  -Ensure all clients are fully onboarded within the ideal timeline

  -Confirm that every onboarding and launch call strictly follows SOP

  -Flag missing steps, delays, or process gaps immediately

  -Call Quality Control & Client Sentiment Monitoring

  -Quality check every onboarding and launch call

  -Identify signs of frustration, dissatisfaction, or confusion

  -Proactively alert Account Managers if a client appears unhappy or disengaged

  -Client Retention & Lifecycle Tracking

  -Maintain a clear, up-to-date spreadsheet of:

        -Clients nearing the end of their service term (for retention follow-up)

        -Clients who stopped service (for re-engagement after 1–2 months)

        -Ensure no client reaches an end date without a retention action planned

        -Re-Engagement & Responsiveness Tracking

        -Track clients who become unresponsive

        -Coordinate outreach through different channels 
, Slack, CRM, etc.)

        -Help bring conversations back in sync before issues escalate

        -Internal Coordination

        -Keep Account Managers informed with clear notes, flags, and updates

        -Maintain clean, accurate documentation at all times



What We’re Looking For



 -Extremely detail-oriented and organized

 -Strong follow-up and tracking skills

 -Comfortable reviewing call recordings and SOPs

 -Able to spot emotional cues and early client dissatisfaction

 -Process-driven with a strong sense of ownership

 -Clear written communication skills

 -Experience in client success, operations, VA support, or account coordination is a plus



Why This Role Matters:



 -Your work directly impacts

 -Client satisfaction

 -Client retention

 -Faster response times

 -Better focus for Account Managers

 -A smoother, more professional client experience

 -You are the system behind the relationship.



Role Details



Remote



Full-time / Part-time (adjust as needed)



Long-term opportunity for the right candidate
