title: Video Editor for Dropshipping Ads
description:
We are looking for an experienced video editor to join our team and create high-converting ads for e-commerce products.

We test up to 30 products per month, so there is consistent work available for the right person.

What we need:

A video editor who understands:





Dropshipping ad creation





Direct-response marketing





Buyer avatars





Customer pain points





Product angles





Strong hooks





Fast-paced editing





UGC-style ads





Iterations and creative testing





You must be able to create ads that are not just visually good, but also built to sell.

Requirements:





Experience creating dropshipping or e-commerce ads





Strong understanding of marketing and buyer psychology





Ability to create 5 videos per day





Good at creating multiple iterations from one winning angle





Able to follow briefs and SOPs





Fast execution and clear communication





Able to take feedback and improve quickly





Good sense of pacing, hooks, captions, and scroll-stopping edits





Payment:

Payment is made right after each batch/project is completed and approved.

Payment method: GCash or Wise

This can become long-term work because we are constantly testing new products and need fresh video creatives every week.

Send your portfolio, previous dropshipping ad examples, and a short message explaining your experience creating ads that convert.

title: Backend Automation & AI Engineer
description:
Role Details

- Full-Time | 8 hours/day | Monday to Friday

- Work Hours: Flexible (Must have at least 4 overlapping hours with 8AM–4PM Pacific Time)

- Location: Remote (must have reliable power, internet, and backup)

- Compensation: PHP 80,000 – 100,000/month depending on experience

- Bonuses: Quarterly performance-based bonuses (after probation)

- Benefits: Wellness Day Off (after probation)



_________



About the Role



We’re looking for a highly skilled backend automation and reporting engineer to join our Growth Ops team.



This role is heavily focused on building and maintaining automations and reporting systems for Sales and Marketing, especially in Google Sheets and Looker Studio. You’ll also be responsible for managing backend integrations (e.g., Zapier, HighLevel workflows, APIs) and ensuring reliable, scalable, and cost-efficient automations.



AI bot ownership (e.g., our ChatGPT-based call review bot) will be part of your responsibilities, but the primary focus of this role is on automation and reporting that directly impact revenue visibility and decision-making.



This is NOT a pure maintenance role. We need someone who can proactively improve systems, catch issues before they cause downtime, and propose solutions that improve efficiency and reduce costs.



_________



Key Responsibilities



Automation & Integrations

• Build, monitor, and optimize automation workflows (Zapier, Make, HighLevel, etc.)

• Troubleshoot and resolve backend errors quickly

• Design scalable automation flows across Sales and Marketing



Sales & Marketing Reporting

• Build, maintain, and improve reporting dashboards in Google Sheets and Looker Studio

• Develop KPI tracking systems for Sales and Marketing performance visibility

• Ensure all reports are accurate, reliable, and actionable



AI Bot Support (Secondary Focus)

• Maintain and enhance our ChatGPT-based AI Call Review Bot

• Improve prompts, workflows, and integrations with CRM/dashboards

• Ensure bot output remains accurate and useful for Sales management



System Reliability & Optimization

• Serve as backup for other Backend Specialists on Growth Ops tech systems

• Audit tech stack for unnecessary costs and propose savings

• Implement process improvements that reduce downtime and increase efficiency



_________



What We’re Looking For



Required

- Advanced skills in Google Sheets (formulas, dashboards, troubleshooting)

- Strong experience building reporting dashboards (Google Sheets & Looker Studio)

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, CRM setup, or similar sales tools

- Proven experience in backend automation tools (Zapier, Make, HighLevel, etc.)

- Ability to handle API integrations (calling, receiving, parsing, and handling responses)

- Strong debugging/problem-solving skills

- Experience with sales operations and CRM data structures



Nice to Have

- Database management (e.g., Firebase)

- Hosting platforms (e.g., 
)

- Experience designing automation at scale

_________



Tools We Use

• Automation: Zapier, Make (Integromat), HighLevel, ClickFunnels

• Reporting: Google Sheets, Looker Studio

• AI (secondary): ChatGPT API, custom workflows

• Backend: Firebase, 

• Collaboration: Slack, Loom, Google Drive



_________



About Sales Possible



At Sales Possible, we partner with mission-driven online coaching businesses to scale their impact through world-class marketing, sales systems, and team training.



We don’t just teach sales—we build sustainable systems that empower both businesses and the people behind them. Our clients range from expert coaches to fast-growing education brands, and we take pride in helping them turn vision into results.



We’re a tight-knit, fast-moving team that values clear communication, ownership, and continuous growth. If you thrive in a proactive, performance-driven environment and want to build cutting-edge reporting and automation systems, you’ll feel right at home here.

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.  I am looking to hire immediately.



I help small business owners with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 80+ small business owners and offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them for a free consultation if they seem interested.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You are not someone who relies on your hourly wage, but someone who is motivated by performance and earning more through high commissions.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base 

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- 1st monthly sale = $100

-- 2nd monthly sale = $150   ($250 total)

-- 3rd monthly sale = $300   ($550 total)

-- 4th monthly sale = $350    ($900 total)

-- 5th monthly sale = $400    ($1,300 total)



MATH EXAMPLE (At Only 3 Sold + 12 Show-Ups)

-- $320: 20 hours/week at $4/hour

-- $240: 12 show-ups 

-- $550: 3 sold 

-- Total: $1,110/month

-- Most new reps aim for 2-3 per month - that's where you can do very well here.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "I Love To Dial" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: SEO + WordPress Integrator (Junior, Remote, $350 to $550 USD/month)
description:
OVERVIEW

RMD is a digital agency with clients in 20+ countries. We're hiring a Junior SEO + WordPress Integrator to take content briefs from our team and ship them as live, SEO-clean pages.

This is a junior role. We will teach you the advanced parts. What we need from you on day one is solid hands on WordPress (or HTML/CSS), care for detail, and the ability to read a page and notice when something is off.

If you're early in your career and you want to learn SEO properly inside a working agency, this is for you. We don't gatekeep. If you do the work, you grow fast.

Compensation: $350 to $550 USD per month based on experience, paid via PayPal.

Hours: 40 hours per week, Manila time. We need 4 hours of overlap with Morocco/Dubai (so a 1pm to 9pm or 2pm to 10pm Manila shift is ideal).



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Take content briefs from our senior writer (blog posts, landing pages, service pages) and build the page in WordPress + Elementor (or hand-coded HTML/CSS, your choice)

Set up the on-page SEO basics on every page you build: meta title, meta description, H1, image alt text, internal links, schema where relevant. Yoast or RankMath

Run weekly site-health checks: broken links, slow pages, missing meta data, indexing issues. Flag what you find

Submit sitemaps, request indexing in Google Search Console, monitor for crawl errors

Help with simple on-page audits: open a page, list what's wrong, suggest fixes

Make small content updates: typo fixes, link swaps, image replacements, schedule blog posts

Read Google Analytics and Google Search Console at a basic level. We'll teach you the rest



WHAT YOU NEED ON DAY ONE

This is a junior role and we will teach you the advanced parts. But you walk in with these or you don't walk in.

Strong WordPress + Elementor. You can build a clean landing page from a brief. You know your way around Elementor templates, global colors, mobile responsive view

OR strong hand-coded HTML/CSS. If you prefer to code pages by hand, we accept that. Show us the work

Basic on-page SEO knowledge. You know what a meta title is, why H1 matters, what alt text is for, how internal links help

Yoast or RankMath setup experience on at least one real WordPress site. Configured the basics: meta title template, sitemap, breadcrumbs, redirects. Not the install-and-leave-default version

Basic image work in Photoshop, Figma, or equivalent. Resize, crop, export at correct dimensions, compress for web (no 5MB hero images)

Hosting + Cloudflare basics. You can log into a cPanel / hosting dashboard, find files, change DNS records, clear a cache. You don't need to be a sysadmin, just not afraid of the back-end

At least one of Ahrefs, Semrush, or Google Search Console used on a real project. Even at a beginner level. You've opened the tool, run a query, and used the output for something real

1+ year of digital agency, freelance, or in-house web/SEO work. Hobby projects don't count. We need someone who has shipped under deadline pressure

You can read a page and spot what's broken or sloppy. Missing alt text, broken links, walls of text with no headings, slow images. You notice

You can read English well. Our briefs are in English. Some clients are French (we translate the brief, you don't need French)

Honesty about what you don't know. "I haven't done schema before, but I can learn" beats "yes I know schema" followed by a mess



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT MOVES YOU UP THE LIST)

1+ live URL you built or wrote that ranks on page 1 of Google for any commercial keyword. Send: URL + target keyword + screenshot from Ahrefs / Semrush / live SERP. This is a strong plus

1 URL where you can show conversion data (CVR%, leads/month, GA4 or GSC screenshot, redacted is fine). Most juniors don't have this; if you do, it puts you ahead

Schema markup deployment (FAQPage, Article, Product) in production

Shopify (we have e-commerce clients)

2+ years of agency or freelance work

French (we have clients in France and North Africa)

Comfortable recording Loom walkthroughs for async comms



WHO WE ARE

A small team distributed across Morocco and Dubai. We work in writing, async-first, and we trust people to ship.

We use AI in the daily work. We expect you to use it too, after onboarding. The test for this role does not allow AI, because we need to see what YOU can do.



WHY THIS ROLE IS WORTH IT (read this part carefully)

This is a junior seat, not a junior career. Here's what that means:

You will get to do more, fast. Inside 90 days, if you can build clean pages and read a brief, we start handing you content briefs to write yourself, basic keyword research in Ahrefs, and small SEO audit work. Inside 6 months, you can be writing landing pages alongside our senior writer. Inside 12 months, ownership of small clients is on the table.

We teach the advanced parts. Schema, technical SEO, GA4 + GSC diagnostics, Yoast/RankMath setup at a real level, AI-assisted content workflow, internal linking architecture, topic clusters. We don't gatekeep. If you want to learn it, we'll teach it.

We reward progress. Learn a new skill, ship a harder deliverable, hit a result we didn't expect. When that happens, we adjust your pay and scope to match. We don't make people wait 2 years for a real raise. A-players see significant pay growth (50% to 80%+) inside the first year.

The ceiling is what you make of it. We don't have a "you're a junior, stay in your lane" culture. The people who grow inside RMD become senior writers, content leads, and SEO specialists. You d
 how fast.

Who this is NOT for: people who want to stay junior forever and improve very slowly. We hire people who want to move forward. If "comfortable, low-pressure, no growth" is the goal, this isn't the seat. Apply somewhere else, no hard feelings.



HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this post with your CV

Include a portfolio link (Google Drive folder, personal site, GitHub, anything). We need to see at least 2 WordPress pages or HTML pages you built. Screenshots are fine, live URLs are better

Start your
 body with the line: RMD RMD. (Yes, exactly those two words on the first line. This is how we know you actually read the post.)

Tell us in 2 to 3 sentences: what's the most recent page you built or content you integrated? What did you do, what tools did you use?

If your application makes our shortlist, we will
 you 3 quick screening questions. Reply to those, and if you pass, we send a free 45-minute practical test. The test is small and clear. You'll see the scoring before you start.

We reply within 5 business days if we want to move you forward. We are a small team and don't have a dedicated recruiter. If you don't hear from us in that window, your application wasn't a fit this round. Don't take it personally and please don't chase. We respect your time enough to be honest about that.



WHAT NOT TO SEND

Generic CVs with no portfolio

"I am hardworking and loyal" cover letters with no specifics

Promises you can do everything (we know nobody can)

We're hiring one person for this role. We're patient. We will wait for the right fit.



Apply on OnlineJobs.ph or
 
 with subject "SEO Integrator PH, [Your Full Name]"

title: Quick Hire for VA Call Handling
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our growing insurance agency. This role focuses on client communication, appointment setting, and CRM management using Go High Level (GHL).

Because we serve many senior clients, clear and easy-to-understand English over the phone is essential for success in this role.



You will be a key part of delivering excellent client experiences while helping us stay organized and efficient.

? Responsibilities

???? Client Communication (Primary Role)

Make outbound calls using GHL phone system:

Seminar reminders

Thank-you calls after seminars

Appointment scheduling

Information gathering for Medicare applications

Client check-in calls

Answer inbound calls when needed

Maintain a professional, friendly, and helpful tone at all times



???? Appointment & Lead Management

Schedule appointments directly in GHL calendar

Confirm and reschedule appointments as needed

Ensure all appointments are properly tagged and assigned



???? CRM Management (Go High Level)

Update contact records accurately after every interaction

Add notes from every call

Apply/remove tags based on client status

Move opportunities through pipeline stages as instructed

Ensure all client data is complete and up to date

title: TikTok Shop Manager / TikTok E-commerce Growth Specialist
description:
JOB OPENING.  IMMEDIATE START.  EXCITING OPPORTUNITY FOR SOMEONE WHO IS ALREADY VERY EXPERIENCED WITH TIKTOK FULLY AND WANTS TO WORK IN A DYNAMIC FAST GRWOING UK COMPANY.



WE REPRESENT SOME VERY BIG BRANDS AND NEED AN EXPERIENCED TIKTOK MANAGER THAT UNDERSTANDS TIKTOK FULLY, HAS WORKED WITH AFFILIATES AND CREATORS AND IS WELL ORGANISED AND HUNGRY TO GROW.



We are looking for an experienced TikTok Shop Manager to help develop and grow our TikTok Shop business in the UK.



We operate multiple product categories and brand shops, and we now need someone who understands how to set up, manage and grow TikTok Shop properly.



This is a hands-on role for someone who already has real experience with TikTok Shop operations, creator outreach, affiliate management, product listing, and paid campaign support.



Main objectives of the role:



1. List products accurately into the correct TikTok brand shops

2. Create and manage company posts/content for the TikTok accounts

3. Identify, recruit and manage affiliates

4. Identify, recruit and manage creators for product promotion

5. Help launch and manage GMV Max campaigns to improve product visibility and sales

6. Support overall growth of the TikTok Shop accounts



Key responsibilities:



1. Upload and optimise product listings in TikTok Shop

2. Organise products correctly across different shops/brands

Improve titles, descriptions, images and product content for conversion

3. Create posting plans for the company TikTok accounts

4. Publish basic promotional and brand content

5. Research and approach suitable affiliates

6. Research and approach suitable creators/influencers

7. Manage outreach messages, follow-ups and relationship building

8. Coordinate samples and track creator/affiliate activity

9. Monitor creator performance and affiliate sales results

10. Assist with setting up and monitoring GMV Max campaigns

11. Help improve shop performance, traffic, conversions and sales

12. Provide regular updates, reporting and recommendations



Requirements:



 - Proven experience managing TikTok Shop

 - Experience listing products and managing shop operations

 - Experience working with affiliates and creators

 - Good understanding of GMV Max and TikTok Shop growth tools

 - Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

 - Good written English

 - Able to work independently and take ownership

 - Experience in e-commerce is essential

 - Experience with UK market brands/products is preferred



Ideal candidate:



 - Has already worked on live TikTok Shop accounts

 - Understands how to drive visibility and sales, not just upload products

 - Can find the right creators and affiliates and actually get activity moving

 - Is proactive, commercial and results-focused

 - Can show examples of previous TikTok Shop work and results



When applying, please answer the following:



1. What TikTok Shop accounts or brands have you worked on?

2. What exactly did you do for those accounts?

3. Have you listed products into TikTok Shop yourself?

4. What experience do you have with affiliates?

5. What experience do you have with creators/influencers?

6. Have you used GMV Max before? Please explain.

7. What results have you achieved?

8. How would you help grow a new or underdeveloped TikTok Shop account?

9. Have you worked with multiple shops or multiple brands?

10. Please send examples, screenshots or case studies of your past work.



Please also include:



Your availability per week

The word TIKTOK GROWTH at the top of your application so we know you have read this properly
salary: $500 PER MONTH TOTAL OR BASE PLUS INC...

title: Executive Assistant / Operations & Lead Generation Assistant
description:
**Executive Assistant / Operations & Lead Generation Assistant (Content Agency)**



We run a high-end content agency working with hospitality and real estate brands. We’re growing quickly and are looking for a reliable, highly organised operator to help manage day-to-day operations while supporting lead generation and outreach.



This is **not a basic admin role**.

We are looking for someone who enjoys structured execution, high-volume outreach, and keeping systems running smoothly.



If your experience is limited to simple admin tasks without exposure to outreach, pipelines, or CRM tracking, this role likely won’t be the right fit.



---



### **Role Overview**



This role has two core functions:



**1. Operations & Admin (Core Responsibility)**

Keeping the business organised, structured, and running smoothly.



**2. Lead Generation & Outreach (Growth Responsibility)**

Supporting consistent outreach efforts to generate new business opportunities.



Both areas are critical to the growth of the company.



You will not be expected to “figure everything out” alone. We provide systems, scripts, and clear direction — your role is to execute at a high level, stay organised, and keep everything moving.



---



### **Responsibilities**



**Operations & Admin**



* Manage inbox (organise, respond, maintain structure)

* Handle calendar, bookings, and scheduling (client shoots, meetings)

* Coordinate client communication and follow-ups

* Organise files, content, and internal workflows

* Maintain and update CRM system

* Ensure all tasks, bookings, and communications are tracked and completed



**Lead Generation & Outreach**



* Send daily outreach messages using provided scripts

* Research and identify relevant leads

* Track all conversations and follow-ups in CRM

* Maintain an organised lead pipeline

* Book calls with qualified prospects



---



### **Performance Expectations**



* Consistent daily outreach activity

* Maintain structured and up-to-date CRM

* No missed follow-ups or disorganised communication

* Support booking a steady flow of calls through outreach



---



### **Requirements**



* Strong written English communication (very important)

* Highly organised and detail-oriented

* Experience managing inboxes and calendars

* Ability to follow systems and processes consistently

* Reliable, proactive, and responsive

* Comfortable working with CRM tools and tracking data

* Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT or similar) to improve efficiency



---



### **Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)**



* Experience with lead generation or outreach

* Experience supporting founders or small teams

* Familiarity with tools like Slack, Notion, ClickUp

* Basic Canva skills (simple social posts, carousels)

* Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, n8n)



---



### **Hours & Compensation**



* 6 hours per day

* Long-term role



We offer performance-based bonuses.

If your outreach contributes to new clients that convert into retained work, you will receive additional compensation.



There is also opportunity for growth into a larger role with increased responsibility and pay over time.



---



### **Application Instructions**



To apply, please include:



1. Your experience managing inboxes and calendars

2. How you would organise a busy week with multiple client bookings

3. Your experience with lead generation or outreach (if any)

4. Write 2 example outreach messages to a restaurant offering content services

5. How you have used ChatGPT or AI tools in your work



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



### **Work Style**



We are looking for someone who is:



* Professional and friendly in communication

* Confident interacting with clients and leads

* Highly organised and consistent

* Able to follow systems while maintaining a human, personable approach



---



This is a long-term opportunity to grow within a fast-moving content agency.

We value reliability, consistency, and strong execution.

title: Commercial Insurance Quoting Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Commercial Insurance Quoting Specialist to join our team full-time. The ideal candidate has direct experience quoting insurance policies across multiple carriers within an independent insurance agency or brokerage. This role requires someone who already understands the quoting process and can immediately contribute without extensive training.





Key Responsibilities



Prepare and obtain insurance quotes from multiple carriers for commercial insurance policies

Compare coverage options, pricing, and terms across different insurance companies

Work with agents or producers to prepare accurate and competitive quotes for clients

Submit applications and documentation to various insurance carriers

Review policy details and ensure quotes meet client requirements

Maintain organized records of quotes, submissions, and carrier responses

Communicate with carriers when needed to clarify underwriting requirements or obtain additional information





Required Qualifications



Proven experience quoting insurance policies in an independent insurance agency or brokerage

Experience working with multiple insurance carriers

Strong knowledge of commercial insurance policies (such as General Liability, Workers’ Compensation, BOP, Commercial Auto, etc.)

Familiarity with carrier portals and insurance quoting platforms

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



Work Schedule



Full-time position

Monday through Friday



Ideal Candidate



Has experience quoting across multiple insurance companies, not just a single captive carrier

Can quickly navigate carrier portals and rating systems

Is confident in the quoting process and able to contribute to the team immediately





Benefits and Perks

title: Data Analyst (SQL-Heavy / Systems-Focused)
description:
DAP Brands is looking for a high-ownership, systems-minded Data Analyst who doesn’t just report numbers; they build and maintain the foundation that powers decision-making.



This role is critical as we move toward a centralized PostgreSQL database and cleaner, more reliable data across all teams.



If you’re someone who sees messy, inconsistent data and thinks “this needs structure, validation, and automation”. Keep reading.



What This Role Really Is



You are not just analyzing data.



You are responsible for:

- Structuring it

- Cleaning and validating it

- Standardizing it across systems

- Making it usable and trustworthy



You ensure that when leadership reviews data, it’s accurate, consistent, and ready for decisions.



Key Responsibilities

- Build, manage, and optimize SQL/PostgreSQL databases for centralized data access

- Write efficient, scalable queries for reporting and operational use

- Design and maintain ETL processes to ensure clean and consistent data flow

- Perform data cleaning, validation, and normalization across multiple data sources

- Ensure data integrity, especially across CRM and operational systems

- Identify inconsistencies, duplicates, and structural issues in datasets

- Create and maintain client-level dashboards and reporting systems

- Develop reports that directly support business and operational decisions

- Collaborate with teams to define metrics and improve data tracking

- Proactively improve how data is collected, stored, and used



Non-Negotiables (Must-Have)

- Strong experience with SQL (PostgreSQL preferred)

- Strong proficiency in data cleaning, validation, and normalization

- Advanced skills in Excel / Google Sheets (pivot tables, queries, data modeling)

- Experience with CRM systems (e.g., GoHighLevel, HubSpot) and maintaining data integrity

- Proficiency in programming/scripting (JavaScript, XML, or similar)

- Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills

close attention to detail

- Proactive mindset and strong ownership



Strong Plus (Will Set You Apart)

- Experience building or managing centralized databases or data warehouses

- Hands-on experience with ETL tools or automation workflows

- Experience with dashboarding tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, etc.)

- Experience handling client-level or multi-entity datasets

- Background in operations, marketing, or financial data analysis

- Experience in fast-paced, high-growth environments



What We Actually Need (Read This Carefully)



Most candidates can analyze data.



We are looking for someone who can:

- Ensure data accuracy across systems (not just within one report)

- Build clean, standardized datasets fro
ssy inputs

- Maintain data integrity inside CRMs and operational tools

- Reduce manual work through automation and better structure

- Take ownership of data issues and fix them without being told



Final Note



We move fast.

We expect ownership.

We value people who fix problems before they’re told.



If you’re looking to “analyze data,” this role is not for you. Apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.



Suppose you want to build the backbone of how a company uses data. We want to talk.

title: Hospice QA Coordinator (Home Health)
description:
DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet the qualifications listed below



Position Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented and service-driven Virtual Hospice Quality Assurance (QA)  to provide after-hours, evening, and weekend support for hospice operations.



This role is primarily responsible for quality assurance, compliance monitoring, and documentation accuracy, while also supporting intake coordination, patient call management, scheduling follow-ups, and EMR documentation.



The ideal candidate has prior hospice or home health experience, strong knowledge of documentation compliance standards, excellent English communication skills, and the ability to remain calm and professional in time-sensitive or sensitive patient situations.



Key Responsibilities

Hospice Quality Assurance (Primary Focus)



• Review and audit patient charts to ensure compliance with hospice regulations and company standards

• Track and follow up on missing, incomplete, or non-compliant documentation

• Ensure timely upload of physician orders, certifications, and required hospice documentation

• Maintain organized QA logs, audit trackers, and electronic records

• Support compliance readiness for internal reviews and external audits

• Flag documentation discrepancies and escalate issues to appropriate leadership



Intake & Documentation Support



• Assist with hospice intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders, certifications, and care plans in EMR

• Monitor and manage endorsement and handoff reports

• Ensure all documentation is complete, accurate, and filed timely



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits for hospice patients

• Coordinate with field clinicians, intake teams, and office staff

• Assist in care coordination and communication workflows

• Escalate urgent clinical or operational concerns as needed



Patient & Call Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient, family, and caregiver calls

• Provide compassionate, professional customer service aligned with hospice care standards

• Accurately document all interactions in EMR

• Route concerns promptly and appropriately



Qualifications & Requirements

Required



• Prior healthcare experience (hospice or home health strongly preferred)

• Experience with medical documentation review, QA, or compliance tracking

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

• High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

• Strong computer proficiency (Microsoft Office, spreadsheets, EMR systems)

• Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time)

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional remote workspace



Preferred



• Direct Hospice QA or compliance experience

• Experience with Home Health/Hospice EMR systems (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)

• Clinical background (RN & USRN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health)

• Familiarity with hospice regulations and documentation standards



How to Apply



Please submit a short cover letter/resume highlighting your relevant experience and include your answers to the questions below:



Describe your experience in hospice or home health, including your role, duration, and responsibilities.



Do you have experience with quality assurance, chart audits, or compliance tracking? Please explain.



How many years of experience do you have in Hospice or Home Health?



What EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)?



Describe your experience reviewing or managing medical documentation (orders, certifications, care plans, etc.).

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Hiring for full-time work for a CapCut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok and Instagram videos using CapCut or the video editing software of your choice. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

- Cutting dead space in talking head videos

- Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

- Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

- Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:







----------



You will be working with me on editing UGC videos!



Requirements:

HIGH AGENCY & PRO-ACTIVE PERSONALITY (Not reactive. Need minimal guidance)

Consistent work ethic

End to end video delivery (Raw videos and assets -> completed video)

Quick turnaround time

Attention to detail. Videos need to be perfect

Great communication skills

Medium to strong English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with CapCut / TikTok / Instagram

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback quick

Ability to hop on google calls for feedback & messaging through WhatsApp / ----------

Availability to work 4-6h a day consistently (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise



Starting at $535/month with potential for increase to $1000/mo or MORE within the first 2-3 months.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1-2h max)

You will be paid $5 for the completed assignment (I am required to pay for the test assignment due to the website terms)



Below is a Google drive with the original files, you will need to re-create (or make it better) the two test videos



You will find the reference videos within the "Video Examples" folder, as well as the raw footage and assets in "Video 1 - Test" and "Video 2 - Test" folders here: 



Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes and edit them together

Overlay images when appropriate

Add the music that is provided

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

The goal is to recreate the video 1:1 or make it better

Message me a google drive link to the re-created video/videos (One recreated video is enough)



If you get hired you would be editing 2-3 of similar videos daily. I will be uploading a raw recording and you will need to edit it into a final polished video



Please don't waste my or your own time. This is a full time job with a very high upside. Only apply if you are serious about this. If you get hired you will work with me for months/years and you might even be working with me on my personal brand/YT content in the future! I will take care great care of you and make sure you get compensated very generously.

title: Content curation assistant
description:
About the role

I'm a European footwear designer with 10 years of project work — shoe design, shoe development, material innovation, factory production, brand collaborations. I have a large archive of images and project material that has never been published. I'm building a portfolio on Instagram and LinkedIn, and I need someone to help me turn that archive into a steady stream of posts.

You are NOT creating content from scratch. The work already exists — hundreds of images per project. You're helping me surface the best ones, sort them, and prepare them for publishing.

This is a long-term role. I'm looking for someone to grow with over months, not a one-off project. The work starts heavier while we organise the archive together, then settles into a lighter weekly rhythm once the system is running.

What you'll do (starting task)

Your main job to start is image sorting and grouping. I'll give you project folders with 100–300 images each (sketches, renders, factory photos, prototypes, material swatches, travel shots, finished products). You go through the folder and sort the images into groups of 3–5 that go together visually or tell a small story. For each group, write me a short note: what you see in the images and what angle they could work for (e.g., "these show the shoe being made in the factory" or "these are close-ups of the material").

Once you're comfortable with that, the role expands to:

 • Image editing: Applying a preset filter to selected images in Lightroom (or a similar tool) so the whole feed looks consistent. This is batch work, not creative retouching.

 • Post assembly: For each group of images, you prepare a small package — the images, your note about what they show, and a short prompt for me so I know what to write about for the caption.

 • Scheduling: Loading approved posts into a scheduling tool (Buffer, Later, or similar). Setting the posting order and rhythm.



Your focus is purely visual

I handle writing, strategy, and community engagement separately. You won't need to write captions, create graphics from scratch, manage comments or DMs, or run ads. Your job is to make the archive look beautiful and organised.

What I'm looking for

 • A good eye for images — you can look at 50 photos and pick the 12 that stand out

 • Familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn — you understand what looks good on a grid

 • Basic Lightroom skills (or similar app): applying presets, cropping, exporting

 • Organised — you'll work within a clear folder structure and keep things tidy

 • Good English communication — we'll check in weekly and work async the rest of the time

 • A background in communication, marketing, photography, styling or visual media is a plus but not required

Structure

 • Part-time: approximately 15–20 hours per week in months 1–2 (archive organising phase), then 4–8 hours per week ongoing

 • Flexible hours — schedule the work when it fits your calendar

 • One weekly video or voice check-in with me (I'm in Central European Time, UTC+1 — we can find a time that works for both of us)

 • The rest of the work is async: I give you a project folder, you return grouped images within a few days

 • Tools: Google Drive (shared folder), Lightroom, scheduling tool — to be decided together



Compensation

$450–$600/month depending on experience, with room to increase as the role grows. Payment monthly via Wise (TransferWise) or PayPal, your preference.

To apply

Send me two things:

 1 A short note about yourself — your experience and why this role interests you. Write it in your own words, don't list skills.

 2 A link to one Instagram account you think has a great visual grid, and tell me in 2–3 sentences what makes it work.

I'll respond to applications within a week. If we're a good fit, I'll send you a small test task with real images so we can both see how it goes before committing.

I look forward to hearing from you.

title: WANTED: EBAY & POSHMARK LISTING & MANAGING SUPERSTAR
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant

eBay / Poshmark Fashion Accessories Seller

20 hours/week • Remote • Long-term



About This Role

I run a growing eBay store in the USA specializing in fashion accessories and I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA based in the Philippines to take over the day-to-day selling tasks listed below. This is a part-time role with room to grow into full-time as the business scales. I want someone who can work independently, communicate proactively, and treat this store like their own.



Quick Facts

• Hours: 20 hours per week to start, flexible scheduling

• Pay: Negotiable, commensurate with experience

• How to apply: Onlinejobs.ph message or

• Duration: Long-term preferred — I am not looking for a one-off hire

• Tools used: eBay Seller Hub, Poshmark, Depop, Google Sheets, basic



Your 7 Core Tasks

The table below describes everything you will be responsible for. All tasks are done inside eBay Seller Hub, Poshmark, Depop, or Google Sheets — no special software required.



# Task What it involves Frequency

1 Relisting items Check sold orders from the past 30 days that have positive feedback. Create draft listings in Seller Hub using Sell Similar for high-velocity SKUs. Maintain a stock of 10 drafts per top SKU so the owner can publish quickly from mobile. Daily / Weekly

2 Customer service Monitor and respond to buyer messages in eBay Seller Hub. Handle refund requests professionally and follow eBay Money Back Guarantee policy. Escalate unusual cases to the owner. Daily

3 Dispute monitoring Check the Resolution Centre daily for any open disputes or cases. Respond promptly with tracking information, photos, or other evidence. Keep a log of all disputes and outcomes in Google Sheets. Daily

4 Negative feedback removal Identify any new negative or neutral feedback. Attempt to resolve the buyer's issue and request feedback revision where appropriate. Follow eBay's feedback revision process correctly. As needed

5 eBay seller health Check the Seller Dashboard weekly for any defect rate warnings, late shipment flags, or policy alerts. Report any issues to the owner immediately with a brief summary. Weekly

6 Crosslisting List active eBay fashion accessories inventory on Poshmark and Depop. Adapt titles and descriptions to suit each platform’s audience and SEO. Keep pricing consistent across platforms. Monitoring Shipstation Inventory prior to listing.

7 Blocking buyers After owner approval or a clear policy violation, add problematic buyers to the Blocked Buyer List in eBay Account Settings. Keep a Google Sheet log of blocked buyers with reason and date. As needed





What I Am Looking For

Must Have

• Proven experience listing and managing an eBay seller account (Seller Hub, not just buying)

• Familiarity with eBay policies: Money Back Guarantee, defect rates, feedback removal

• Experience with Poshmark and/or Depop listing

• Comfortable writing professional customer service replies in English

• Reliable internet connection and available during agreed hours

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Nice to Have

• Experience with fashion accessories, jewelry, belts, hats or similar categories

• Google Sheets experience for logging and tracking

• Familiarity with eBay’s Cassini search algorithm and listing optimization

• Experience handling eBay disputes and escalations

• Experience solving problems with ChatGBT or Claude



What I Offer

• Consistent part-time income with potential to grow to full-time

• Clear task list with no guessing— you will always know what to do

• Respectful, straightforward working relationship

• Paid training period to learn my specific workflow

• Long-term opportunity as the business scales



How to Apply

Please send me a message that includes ALL of the following. Applications missing any item will not be considered.



• A short introduction about yourself (3–5 sentences)

• How many years you have managed eBay seller accounts and what categories you sold

• Your experience with Poshmark and/or Depop

Any experience with Shipstation

• One example of how you handled a difficult buyer or dispute

• Your available hours per week and preferred schedule (Philippine time)

• Your rate in USD per hour

•

This position requires close attention to detail please respond with "Kent I am Your eBay Expert!" in the subject line of your response to this job posting. I look forward to hearing from candidates who have read this post carefully.





Thank you for your interest — I look forward to finding the right long-term partner for this role.

title: Finance Operations Specialist (Xero, Ecommerce)
description:
*** Looking for someone who prefers a long-term, stable role with clean systems — not juggling multiple clients. ***



We are a fast-growing 7-figure ecommerce brand (Amazon + Shopify), operating with a lean, high-performance team.



We are looking for a highly reliable and detail-oriented Finance Operations Specialist to own our day-to-day finance operations and maintain a clean, structured, and audit-ready financial system.



This role includes ownership of our Accounts Payable workflow (invoice ? payment), ensuring all supplier invoices and payments are properly recorded, matched, and documented.



Expected workload: ~15–20 hours per week (ongoing, long-term).



—



Role Overview



You will be responsible for maintaining accurate, clean, and reliable financial records across Amazon and Shopify, ensuring the business always has clear visibility into profitability, cash flow, and inventory.



—



Key Responsibilities



• Record all supplier invoices as Bills in Xero (with invoice attachments)

• Review supplier invoices for accuracy (price, quantity, totals) before payment

• Ensure all transactions are correctly categorized and complete

• Maintain a clean and consistent chart of accounts (no duplicates)

• Reconcile Amazon, Shopify, and all payment accounts accurately

• Maintain accurate inventory and COGS (accrual-based, aligned with supplier invoices)

• Manage Accounts Payable workflow:

   * Ensure all invoices are recorded properly

   * Prepare payment batches in Airwallex (for approval)

   * Ensure all payments are linked to bills

• Reconcile bank accounts and ensure no unmatched transactions

• Maintain audit-ready records at all times



—



Monthly Responsibilities



• Complete monthly close by the 5th

• Ensure all data is accurate, consistent, and fully reconciled

• Deliver a clean P&L (no manual fixes required)

• Ensure financial data is ready for reporting and decision-making



—



Systems



• Xero (accounting)

• Link My Books / A2X (Amazon integration)

• Airwallex (payments)



—



Requirements



• Strong experience with ecommerce accounting (Amazon + Shopify)

• Proficiency in Xero (required)

• Experience with A2X / Link My Books or similar tools

• Understanding of payment processors (Amazon payouts, Shopify, Stripe, PayPal)

• Strong understanding of accrual accounting (not cash-based shortcuts)

• Experience with inventory and COGS flows

• Ability to reconcile complex, high-volume transactions

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy

• Systems thinker (avoids manual, repetitive work where possible)

• Reliable and consistent (non-negotiable)

• Clear communication and ability to explain numbers simply



—



What We’re Looking For



• Extremely reliable and detail-oriented

• Keeps systems clean, consistent, and easy to understand

• Thinks in systems, not one-off fixes

• Takes ownership and solves problems independently

• Maintains audit-ready records at all times



—



Important



We do not want:



• Manual “one-by-one” work where it can be avoided

• Duplicate or inconsistent accounts

• Missing or unlinked invoices

• Transactions that require explanation or re-checking

• Heavy reliance on support teams to solve basic issues



—



What Success Looks Like



• Xero is always clean and up to date

• All transactions are categorized, matched, and documented

• Amazon and Shopify are fully reconciled with no discrepancies

• P&L is accurate and can be trusted at any time

• Payments are clearly tracked and linked to invoices

• Audit requests can be fulfilled quickly without manual digging



—



To Apply



Only applications with clear answers to the questions below will be reviewed.



1. How would you structure revenue accounts for Amazon and Shopify in Xero?

2. How do you ensure all supplier payments are properly tracked and linked to invoices?

3. If you find duplicate or inconsistent accounts in Xero, how would you fix it?

4. What would you check first when reviewing a new ecommerce company’s books?



We are looking to hire quickly and long-term.
